Description.en: The character slams the ground in front of them with a Mace, creating a wave that travels forward and damages enemies with an increased chance to stun.
Description.zh: 以锤类武器重击前方地面，制造出一道向前释放的冲击波，对敌人造成伤害并有较高几率将其击晕。

Description.en: Slams the ground in front of you, creating a wave that travels forward and damages enemies.
Description.zh: 猛击前方地面，制造出一道向前释放的冲击波，对敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: The character swings their weapon (or both weapons if dual wielding) in an arc, damaging monsters in an area in front of them. Only works with Axes and Swords.
Description.zh: 在身体前方以弧状挥动武器（双持时则挥动两把武器）, 对前方区域的怪物造成伤害。限定斧类与剑类。

Description.en: Charges at an enemy, bashing it with the character's shield and striking it. This knocks it back and stuns it. Enemies in the way are pushed to the side. Damage and stun are proportional to distance travelled. Cannot be supported by Multistrike.
Description.zh: 向一名敌人冲锋，使用盾牌对其猛击并以近战武器顺手打击。此攻击将会击退目标并将其击晕，在路径上的敌人将会被推向两旁。伤害与击晕几率将视冲锋距离而定。无法被多重打击辅助。

Description.en: Charges at an enemy, bashing it with the character's shield and striking it. This knocks it back and stuns it. Enemies in the way are pushed to the side. Damage and stun are proportional to distance travelled. Cannot be supported by Multistrike.
Description.zh: 向一名敌人冲锋，使用盾牌对其猛击并以近战武器顺手打击。此攻击将会击退目标并将其击晕，在路径上的敌人将会被推向两旁。伤害与击晕几率将视冲锋距离而定。无法被多重打击辅助。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to charge in the target direction. You will crash into enemies on your path, stopping your charge and dealing damage to enemies in an area, and extra damage to the enemies you collided with. While charging, your [Shield|Shield] is raised and you will [Block|Block] all incoming [Block|Blockable] hits.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]向目标方向冲锋。撞击路径上的敌人后停止冲锋，对区域内的敌人造成伤害，并对击中的敌人造成额外的伤害。冲锋时你会举起[Shield|盾牌]，能够[Block|格挡]所有受到的[Block|可格挡]的击中。

ShortDescription.en: Raise your [Shield] and charge forward.
ShortDescription.zh: 举起[Shield|盾牌]并向前冲锋。

Description.en: Performs a warcry, granting increased damage and mana regeneration to the user and nearby allies if there are nearby enemies. The damage increase is proportional to the number of surrounding enemies. Shares a cooldown with other Warcry skills.
Description.zh: 发出一声战吼，附近有敌人时，提高自身和周围友军的伤害和魔力再生。伤害增加量随着周围敌人数量提升。与其他战吼技能共享技能冷却。

Description.en:
Jump into the air, damaging and [Knockback|Knocking Back] enemies with your mace where you land. Enemies you would land on are
pushed out of the way.
Description.zh:
跃向空中，落地时用锤子对敌人造成伤害，并[Knockback|击退]敌人。
被踩到的敌人将被推离。

ShortDescription.en: Jump to the target location and [Slam] the ground.
ShortDescription.zh: 跃向目标位置并[Slam|猛击]地面。

Description.en: Jump into the air, damaging and knocking back enemies with your weapon where you land. Enemies you would land on are pushed out of the way.
Description.zh: 跃向空中，落地时用武器对敌人造成伤害，并击退敌人。被踩到的敌人将被推离。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a burning monstrosity and leap through the air to crash down upon the earth, [Slam|Slamming] twice and creating [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures]. [Consume|Consumes] [Rage] to create additional [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures].
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为燃烧的凶兽，腾跃至空中轰击地面，[Slam|猛击]两次并生成[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]。[Consume|消耗][Rage|怒火]生成更多[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]。

ShortDescription.en: Jump to the target location [Slam|Slamming] twice and creating [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures].
ShortDescription.zh: 跃向目标区域[Slam|猛击]两次并生成[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]。

Description.en: Performs two fast strikes with a melee weapon.
Description.zh: 使用近战武器发动两次快速打击。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Performs two fast strikes with a melee weapon, each of which summons a double of you for a duration to continuously attack monsters in this fashion.
Description.zh: 使用近战武器发动两次快速打击，每次都会召唤出你的影分身持续一段时间，并用相同的方式连续攻击敌人。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Each attack with this skill will choose an element at random, and will only be able to deal damage of that element. If the attack hits an enemy, it will also deal damage in an area around them, with the radius being larger if that enemy is suffering from an ailment of the chosen element. It will avoid choosing the same element twice in a row.
Description.zh: 该技能的每次攻击都会随机选择一种元素，并只能造成该元素的伤害。若击中敌人，还会在他们周围造成伤害，若该敌人正承受所选元素的异常状态，则伤害范围扩大。不能连续选择同一种元素。

Description.en: Attacks with both weapons, dealing the damage of both in one strike. Dual wield only. Does not work with wands.
Description.zh: 使用两把武器对目标同时进行攻击并造成伤害. 限定双持（不包含法杖）.

Description.en: Dive through enemies, dealing weapon damage. Only works with daggers, claws and one handed swords. Cannot be supported by Multistrike.
Description.zh: 在敌人之间穿梭，造成武器伤害。需要匕首、爪类以及单手剑。无法被多重打击辅助。

Description.en: Dive through enemies, dealing weapon damage. Only works with daggers, claws and one handed swords. Cannot be supported by Multistrike.
Description.zh: 在敌人之间穿梭，造成武器伤害。需要匕首、爪类以及单手剑。无法被多重打击辅助。

Description.en: Performs an attack that gives the character a frenzy charge if it hits. Frenzy charges increase your attack speed.
Description.zh: 进行一次攻击, 若是命中敌人则累积一颗狂怒球. 带着狂怒球的状态下将会增加你的攻击速度.

Description.en: Fires an arrow which deals chaos damage in an area on impact, and spreads caustic ground. Enemies standing on the caustic ground take chaos damage over time.
Description.zh: 射出一发带有腐蚀效果的箭矢, 对击中的敌人造成额外混沌伤害, 并且产生腐蚀地面。站在地面上的敌人将会持续的受到混沌伤害.

Description.en: Fires a slow-moving serpentine arrow which deals chaos damage while piercing enemies, and leaves a trail of caustic ground. Enemies standing on the caustic ground take chaos damage over time.
Description.zh: 发射一支缓慢移动的蛇形箭，在刺穿敌人的同时造成混沌伤害，并在地面留下一道腐蚀之痕。站在腐蚀地面上的敌人会持续受到混沌伤害。

Description.en: A dagger skill that deals a critical strike and additional damage to an enemy if the attack is made from behind the enemy. Has high mana cost and cooldown
Description.zh: 一个匕首专用的技能, 若是在敌人背后施放则会增加伤害且必定暴击. 高魔力消耗及技能冷却.

Description.en: Cause a [Corpse] to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.
Description.zh: 使一个[Corpse|灵柩]发生剧烈爆炸，对周围的敌人造成伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Detonate a [Corpse], damaging nearby enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 引爆一个[Corpse|灵柩]，对周围的敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: Explodes an unused corpse, dealing fire damage to nearby enemies. Nearby corpses will also explode in a chain reaction. The explosions are not affected by modifiers to spell damage.
Description.zh: 使一个未使用过的灵柩爆炸， 对附近的敌人造成火焰伤害。 附近未使用过的灵柩也会连锁爆炸。 爆炸造成的伤害无法被法术伤害词缀加成。

Description.en: Teleport to a enemy and [Strike] them. Consumes [Charges|Power Charges] to perform additional teleporting [Strike|Strikes] on nearby enemies.
Description.zh: 传送至一名敌人身边并发起[Strike|打击]。消耗[Charges|暴击球]能额外传送并[Strike|打击]附近的敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Teleport to an enemy and [Strike], Consuming [Charges|Power Charges] for additional [Strike|Strikes].
ShortDescription.zh: 传送至一名敌人身边并发起[Strike|打击]。消耗[Charges|暴击球]能发起额外[Strike|打击]。

Description.en: Repeatedly teleports to enemies and hits them, inflicting a wound but dealing no damage. After the repeating finishes, each enemy is hit by the total damage of their wounds, which are removed.
Description.zh: 不断传送到敌人身边并攻击它们，对其施加割伤但不造成伤害。传送结束后，每个敌人受到身上割伤的总伤害并移除它们的割伤。

Description.en: Adds a buff that deals Physical Damage over time, while increasing Attack Speed and Life Leech. Killing an enemy while this buff is active refreshes the buff duration, and can grant a Frenzy Charge.
Description.zh: 增加一个持续造成物理伤害的增益效果，同时提高攻击速度和生命偷取效果。击败敌人会刷新该增益效果的持续时间，并提供一个狂怒球。

Description.en: Fires multiple arrows at different targets.
Description.zh: 对不同的目标射出多重箭矢.

Description.en: Creates a sudden burst of cold in a targeted area, damaging enemies. This also creates an expanding area which is filled with chilled ground, and deals cold damage over time to enemies. Enemies that die while in the area have a chance to grant Frenzy Charges. The cooldown can be bypassed by expending a Frenzy Charge.
Description.zh: 在目标区域创造一股急促的寒流，并对敌人造成伤害。此攻击还会创造一片开散的冰缓地面效果，并持续对敌人造成冰霜伤害。在此区域内被击败的敌人会生成狂怒球。消耗狂怒球可以加速冷却。

Description.en: Creates a sudden burst of cold around you, damaging enemies. This also creates a chilling area around you which expands and deals cold damage over time to surrounding enemies in addition to chilling them. Enemies that die while in the area grant Frenzy Charges, and you will passively gain Frenzy Charges while there are enemies in the area.
Description.zh: 在你身边创造一股急促的寒流，并对敌人造成伤害。此攻击还会在你身边创造一片开散的冰缓地面效果，并持续对周围的敌人造成冰霜伤害。在此区域内被击败的敌人会生成狂怒球。若你在此区域内，则可以自动获得这些狂怒球。

Description.en: Conjure a wave of ice in all directions, [Knockback|Knocking Back] enemies based on how close they are to you. Casting Ice Nova targeting near a Frostbolt [Projectile] will cause it to originate from the Frostbolt instead of you. [Consume|Consumes] a [Cold] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to leave a patch of [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground].
Description.zh: 向四面八方召唤寒冰波，根据敌人与你的距离将其[Knockback|击退]。对寒冰弹[Projectile|投射物]附近施放寒冰新星，会改为使它从寒冰弹发出。尽量[Consume|消耗]一次[Cold|冰霜][ElementalInfusion|灌注]，留下[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]。

ShortDescription.en: Conjure a wave of ice that damages and [Knockback|Knocks Back] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一股寒冰波，对敌人造成伤害和[Knockback|击退]。

Description.en: Launch a fiery [Projectile] towards a target. The [Projectile] explodes on impact, damaging foes in a small area.
Description.zh: 向目标发射一束燃烧的[Projectile|投射物]。[Projectile|投射物]在击中时爆炸，对小范围的敌人造成伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Launch a fiery [Projectile] that explodes on impact.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一束燃烧的[Projectile|投射物]，击中时爆炸。

Description.en: Launches a series of fireballs in a spiral around the caster.
Description.zh: 以施法者为中心，螺旋发射一连串火球。

Description.en: While active, taking [Lightning] damage builds up charge on you. Reaching full charge expends all charge to [Trigger] this skill, creating a [Chain|Chaining] lightning bolt that arcs to nearby enemies.
Description.zh: 激活时，受到[Lightning|闪电]伤害会为你积蓄充能。充满时释放全部充能来[Trigger|触发]此技能，产生一道[Chain|连锁]闪电箭对附近的敌人产生电弧。

Description.en: An arc of [Lightning|Lightning] stretches from the caster to a targeted enemy and [Chain|Chains] on to other nearby enemies. [Shock|Shocked] enemies [HitDamage|Hit] release damaging pulses.
Description.zh: 一道[Lightning|闪电]之弧从施放者射向目标，并[Chain|连锁]弹射到附近的敌人身上。[HitDamage|击中][Shock|感电]敌人会释放伤害脉冲。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] bolt.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一道[Chain|连锁][Lightning|闪电]箭。

Description.en: A shocking arc of lightning stretches from the caster to a targeted enemy and chains to other nearby enemies. Each time the beam chains it will also chain simultaneously to a second enemy, but no enemy can be hit twice by the beams. Also grants a buff making you lucky when damaging enemies with Arc for a short duration.
Description.zh: 一道电弧从施放者射向目标, 并会弹跳至周围其他敌人。每次主电弧弹射时，也会向第二个敌人进行二次弹射，但敌人只能被弹射一次。当该电弧对敌人造成伤害时，短时间内还会赋予你一个“特别幸运”的增益效果。

Description.en: Consume a [Corpse|Corpse] or [Charges|Power Charge] to create a short-lived Zombie. Zombies created from [Charges|Power Charges] are [Empowered] and also create two additional non-empowered Zombies.
Description.zh: 消耗一个[Corpse|灵柩]或[Charges|暴击球]产生一个短暂存活的魔卫。消耗[Charges|暴击球]所产生的魔卫会得到[Empowered|强化]，并额外产生两个未强化的魔卫。

ShortDescription.en: Summon a short-lived Zombie from a [Corpse] or [Charges|Power Charge].
ShortDescription.zh: 使用一个[Corpse|灵柩]或[Charges|暴击球]召唤一个短暂存活的魔卫。

Description.en: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your spell damage is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining.
Description.zh: 以魔法之火快速的燃烧自己及周围的敌人. 在此效果下, 你的法术伤害大幅增加. 当你的生命只剩下 1 时将会自动停止此法术.

Description.en: Sacrifices a portion of your Life and Energy Shield to engulf you in magical fire that rapidly burns nearby enemies for a duration. Your spell damage is increased while under this effect.
Description.zh: 牺牲部分生命和能量护盾，以魔法烈焰笼罩自身，使周围敌人迅猛燃烧一段时间。该效果可以提高你的法术伤害。

Description.en: Fires a poisonous projectile based on your weapon that will chain between enemies.
Description.zh: 基于你的武器，投出剧毒的投射物，连锁打击敌人。

Description.en: Launch a spray of sparking [Projectile|Projectiles] that travel erratically along the ground until they hit an enemy or expire. [Consume|Consumes] a [Cold] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to fire many sparks in a circle.
Description.zh: 发射一束喷射火花的[Projectile|投射物]，投射物会沿着地面不规则移动，直到击中一个敌人或失效。尽量[Consume|消耗]一次[Cold|冰霜][ElementalInfusion|灌注]以环形发射大量火花。

ShortDescription.en: Launch a spray of erratically moving sparks.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一束不规则移动的投射物。

Description.en: Launch a spray of sparking [Projectile|Projectiles] that travel erratically along the ground until they hit an enemy or expire. [Consume|Consumes] a [Cold] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to fire many sparks in a circle.
Description.zh: 发射一束喷射火花的[Projectile|投射物]，投射物会沿着地面不规则移动，直到击中一个敌人或失效。尽量[Consume|消耗]一次[Cold|冰霜][ElementalInfusion|灌注]以环形发射大量火花。

ShortDescription.en: Launch a spray of erratically moving sparks.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一束不规则移动的投射物。

Description.en: Continuously launches unpredictable sparks in all directions that move randomly until they hit an enemy or expire.
Description.zh: 持续的施放出大量变幻莫测的电球，这些电球将会随机移动直到撞到敌人或是自然消失.

Description.en: Launches shards of ice in rapid succession. After travelling a short distance they change to a second form, which moves much faster and pierces through enemies.
Description.zh: 凝聚冰之碎片为矛并向前射出, 此冰矛将会穿透附近的敌人, 并对一定距离以外的敌人具有较高的暴击率.

Description.en: Summon the spirit of the bound monster as a [Reviving] [Minion].
Description.zh: 召唤束缚怪物的灵魂作为一个[Reviving|可复活的][Minion|召唤生物]。

Description.en: Attacks with your weapon, applying a charged debuff to enemies hit by your strike, and an uncharged debuff to any other enemies hit. Upon reaching 6 charges, expiring, or the enemy's death, the charged debuff is removed, and it deals damage to that and other nearby enemies. Enemies with either debuff explode when they die, damaging other nearby enemies. Damage from this explosion cannot be reflected.
Description.zh: 用武器攻击敌人，施加一个有层数的主减益效果，并对击中的其它敌人附加一个不带层数的次要减益效果。主减益效果叠满 6 层或带有该效果的敌人被击败时会爆炸，对周围其它敌人造成伤害。其它带有次要减益效果的敌人被击败时也会爆炸，对周围敌人造成伤害。爆炸造成的伤害无法被反射。

Description.en: Hits enemies, converting some of your physical damage to cold damage. If an enemy is frozen and is on less than one third life, they will shatter when hit by Glacial Hammer. If striking three times in a row, the third strike will freeze enemies more easily.
Description.zh: 凝聚冰霜之力，转换一部分的物理伤害为冰霜伤害以重击敌人。若受到攻击的敌人被冻结且生命少于 1/3，则被冰霜之锤命中时会碎成冰屑。如连续攻击三次，则第三次冻结敌人的概率更高。

Description.en: Creates a wall of ice which holds back enemies. Targets under the wall are damaged and pushed back.
Description.zh: 聚集空气中的水分, 制造一堵能阻挡敌人行动的冰墙. 在冰墙成形位置的敌人将会受到伤害并且被击退.

Description.en: Create a wall of [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] which holds back enemies. The [IceCrystals|Crystals] explode if sufficiently damaged, or if pushed hard enough, damaging nearby enemies. Consumes a [Lightning] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to add another [Lightning] explosion if destroyed.
Description.zh: 制造一堵能阻挡敌人的[IceCrystals|冰晶]之墙，[IceCrystals|冰晶]受到足量伤害或遭到大力推挤时会爆炸，对周围的敌人造成伤害。尽量消耗一次[Lightning|闪电][ElementalInfusion|灌注]，在被摧毁时额外造成一次[Lightning|闪电]爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Create a wall of [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] that can be [ElementalInfusion|Infused] with [Lightning].
ShortDescription.zh: 制造一堵可以用[Lightning|闪电]进行[ElementalInfusion|灌注]的[IceCrystals|冰晶]之墙。

Description.en: An icy projectile which has a chance to freeze enemies it passes through. The projectile fades quickly, reducing damage and freezing chance until it dissipates.
Description.zh: 发出一个半月形的寒冰投射物, 被击中的敌人将有几率被冰冻. 这个投射物很快就会消散, 而其伤害与冻结几率将会随着飞行时间递减.

Description.en: Hits enemies, converting some of your physical damage to chaos damage and inflicting poison which will be affected by modifiers to skill duration. If dual wielding, will strike with both weapons.
Description.zh: 击中敌人，将部分物理伤害转化为混沌伤害，并使敌人中毒。该技能受技能持续时间词缀影响。双持武器时会用两把武器同时攻击。

Description.en: Fires an arrow which acts as a short duration fuse. Applying additional arrows to an enemy extends the duration. When the target dies or the fuses expire, the arrows explode, dealing fire AoE damage to nearby enemies. The AoE radius is proportional to the number of arrows upon death.
Description.zh: 射出一发带着引线充满爆炸能量的箭矢. 当被命中的目标死亡或是引线烧完, 该箭矢将会爆炸并对周围的敌人造成火焰伤害. 再次被爆炸箭矢命中会延长爆炸的时间. 爆炸的范围大小将视目标被击中的箭数所决定.

Description.en: [Curse] all enemies in an area, [Slow|Slowing] them and making other effects on them expire more slowly.
Description.zh: 对一片区域内的所有敌人降下[Curse|诅咒]，使他们[Slow|减速]，并使他们身上的效果消减得更慢。

ShortDescription.en: [Curse] enemies to be [Slow|Slowed].
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人降下[Curse|诅咒]，使其[Slow|减速]。

Description.en: [Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Resistances].
Description.zh: 在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下[Curse|诅咒]，降低其[ElementalDamage|元素][Resistances|抗性]。

ShortDescription.en: [Curse] enemies to have lower [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Resistances].
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人降下[Curse|诅咒]，降低其[ElementalDamage|元素][Resistances|抗性]。

Description.en: [Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, making them deal less damage.
Description.zh: 在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下[Curse|诅咒]，使他们造成的伤害降低。

ShortDescription.en: [Curse] enemies to deal less damage.
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人降下[Curse|诅咒]，降低其伤害。

Description.en: [Mark] a target. The next [Critical|Critical Hit] the target receives [MarkActivate|Activates] the [Mark], [Consume|Consuming] it to deal extra damage and grant you a [Charges|Frenzy Charge].
Description.zh: 为一个目标添加[Mark|印记]。其受到的下一次[Critical|暴击]会[MarkActivate|激活][Mark|印记]，[Consume|消耗]其以造成额外伤害，并使你获得一个[Charges|狂怒球]。

ShortDescription.en: [Mark] a target to take extra damage from your next [Critical|Critical Hit].
ShortDescription.zh: 为一个目标添加[Mark|印记]，使你的下一次[Critical|暴击]造成额外伤害。

Description.en: [Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay. making [HitDamage|Hits] against them ignore a portion of their [Armour|Armour].
Description.zh: 在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下[Curse|诅咒]，使他们受到的[HitDamage|击中]忽略一部分的[Armour|护甲]。

ShortDescription.en: [Curse] enemies to bypass their [Armour].
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人降下[Curse|诅咒]，忽略其[Armour|护甲]。

Description.en: [Debuff] all targets in an area, causing a portion of Damage they take from [HitDamage|Hits] to be tracked by the [Debuff]. When the [Debuff|debuff's] duration expires or can kill the target, the target [LifeLoss|loses life] equal to that tracked damage all at once.
Description.zh: 对区域内的所有目标施加一个[Debuff|减益状态]，其承受的部分[HitDamage|击中]伤害会被[Debuff|减益状态]追踪。[Debuff|减益状态]结束时，或当追踪的伤害足以击杀目标时，目标将一次性承受等同于追踪伤害量的[LifeLoss|生命损失]。

ShortDescription.en: [Debuff] enemies to lose life equal to a portion of damage dealt to them.
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人施加[Debuff|减益状态]，使其根据受到的一部分伤害失去生命。

Description.en: Target an enemy to either teleport inside the target's body if they are under the [CullingStrike|Cull] threshold, causing it to violently explode, or to apply a [Debuff] to them, which will cause the same effect if that enemy falls under the [CullingStrike|Cull] threshold during its duration. Can also be used on Ball Lightning [Projectile|Projectiles]. On teleport, the target is destroyed, and the explosion deals [Lightning|Lightning] damage to surrounding enemies. If targeting an enemy, the explosion also creates [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground]. Creates a [Lightning] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] on successful use. Highlights enemies that can be [CullingStrike|Culled].
Description.zh: 锁定一名敌人，如果其生命值低于[CullingStrike|终结]阈值，则传送到目标体内，令其产生剧烈爆炸；否则对其施加[Debuff|减益状态]，该状态持续期间若敌人生命值降至[CullingStrike|终结]阈值，触发同等爆炸效果。可对天雷之珠[Projectile|投射物]使用。传送时摧毁目标，对周围的敌人造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害。如果以敌人为目标，爆炸还会产生[ShockedGround|感电地面]。成功使用时产生一次[Lightning|闪电][ElementalInfusion|灌注]。标亮可以被[CullingStrike|终结]的敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Teleport inside a near-death enemy, causing them to explode.
ShortDescription.zh: 传送到濒死的敌人体内，使其爆炸。

Description.en: Target an enemy to either teleport inside the target's body if they are under the [CullingStrike|Cull] threshold, causing it to violently explode, or to apply a [Debuff] to them, which will cause the same effect if that enemy falls under the [CullingStrike|Cull] threshold during its duration. On teleport, the target is destroyed, and the explosion deals [Physical|Physical] damage to surrounding enemies and inflicts [Impale|Impale].
Description.zh: 锁定一名敌人，如果其生命值低于[CullingStrike|终结]阈值，则传送到目标体内，令其产生剧烈爆炸；否则对其施加[Debuff|减益状态]，该状态持续期间若敌人生命值降至[CullingStrike|终结]阈值，触发同等爆炸效果。传送时摧毁目标，爆炸对周围的敌人造成[Physical|物理]伤害，并施加[Impale|穿刺]。

ShortDescription.en: Teleport inside a near-death enemy, causing them to explode.
ShortDescription.zh: 传送到濒死的敌人体内，使其爆炸。

Description.en: Summon Skeleton Warrior minions at the targeted location. They use a melee attack and die after a duration. If made aggressive, Skeleton Warriors will also dash towards nearby enemies.
Description.zh: 在目标地点召唤魔侍武士。它们使用近战攻击，并在持续时间结束后消失。在侵略状态下，魔侍武士会冲撞周围的敌人。

Description.en: [Strike] with a forceful blow, knocking enemies back and weakening their [Armour|Armour].
Description.zh: 一次强力[Strike|打击]，击退敌人并削弱[Armour|护甲]。

ShortDescription.en: [Strike] an enemy and break their [Armour].
ShortDescription.zh: [Strike|打击]敌人并粉碎[Armour|护甲]。

Description.en: Attacks enemies with a melee strike, applying a debuff for a short duration. If a non-unique enemy dies while affected by the debuff, the enemy's corpse will be consumed and a Sentinel of Dominance with the same rarity, prefix and suffix modifiers will be summoned for a longer secondary duration.
Description.zh: 近战攻击敌人，在短期内施加一个减益效果。如果非传奇敌人被该效果击败，则会消耗它的灵柩创造一个统御哨兵，具有相同稀有度、前缀和后缀，并持续一段更长的时间。

Description.en: Fires a large number of arrows into the air, to land in an area around the target after a short delay. Consumes a Frenzy Charge on use to fire additional arrows.
Description.zh: 向空中射出无数箭矢，在短暂延迟后降落在目标周围的区域。使用时消耗狂怒球可以射出额外的箭矢。

Description.en: Fires multiple arrows into the air, to land in sequence after a delay, starting at the targeted location and spreading outwards in all directions. Each arrow deals damage in an area around it. Half of the arrows will land directly on targets if there are targets in their range.
Description.zh: 向空中射出多支箭矢，飞行一段时间后陆续抵达，先发射至一个指定位置，抵达后向四面八方展开。每支箭矢会对其周围区域造成伤害。若范围内有目标，则一半数量的箭矢会直接飞向目标。

Description.en: Fires multiple arrows into the air, to land in sequence after a delay, starting at the targeted location and spreading outwards in all directions. Each arrow deals damage in an area around it. Half of the arrows will land directly on targets if there are targets in their range.
Description.zh: 向空中射出多支箭矢，飞行一段时间后陆续抵达，先发射至一个指定位置，抵达后向四面八方展开。每支箭矢会对其周围区域造成伤害。若范围内有目标，则一半数量的箭矢会直接飞向目标。

Description.en: Fires multiple arrows into the air, to land in multiple sequences after a delay, each starting at the targeted location and spreading outwards in all directions. Each arrow deals damage in an area around it. Half of the arrows will land directly on targets if there are targets in their range.
Description.zh: 向空中射出多支箭矢，飞行一段时间后陆续抵达，先发射至一个指定位置，抵达后向四面八方展开。每支箭矢会对其周围区域造成伤害。若范围内有目标，则一半数量的箭矢会直接飞向目标。

Description.en: Rain a storm of flaming bolts over the targeted area. Can [Consume] all three types of [ElementalInfusion|Elemental Infusion], creating a much larger storm when [ElementalInfusion|Fire-Infused], causing lightning bolts when [ElementalInfusion|Lightning-Infused], and raining ice bolts when [ElementalInfusion|Cold-Infused].
Description.zh: 在目标区域降下燃烧箭雨。可以[Consume|消耗]全部三种[ElementalInfusion|元素灌注]，[ElementalInfusion|火焰灌注]时效果范围大幅扩大，[ElementalInfusion|闪电灌注]时引发闪电箭雨，[ElementalInfusion|冰霜灌注]时降下冰霜箭雨。

ShortDescription.en: Rain fiery bolts over the target area.
ShortDescription.zh: 对目标区域落下火焰箭雨。

Description.en: Rain a storm of flaming bolts over the targeted area. Can [Consume] all three types of [ElementalInfusion|Elemental Infusion], creating a much larger storm when [ElementalInfusion|Fire-Infused], causing lightning bolts when [ElementalInfusion|Lightning-Infused], and raining ice bolts when [ElementalInfusion|Cold-Infused].
Description.zh: 在目标区域降下燃烧箭雨。可以[Consume|消耗]全部三种[ElementalInfusion|元素灌注]，[ElementalInfusion|火焰灌注]时效果范围大幅扩大，[ElementalInfusion|闪电灌注]时引发闪电箭雨，[ElementalInfusion|冰霜灌注]时降下冰霜箭雨。

ShortDescription.en: Rain fiery bolts over the target area.
ShortDescription.zh: 对目标区域落下火焰箭雨。

Description.en: A fixed number of flaming bolts rain down in a spiral, culminating in the central one impacting the targeted location. They explode when landing, dealing damage to nearby enemies and leaving burning ground, which deals fire damage over time.
Description.zh: 固定数量的火焰之箭呈螺旋状落下，并最终击中目标位置。它们在落地时会产生爆炸，对附近的敌人造成伤害，并留下燃烧的地面，持续造成火焰伤害。

Description.en: Conjure a hail of icy bolts over the targeted area. [Chill] and [Freeze] on enemies in front of you are [Consume|Consumed] to fuel the Icestorm by creating improved bolts.
Description.zh: 对目标区域召唤一阵冷冽箭雨。[Consume|消耗]你面前的敌人受到的[Chill|冰缓]和[Freeze|冰冻]效果，将其化作冰风暴的燃料，以产生强化箭雨。

ShortDescription.en: Rain icy bolts over the target area.
ShortDescription.zh: 对目标区域落下冷冽箭雨。

Description.en: Infuses your melee weapon with electrical energies as you swing. In addition to converting some of your physical damage to lightning damage, the stored energy is released from the weapon as projectiles as you strike, flying out to hit farther-away enemies. The projectiles cannot miss if the melee attack hits a target.
Description.zh: 凝聚闪电之力，将近战武器的部分物理伤害转化为闪电伤害重击敌人。充盈的闪电之力在击中后会穿透并分裂成数道投射物，袭击更远处的敌人。若该近战攻击击中了目标，则后续的闪电投射物无法被躲避。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Infuses your melee weapon with electrical energies as you swing. In addition to converting some of your physical damage to lightning damage, the stored energy becomes an orb attached to the enemy you hit, or the ground if you don't hit an enemy. The orb will periodically fire projectiles at other nearby enemies for a duration, which will also damage the enemy the orb is attached to.
Description.zh: 凝聚闪电之力, 转换一部分的物理伤害为闪电伤害以重击目标. 闪电之力在击中敌人后会在其身旁形成电球，若未击中敌人则在地面生成电球。电球会持续向其他周围的敌人发射投射物，也会对附加电球的敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
Description.zh: 以暴风之力强化你的盾牌，使你格挡时对攻击你的敌人造成闪电伤害。

Description.en: Summons fiery elemental shields providing additional armour for a short duration. If cumulative physical damage prevented by your blocking or armour reaches a threshold, the shields explode outwards, dealing fire damage to surrounding enemies.
Description.zh: 召唤炽热的火焰之盾, 在一定时间内提供额外的护甲. 当格挡或是护甲所累积受到的物理伤害达到限界值时, 火焰之盾将会爆开, 并对周围的敌人造成伤害.

Description.en: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
Description.zh: 施加一个增益效果，增加护甲值，并在耗尽前替你承担部分伤害。当该增益效果时间结束或耗尽时，该技能将基于该增益效果承受的总伤害，把伤害反射给周围的敌人。与其它防卫技能共用冷却时间。

Description.en: Applies a buff that raises your armour, and takes some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Each second, the skill deals reflected damage to surrounding enemies based on the damage taken by the buff in that second. When the buff is removed, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken by the buff. You cannot have the buff at the same time as any other Guard skill.
Description.zh: 施加一个增益效果，提升护甲值，并在耗尽前替你承担部分伤害。该技能每秒都会向周围敌人反射伤害，其数值由反射时那一秒受到的伤害来决定。增益效果结束时，该技能会基于增益效果累计受到的总伤害对你周围的敌人反射伤害。你在具有其它防卫技能时不能获得该增益效果。

Description.en: Attempt to rip the lifeforce from an enemy. Enemies within [CullingStrike|Culling] range will be highlighted and instantly killed on [HitDamage|Hit], granting a [Charges|Power Charge]. Can only target Enemies in [CullingStrike|Culling] range.
Description.zh: 尝试吸取一名敌人的力量。标亮处于[CullingStrike|终结]区间内的敌人，在[HitDamage|击中]时立即将其击败，并获得一个[Charges|暴击球]。只能以[CullingStrike|终结]区间内的敌人为目标。

ShortDescription.en: Instantly kill a near-death enemy to gain a [Charges|Power Charge].
ShortDescription.zh: 立即击败濒死的敌人，并获得一个[Charges|暴击球]。

Description.en: Punctures enemies, causing a bleeding debuff, which will be affected by modifiers to skill duration. Puncture works with bows, daggers, claws or swords.
Description.zh: 洞穿敌人，施加一个流血减益效果。该效果受技能持续时间属性影响。流血的敌人在移动时会受到更多的伤害。限定弓类，匕首，爪类与剑类。

Description.en: Fire a charged arrow at the target. On hitting an enemy or wall, the arrow will fire [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] beams at nearby enemies.
Description.zh: 向目标射出一支箭矢。击中一个敌人或墙壁时，箭矢将对周围的敌人发射[Chain|连锁][Lightning|闪电]光束。

ShortDescription.en: Fires an arrow that creates beams between enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 射出箭矢，在敌人之间产生光束。

Description.en: Fires charged arrows, which repeatedly travel for a short time before changing direction. When they hit enemies, they are struck by a bolt of lightning which damages a number of surrounding enemies.
Description.zh: 射出带电的箭矢，箭矢会重复飞行一小段时间再改变方向。当箭矢击中敌人时，会生产一道闪电击中敌人，并伤害周围的多个敌人。

Description.en: Casts an aura that increases the movement speed, attack speed and cast speed of you and your allies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环, 使你与受光环影响友军获得额外的移动速度, 攻击速度以及施法速度.

Description.en: Casts an aura that grants elemental resistances and elemental ailment immunity to you and your allies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环, 为你和友军提供元素抗性，并免疫元素异常状态。

Description.en: Casts an aura that grants life regeneration to you and your allies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环，使你与受光环影响友军获得额外的生命回复.

Description.en: Emit an [Aura] that grants you and [Allies] in your [Presence] additional [Total] [EnergyShield|Energy Shield].
Description.zh: 释放一个[Aura|光环]，使你和[Presence|在场]的[Allies|友军]获得额外的[EnergyShield|能量护盾][Total|总值]。

Description.en: Casts an aura that grants accuracy and critical strike chance to you and your allies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环，使你与受光环影响友军获得命中和暴击率。

Description.en: Casts an aura that grants evasion to you and your allies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环，使你与受光环影响友军获得额外的闪避.

Description.en: Casts an aura that grants armour to you and your allies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环，使你与受光环影响友军获得额外的护甲.

Description.en: Casts an aura that adds fire damage to the attacks and spells of you and your allies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环，使你与受光环影响友军在攻击和施放法术时额外附带火焰伤害.

Description.en: Casts an aura that grants extra cold damage based on physical damage to you and your allies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环，使你与受光环影响友军获得额外冰霜伤害.

Description.en: Casts an aura that adds lightning damage to the attacks of you and your allies, and makes your spells deal more lightning damage.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环, 使你与受光环影响友军在攻击时额外附带闪电伤害, 并且造成更多法术闪电伤害.

Description.en: Fires a burning arrow that deals fire damage and has a chance to ignite.
Description.zh: 发射一枚燃烧箭矢造成火焰伤害，并有几率点燃敌人。

Description.en: Fires an arrow that explodes, dealing fire damage to its target and other nearby enemies, with an increased chance of igniting them.
Description.zh: 射出一发带有火焰能量的箭矢, 接触到敌人时会爆炸, 并对其与周围的敌人造成额外火焰伤害, 同时有较高的几率造成点燃.

Description.en: Casts an aura that grants mana regeneration to you and your allies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环，使你与受光环影响友军获得额外的魔力回复.

Description.en: Throws a trap that explodes when triggered, dealing fire damage to surrounding enemies and leaving an area of burning ground that damages enemies who walk through it.
Description.zh: 投掷一个陷阱，该陷阱被触发时会爆炸并对周围的敌人造成火焰伤害，且该区域的地面会持续燃烧，踩在上面的敌人会持续受到伤害。

Description.en: Throws a trap that explodes when triggered, dealing fire damage to surrounding enemies and leaving an area of burning ground that damages enemies who walk through it.
Description.zh: 投掷一个陷阱，该陷阱被触发时会爆炸并对周围的敌人造成火焰伤害，且该区域的地面会持续燃烧，踩在上面的敌人会持续受到伤害。

Description.en: Throws multiple traps that explode when triggered, dealing fire damage to surrounding enemies and leaving areas of burning ground that damages enemies who walk through them.
Description.zh: 投掷多个陷阱, 陷阱被触发时会爆炸并对周围的敌人造成火焰伤害, 且该区域的地面会持续燃烧, 踩在上面的敌人会持续受到伤害.

Description.en: Fire an arc of knives in front of the caster which deals physical damage.
Description.zh: 向前依弧形射出数支匕首，对敌人造成物理伤害。

Description.en: Fire an icy arrow that sprays a cone of ice shards when it hits a target.
Description.zh: 射出一支冰箭，击中目标后在锥形范围内射出冰屑。

ShortDescription.en: Fire an icy arrow that sprays ice shards on hit
ShortDescription.zh: 射出冰箭，击中时散射冰屑

Description.en: Fires an arrow that converts some physical damage to cold on its target and converts all physical damage to cold in a cone behind that target. When you use this skill, it summons a squad of Mirage Sharpshooters for a duration. Cannot be used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
Description.zh: 发射一支箭矢，将目标身上的部分物理伤害转化为冰霜伤害，并将目标身后锥形区域内的所有物理伤害转化为冰霜伤害。当你使用这个技能时，它会召唤一支持续一段时间幻影游侠小队。无法用于图腾、陷阱或地雷。

Description.en: Fire an icy projectile that bursts on impact or when reaching the targeted area, dealing area damage and creating a chilling area that deals cold damage over time. This area will creep across the ground towards nearby enemies until its duration expires.
Description.zh: 射出一个寒冰投射物, 在接触到敌人时会爆炸, 对该范围敌人造成伤害，使附近地面结冰并持续造成伤害.该区域会向周围的敌人蔓延，直到持续时间结束。

Description.en: [Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their [Fire] [Resistances|Resistance].
Description.zh: 在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下[Curse|诅咒]，降低其[Fire|火焰][Resistances|抗性]。

ShortDescription.en: Curse enemies to have lower [Fire] [Resistances|Resistance].
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人降下诅咒，降低[Fire|火焰][Resistances|抗性]。

Description.en: [Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their [Cold] [Resistances|Resistance].
Description.zh: 在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下[Curse|诅咒]，降低其[Cold|冰霜][Resistances|抗性]。

ShortDescription.en: Curse enemies to have lower [Cold] [Resistances|Resistance].
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人降下诅咒，降低[Cold|冰霜][Resistances|抗性]。

Description.en: [Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their [Lightning] [Resistances|Resistance].
Description.zh: 在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下[Curse|诅咒]，降低其[Lightning|闪电][Resistances|抗性]。

ShortDescription.en: Curse enemies to have lower [Lightning] [Resistances|Resistance].
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人降下诅咒，降低[Lightning|闪电][Resistances|抗性]。

Description.en: Fire a slow-moving [Projectile] that moves through enemies. The [Projectile] itself does not [HitDamage|Hit] enemies, but repeatedly discharges bolts of [Lightning] at nearby enemies. Consumes a [Fire] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to slow down over time, create [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground] as it travels, and explode dealing [Fire] damage in an Area after it dissipates.
Description.zh: 发射一个缓慢移动并可以穿过敌人的[Projectile|投射物]。[Projectile|投射物]本身无法[HitDamage|击中]敌人，但会向周围的敌人不断射出[Lightning|闪电]。若可能的话，消耗一个[Fire|火焰][ElementalInfusion|灌注]以减缓移动速度，移动时产生[IgnitedGround|燃烧地面]，消散后爆炸并对区域内造成[Fire|火焰]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a [Lightning] [Projectile] that zaps enemies as it moves and can be [ElementalInfusion|Infused] with [Fire] to create [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground] and explode.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射[Lightning|闪电][Projectile|投射物]，在移动时震击敌人，并且可用[Fire|火焰]进行[ElementalInfusion|灌注]，创造[IgnitedGround|点燃地面]并爆炸。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Continuously launches a torrent of fire from your hand, repeatedly damaging enemies. As you channel this spell longer, the flames spread wider close to you and spread longer directly in front of you. When you stop channelling you release a wave of fire damage over a wide and long area that will apply a powerful Ignite.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 持续从手中发出烈焰洪流，反复对敌人造成伤害。你吟唱此法术时间越长，烈焰在你近身的面积就越广，在你前方的波及范围就越长。当你停止吟唱，则对已波及的面积和范围内造成一股火焰伤害，并附加强大的点燃效果。

Description.en: Spin and attack in place, damaging nearby enemies and pulling others towards you. While using this skill, you cannot be stunned or knocked back. Cannot be supported by Ruthless.
Description.zh: 以自体为中心在原地进行旋转攻击，周围的敌人将会被拉向你并受到伤害。使用此技能时，无法被晕眩或被击退，无法被无情辅助。

Description.en: Channel this skill to move towards a targeted location while spinning. While channelling this skill, you cannot be knocked back.
Description.zh: 持续吟唱该技能，向指定地点旋转移动。持续吟唱该技能时，你无法被击退。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Attacks a small area in front of you. Each Reave that hits an enemy grants stages, which you will begin to lose after a short period without hitting anything. Only works with Daggers, Claws, and One-Handed Swords.
Description.zh: 攻击前方一小片区域。击中敌人的每道冲击波都会积累阶段，只要短期内没有击中任何目标就会失去阶段。 限定匕首，爪类，单手剑。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Repeatedly attacks a large area in different directions. Each Vaal Reave that hits an enemy grants stages, which you will begin to lose after a short period without hitting anything. Only works with Daggers, Claws, and One-Handed Swords.
Description.zh: 攻击不同方向的大片区域。击中敌人的每道瓦尔冲击波都会积累阶段，只要短期内没有击中任何目标就会失去阶段。 限定匕首，爪类，单手剑。

Description.en: Throws a mine that will teleport you to it when detonated. It covers both your escape and arrival with a cloud of smoke that blinds enemies, and gives you a temporary buff to movement speed. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
Description.zh: 投掷一个地雷，当它引爆时将你传送至该地雷所在处。当传送时，在原本位置与地雷所在位置的区块都会被充满烟雾，致盲其中的敌人，并给你一个提高移动速度的临时增益效果。和其它闪现技能共用冷却时间。

Description.en: Throws a spectral copy of your melee weapon. It flies out and then returns to you, in a spinning attack that damages enemies in its path.
Description.zh: 复制手中的近战武器，并将此灵体投掷出去。此灵体将会向外飞出并如同回力镖一般回到你的身边，对所有碰触到的敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: Throws a spectral copy of your melee weapon. It spirals out in a spinning attack that strikes enemies in its path.
Description.zh: 使用念能力复制一把手中的近战武器, 并将此灵体投掷出去. 此灵体将会以你为圆心螺旋状的飞行出去, 对所有碰触到的敌人造成伤害.

Description.en: Emit an [Aura] that boosts the [Resistances|Fire Resistance] of you and [Allies] in your [Presence].
Description.zh: 释放一个[Aura|光环]，提高你和[Presence|在场]的[Allies|友军]的[Resistances|火焰抗性]。

Description.en: Emit an [Aura] that boosts the [Resistances|Cold Resistance] of you and [Allies] in your [Presence].
Description.zh: 释放一个[Aura|光环]，提高你和[Presence|在场]的[Allies|友军]的[Resistances|冰霜抗性]。

Description.en: Emit an [Aura] that boosts the [Resistances|Lightning Resistance] of you and [Allies] in your [Presence].
Description.zh: 释放一个[Aura|光环]，提高你和[Presence|在场]的[Allies|友军]的[Resistances|闪电抗性]。

Description.en: Emit an [Aura] that boosts the [Resistances|Chaos Resistance] of you and [Allies] in your [Presence].
Description.zh: 释放一个[Aura|光环]，提高你和[Presence|在场]的[Allies|友军]的[Resistances|混沌抗性]。

Description.en: Sets a marker at a location. After a short duration, lightning strikes the marker, dealing damage around it. When this happens, it will also set off the lightning at any other markers you've cast.
Description.zh: 在目标区域设置一个标记. 经过一小段时间后, 闪电会攻击那个标记, 并对该标记周围的敌人造成伤害, 同时其他的标记也会陆续受到闪电攻击.

Description.en: Sets a marker at a location. After a short duration, lightning strikes the marker, dealing damage around it. When this happens, it will also set off the lightning at any other markers you've cast.
Description.zh: 在目标区域设置一个标记. 经过一小段时间后, 闪电会攻击那个标记, 并对该标记周围的敌人造成伤害, 同时其他的标记也会陆续受到闪电攻击.

Description.en: Sets a marker at a location. Lightning strikes random enemies around the marker repeatedly over the skill's duration, dealing damage in an area around the strike. Modifiers to the skill's duration will also affect the delay between these strikes. When the duration ends, a large bolt of lightning strikes the marker, dealing damage around it.
Description.zh: 在目标区域设置一个标记. 当标记存在时, 闪电将会随机攻击标记附近的敌人, 对其造成伤害. 该技能的持续时间也会影响闪电发射的间隔。经过一小段时间后, 强力的闪电会攻击那个标记, 并对该标记周围的敌人造成伤害, 同时其他的标记也会陆续受到闪电攻击.

Description.en: Channels to build up a large explosion. The longer you channel, the larger the area of effect and damage of the explosion. The explosion occurs after using another skill or after a short period without casting.
Description.zh: 可蓄力（持续施放）来施放大型的爆炸. 蓄力的时间越长, 爆炸的范围与造成的伤害越大. 当停止蓄力后一段时间或使用其他技能时便会触发爆炸.

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to build destructive energy around you. Releasing the energy causes a devastating explosion that is larger and more intense the longer you [Channelling|Channelled] for.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]，在你周围积蓄毁灭能量。释放能量会引发一次毁灭性爆炸，[Channelling|吟唱]时间越久范围越大、强度越高。

ShortDescription.en: [Channelling|Channel] to build up a devastating blast.
ShortDescription.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]，积蓄并引发毁灭轰击。

Description.en: Channel this skill to reserve more and more of your life, building up power in a marker on the ground under you. Release to deal physical damage in an area based on how much life you reserved. Cannot be cast by Totems.
Description.zh: 吟唱该技能会不断保留生命，为你身下的印记灌注力量。施放印记会根据保留的生命量造成物理伤害。不能被图腾施放。

Description.en: Targets an area and builds up stages in that area based on cast speed. It explodes every 3 stages, until it reaches a maximum of 15. As it gains more stages, the area gets smaller but the damage gets higher.
Description.zh: 指定一片区域，根据施法速度在其中叠加层数。每 3 层爆炸一次，最多叠满 15 层。层数叠加期间，范围会逐渐缩小，但伤害会逐渐提高。

Description.en: Targets an area and builds up a large explosion. The build-up speed is based on cast speed. The explosion occurs after it reaches 10 stacks.
Description.zh: 指定一块区域并蓄力（持续施放）来施放大型的爆炸. 蓄力的时间会受到施法速度影响. 当迭加到 10 层时将会爆炸.

Description.en: Targets an area and builds up a large explosion. The build-up speed is based on cast speed. The explosion occurs after it reaches 10 stacks.
Description.zh: 指定一块区域并蓄力（持续施放）来施放大型的爆炸. 蓄力的时间会受到施法速度影响. 当迭加到 10 层时将会爆炸.

Description.en: Creates markers at your location and a targeted location, which grow over time based on cast speed, then explode, dealing fire damage. Cannot be supported by Spell Cascade.
Description.zh: 同时在你所在位置和目标地点产生印记，它们根据施法速度生长，随后爆炸，造成火焰伤害，不能被多重范围施法辅助。

Description.en: After a short preparation time, you attack repeatedly with a ranged weapon. These attacks have a small randomised spread. Only works with Bows and Wands. This skill cannot be Triggered.
Description.zh: 在短暂的准备之后，你使用远程武器进行重复的攻击，这个攻击会稍微随机散射，限定弓与法杖。该技能无法被触发。

Description.en: Ready a volley of arrows or spears, [Empowered|Empowering] your next [Repeat|Repeatable] [Bow|Bow] or [Projectile] [Spear|Spear] [Attack|Attack] to [Repeat] multiple times. Consumes your [Charges|Frenzy Charges] on use to add additional repeats.
Description.zh: 准备好一排箭或战矛，[Empowered|强化]你的下一次[Repeat|可重复]的[Bow|弓箭]或[Spear|战矛][Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]，使其可以[Repeat|重复]多次。使用时消耗[Charges|狂怒球]可以增加重复次数。

ShortDescription.en: [Empowered|Empower] your next [Bow] or thrown [Spear] [Attack] to [Repeat|Repeat].
ShortDescription.zh: [Empowered|强化]你的下一个[Bow|弓类]或[Spear|战矛]投掷的[Attack|攻击]，使其能够[Repeat|重复]。

Description.en: Summons a short-lived flaming skull that rushes at nearby enemies and attacks them rapidly. Enemies will not directly engage these spirits, and can pass through them.
Description.zh: 召唤只能存在极短时间的燃焰骷髅，冲至敌人身边并快速的进行攻击。敌方生物将不会主动攻击狂灵, 并可以穿越它们。

Description.en: Summons a short-lived flaming skull that rushes at nearby enemies and attacks them rapidly. Enemies will not directly engage these spirits, and can pass through them.
Description.zh: 召唤只能存在极短时间的燃焰骷髅，冲至敌人身边并快速的进行攻击。敌方生物将不会主动攻击狂灵, 并可以穿越它们。

Description.en: Strikes enemies in front of you with a surge of flame. Burning enemies are dealt more damage. If you hit an ignited enemy, will create burning ground under them. Your damage modifiers don't apply to this burning ground.
Description.zh: 用汹涌的火焰打击前方的敌人。燃烧的敌人会受到更高伤害。如击中被点燃的敌人，则会在它身下产生燃烧地面。你的伤害词缀不能作用于燃烧地面。

Description.en: Desecrates the ground, summoning corpses and dealing chaos damage to all enemies in the area. The corpses will be chosen from the monsters in the current area and any Spectres that have existed in this instance.
Description.zh: 腐化一块地面, 召唤灵柩并对所有站在该地面上的敌人造成混沌伤害.

Description.en: Impale a Skeleton on a bone spike to shield your [Minion|Minions] while the spike remains, reducing the amount of damage taken from [HitDamage|Hits]. Taking a [HitDamage|Hit] that deals damage above a certain threshold will cause that [Minion|Minion's] shield to absorb all damage from that [HitDamage|Hit], then explode.  The bone spike is itself a [Minion], and shields itself. If it dies, shields on your other [Minion|Minions] disappear.
Description.zh: 将一个魔侍挂上尖刺，尖刺存在时为你的[Minion|召唤生物]施加护盾减少受到[HitDamage|击中]的伤害。受到一次伤害超过一定阈值的[HitDamage|击中]时，该[Minion|召唤生物]的护盾会吸收该[HitDamage|击中]的所有伤害并发生爆炸。尖刺为[Minion|召唤生物]，也会为自身施加护盾。一旦尖刺被击败，你的其他[Minion|召唤生物]的护盾也会消失。

ShortDescription.en: Sacrifice a Skeleton to shield your [Minion|Minions].
ShortDescription.zh: 牺牲一个魔侍，为[Minion|召唤生物]提供护盾。

Description.en: Icicles emerge from the ground in a series of small bursts, each damaging enemies caught in the area.
Description.zh: 从地面上不断的冒出冰结之刺, 宛如川流一般向前攻击并对敌人造成伤害.

Description.en: Lightning crackles in a series of small bursts, each damaging enemies caught in the area.
Description.zh: 放出一连串会爆裂的小雷球, 每个对撞上的敌人造成范围伤害.

Description.en: Infuses your melee weapon with molten energies to attack with physical and fire damage. This attack causes balls of molten magma to launch forth from the enemies you hit, divided amongst all enemies hit by the strike. These will deal area attack damage to enemies where they land.
Description.zh: 给武器灌注熔岩之力，对敌人造成物理及火焰伤害，并从击中的敌人身上发射出熔岩球，射向该攻击击中的所有敌人。这些熔岩球着地时对敌人造成范围伤害。

Description.en: Infuses your melee weapon with molten energies to attack with physical and fire damage. This attack causes balls of molten magma to launch forth causing area attack damage to enemies where they land.
Description.zh: 给武器灌注熔岩之力，对敌人造成物理及火焰伤害。此攻击会向前发射熔岩火球，着地时对敌人造成范围伤害。

Description.en: Fire a skyward shot that whips up a Tornado where it lands, dealing [Physical] damage over time and [Hinder|Hindering] enemies standing in it. Arrows, thrown [Spear|Spears] and [Crossbow] bolts fired at the Tornado are sucked into it, causing the Tornado to spit out a ring of copied [Projectile|Projectiles]. Copied [Projectile|Projectiles] cannot be copied again, even by further Tornados.
Description.zh: 朝空中射出一支箭矢，在落点扇起一阵龙卷风，持续造成[Physical|物理]伤害，并[Hinder|缓速]其中的敌人。射向龙卷风的箭矢、投掷的[Spear|战矛]和[Crossbow|战弩]的弩箭会被卷入其中，使龙卷风向外射出复制的环形[Projectile|投射物]。复制的[Projectile|投射物]无法再被复制，也无法被其他龙卷风复制。

ShortDescription.en: Create a Tornado that fires out copies of [Projectile|Projectiles].
ShortDescription.zh: 产生一阵龙卷风，发射[Projectile|投射物]的复制。

Description.en: While active, enemies you sufficiently [Overkill] with non-[Herald] [Attack|Attacks] will cause an explosion that [Ignite|Ignites] nearby enemies based on the [Overkill] damage dealt.
Description.zh: 激活时，受到你的非[Herald|捷技能][Attack|攻击]造成的足量[Overkill|溢出伤害]的敌人会产生爆炸，并根据造成的[Overkill|溢出]伤害[Ignite|点燃]周围的敌人。

Description.en: While active, [Shatter|Shattering] an enemy with a non-[Herald] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] will cause an icy explosion that deals [Attack|Attack] damage to surrounding enemies.
Description.zh: 激活时，非[Herald|捷技能][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]并[Shatter|击碎]一名敌人会产生冰霜爆炸，对周围的敌人造成[Attack|攻击]伤害。

Description.en: While active, killing [Shock|Shocked] enemies with a non-[Herald] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] will cause subsequent [Attack|Attack] [HitDamage|Hits] to release lightning bolts which deals [Attack|Attack] damage to all surrounding enemies.
Description.zh: 激活时，非[Herald|捷技能][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]并击败[Shock|感电]敌人会使后续的[Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]释放出闪电，对周围所有的敌人造成[Attack|攻击]伤害。

Description.en: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.
Description.zh: 获得一个增益效果，使你造成更多物理伤害。在该效果下击败敌人后，该技能会召唤一个【纯净哨兵】，如【纯净哨兵】已经达到上限，则刷新其中一个的持续时间和生命值。【纯净哨兵】会使用单人近战攻击和范围近战攻击。

Description.en: Create an area of [ConsecratedGround|Consecrated Ground] around you.
Description.zh: 在你的周围产生一片[ConsecratedGround|奉献地面]。

ShortDescription.en: Create [ConsecratedGround|Consecrated Ground] around you.
ShortDescription.zh: 在你的周围产生[ConsecratedGround|奉献地面]。

Description.en: Creates an area of Consecrated Ground, providing life regeneration and reducing the effect of curses for you and allies who stand in it.
Description.zh: 产生一片奉献地面，为你和友军提供生命再生效果，并降低你们身上的诅咒效果。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] While you channel this skill, it releases pulses of electrical energy, dealing lightning damage in a semicircular area in front of you.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 汇聚雷霆之力并从手中快速的释放多次闪电, 对你面前弧状区域内的所有敌人造成伤害.

Description.en: Generic monster mortar skill. Like Monster Projectile but has an impact effect.
Description.zh: 通用的怪物炮击技能. 与怪物投射物相似, 但带有冲击效果.

Description.en: Generic monster mortar skill. Like Monster Projectile but has an impact effect.
Description.zh: 通用的怪物炮击技能. 与怪物投射物相似, 但带有冲击效果.

Description.en: Fires a projectile from a Wand that causes a series of small explosions surrounding its point of impact, each damaging enemies caught in the area.
Description.zh: 从法杖中射出一个投射物, 在接触到物体或敌人时对周围连续爆破造成伤害.

Description.en: Summons a Chaos Golem that grants you Physical Damage Reduction. The Chaos Golem can use a damage over time Chaos aura and a cascade of Chaos spikes in addition to its melee attack.
Description.zh: 召唤混沌魔像, 启动时会使你获得物理伤害减伤. 混沌魔像会施放一个造成持续伤害的混沌灵气并在近战攻击附加额外的混沌之刺.

Description.en: Summons an Ice Golem that grants you increased Critical Strike Chance and Accuracy. The Ice Golem can use an icy barrage spell and a chilling spinning dash in addition to its melee attack.
Description.zh: 召唤寒冰魔像, 启动时会使你提高暴击和命中. 寒冰魔像会施放寒冰弹幕并在近战攻击时附加额外的冰旋斩.

Description.en: Summons a Flame Golem that grants you increased Damage. The Flame Golem can use a fire spray, a wave of fire damage, and an explosive arcing projectile.
Description.zh: 召唤烈焰魔像, 启动时会使你增加伤害. 烈焰魔像会使用火焰放射, 持续造成火焰伤害, 及射出会爆炸的弧状移动投射物.

Description.en: Slam the ground, damaging enemies in an area around the impact in three stages. Enemies take slightly less damage on the second and third stage.
Description.zh: 重击地面，对范围内的敌人造成三段冲击伤害。敌人受到的第二段和第三段伤害的伤害较低。

Description.en: Unleash a [Nova] of [Lightning] damage to [Electrocute] enemies. Enemies close to you take no damage while enemies at the edge of the ring take significantly more damage. Enemies [HitDamage|Hit] can be [Electrocute|Electrocuted] by all [Lightning] damage for a short duration.
Description.zh: 释放造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害的[Nova|新星]，对敌人造成[Electrocute|触电]。离你较近的敌人不会受到伤害，新星边缘的敌人会受到极高额外伤害。[HitDamage|命中]的敌人在短时间内受到任何[Lightning|闪电]伤害都会被施加[Electrocute|触电]。

ShortDescription.en: Unleash a [Nova] of [Lightning] damage to [Electrocute] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 释放造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害的[Nova|新星]，对敌人造成[Electrocute|触电]。

Description.en: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving a trail of burning ground in your wake. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
Description.zh: 传送到指定地点，对敌人造成伤害并在路线上造成燃烧。和其它闪现技能共用冷却时间。

Description.en: Attacks enemies with a powerful melee strike which grants Fortification, reducing damage you take from hits. The cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.
Description.zh: 对敌人发起奋力一击，同时获得降低击中伤害的护体状态。消耗耐力球可以规避其冷却时间。

Description.en: Attack enemies with increased range, releasing icy blades from the first enemy hit which fly at other enemies.
Description.zh: 增加攻击范围。从击中的第一个敌人处释放冰霜之刃射向其他敌人。

Description.en: Jump into the air, damaging enemies (and knocking back some) with your weapon where you land. Enemies you would land on are pushed out of the way.
Description.zh: 跃向空中，落地时用武器对敌人造成伤害，并击退部分敌人。被踩到的敌人将被推离。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and lob a ball of magma that deals area damage as it hits the ground. The skill [Chain|Chains], bouncing forward to deal damage multiple times. Impacts on [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures] or Volcanos will activate them as though they were [Slam|Slammed].
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]，并投掷岩浆球，触地时造成范围伤害。该技能可[Chain|连锁]弹射，向前方多次造成伤害。若击中[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]或火山，将激活这些区域并视同受到[Slam|猛击]。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and lob a bouncing ball of magma.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]，并投掷岩浆球。

Description.en: Lob a fiery orb that deals area damage as it hits the ground. The skill [Chain|Chains], bouncing forward to deal damage multiple times. The number of  [Chain|Chains] is refreshed when passing through a Flame Wall.
Description.zh: 投掷炽热法球，触地时造成范围伤害。该技能可[Chain|连锁]弹射，向前方多次造成伤害。法球穿过烈焰之墙时，[Chain|连锁]次数将重置刷新。

ShortDescription.en: Lob a bouncing ball of magma.
ShortDescription.zh: 投掷岩浆球。

Description.en: Curses all targets in an area, causing them to be debilitated when they hit enemies and increasing damage they take while on low life.
Description.zh: 诅咒一片区域的所有目标，使它们击中敌人会获得疲惫状态，并使它们在濒血时受到更多伤害。

Description.en: Immediately encases you in ice, protecting you for a duration or until you take damage from a number of hits, and also grants a buff once the cast time has finished. You cannot move or perform non-instant actions while in the ice. When the ice breaks, the buff is also removed.
Description.zh: 立即将你包裹在坚冰之中，它在一定时间内保护你，或者直到你受到一定次数的攻击，施法结束时会为你提供一项增益。被坚冰包裹时你无法移动或做出非瞬发的动作。当坚冰破裂时，此增益效果也会移除。

Description.en: Your melee weapon strikes enemies, converting physical damage to a random element. Then, depending on the element chosen, it releases a fiery explosion, an arcing bolt of lightning, or an icy wave. It will avoid choosing the same element twice in a row.
Description.zh: 使用近战武器打击敌人，将物理伤害转换为随机的元素伤害。根据转换成的元素释放出猛烈的爆炸、弧动的闪电箭或冰霜波。它不会连续两次选择相同的元素。

Description.en: Like monster mortar skill, but leaves a ground effect on impact.
Description.zh: 如同怪物迫击炮技能, 但是在地上留下冲击效果.

Description.en: Ethereal weapons rain from the sky, dealing damage to enemies in a sequence of volleys, each wider but less damaging than the last. Enemies can be hit multiple times where these overlap.
Description.zh: 召唤出从天空降下的虚空武器,随着刀雨的远离, 技能的涵盖范围也跟着提升. 敌人可被击中复数次.

Description.en: Create a pulsing [Orb] of frost. Each pulse inflicts [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Exposure|Exposure] on nearby enemies. When the [Orb]'s duration ends, it [DetonationTime|Detonates], dealing [Cold|Cold] damage to surrounding enemies and leaving behind a [Cold] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion].
Description.zh: 创造一个不断脉冲的冰霜[Orb|法球]，每次脉冲对周围的敌人造成[ElementalDamage|元素][Exposure|曝露]。[Orb|法球]的持续时间结束时[DetonationTime|引爆]，对周围的敌人造成[Cold|冰霜]伤害并留下一次[Cold|冰霜][ElementalInfusion|灌注]。

ShortDescription.en: Create an [Orb] that causes [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Exposure] before [DetonationTime|Detonating], leaving behind a [Cold] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion].
ShortDescription.zh: 产生一个[Orb|法球]，在[DetonationTime|引爆]前造成[ElementalDamage|元素][Exposure|曝露]，并留下一次[Cold|冰霜][ElementalInfusion|灌注]。

DisplayedName.zh: 召唤幻化之刃德尔维希

Description.en: Manifests a Dancing Dervish to fight by your side. While manifested, you have Onslaught and cannot use the original item. Cannot be supported by supports that would create other minions.
Description.zh: 召唤一把幻化之刃德尔维希为你而战。当它存在时，你获得猛攻状态，同时无法使用原始物品。无法被可以产生其它召唤生物的辅助宝石辅助。

DisplayedName.zh: 召唤幻化之刃德尔维希

Description.en: Manifests two Dancing Dervishes to fight by your side. While a Dancing Dervish is manifested, you have Onslaught and cannot use the original item. Cannot be supported by supports that would create other minions.
Description.zh: 召唤两把幻化之刃德尔维希为你而战。当它存在时，你获得猛攻状态，同时无法使用原始物品。无法被可以产生其它召唤生物的辅助宝石辅助。

Description.en: Create an [Orb|Orb] of electricity that fires [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] bolts at nearby enemies. The [Orb] leaves behind a [ElementalInfusion|Lightning Infusion] [Remnant] when it expires.
Description.zh: 创造一个电能[Orb|法球]，向周围的敌人射出[Chain|连锁][Lightning|闪电]箭。[Orb|法球]失效时留下一个[ElementalInfusion|闪电灌注][Remnant|残片]。

ShortDescription.en: Create an [Orb] that fires periodic [Lightning] bolts and drops a [ElementalInfusion|Lightning Infusion] on expiry.
ShortDescription.zh: 产生一个[Orb|法球]，定期发射[Lightning|闪电]箭，失效时留下一次[ElementalInfusion|闪电灌注]。

Description.en: Summons a Stone Golem that grants you life regeneration. In addition to its melee attack, the Stone Golem uses a rolling charge and a powerful slam that can taunt enemies.
Description.zh: 召唤一个为你提供额外生命回复的巨石魔像. 除了一般的近战攻击外, 巨石魔像会使用滚动冲撞, 还有沉重的冲击波来嘲讽附近的敌人.

Description.en: Smash the ground, dealing damage in an area and leaving behind [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] that slows enemies. The [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] erupts in a powerful [Aftershock] after a duration. Cannot create [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] on top of an existing patch, or if you already have the maximum number of active patches.
Description.zh: 猛击地面，对周围造成大量伤害，并留下[JaggedGround|崎岖之地]减速敌人。一段时间后，[JaggedGround|崎岖之地]会爆发出强烈的[Aftershock|余震]。无法在现有的[JaggedGround|崎岖之地]上，或在当前区域数量达到最大上限时产生新的区域。

ShortDescription.en: Smash the ground and create [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] that erupts shortly after.
ShortDescription.zh: 猛击地面，产生[JaggedGround|崎岖之地]，并在短时间后爆发。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Smashes the ground, dealing damage in an area and cracking the earth. The crack will erupt in a powerful aftershock after a short duration. After using this skill, your steps will deal damage around you, cracking the earth if the previous cracks have erupted. This effect ends after a secondary duration, or after a maximum number of aftershocks.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 猛击地面，对周围造成伤害，并在地面上留下裂隙。一段时间过后，地面的裂隙会爆发出强烈的余震。使用此技能后，你的脚步会对你周围的区域造成伤害，若之前的裂隙已经喷发，则会再次造成裂隙。该效果会在独立持续时间后结束，或在达到最大震波数量后结束。

Description.en: Afflict a single enemy with a [Debuff] that deals [Chaos|Chaos] damage over time. If the enemy dies while affected by Contagion, it spreads itself, [Curse|Curses], and other [Chaos|Chaos] damage over time [Debuff|Debuffs] on the target to nearby enemies. This refreshes their durations. Reanimating or detonating a corpse affected by Contagion will cause the [Minion] or explosion to spread Contagion on hit.
Description.zh: 对单个敌人施加一个[Debuff|减益状态]，持续造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。如果敌人在此期间被击败，此效果自身、[Curse|诅咒]以及目标身上持续造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害的[Debuff|减益状态]将扩散给周围的敌人，并刷新持续时间。复活或引爆受此效果影响的灵柩会使[Minion|召唤生物]或爆炸在击中时扩散效果。

ShortDescription.en: Afflict an enemy with a spreading [Chaos] damage over time [Debuff].
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人施加扩散的持续[Chaos|混沌]伤害[Debuff|减益状态]。

Description.en: Casts a debilitating effect on enemies in an area, Hindering their movement and applying a stacking Withered debuff that increases the Chaos Damage they take. This effect can stack up to 15 times.
Description.zh: 施放一个对敌人造成虚弱的范围效果, 造成缓速并且迭加一个使他们增加受到的混沌伤害之减益效果. 此减益效果可迭加 15 层.

Description.en: Channel a debilitating hex that [Withered|Withers] enemies in the area.
Description.zh: 吟唱一个使人虚弱的魔蛊，对区域内的敌人造成[Withered|死亡凋零]。

ShortDescription.en: Channel to [Withered|Wither] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 吟唱法术，对敌人施加[Withered|死亡凋零]。

Description.en: Fire a [Projectile|Projectile] that applies a powerful [Chaos|Chaos] damage over time debuff to enemies it hits.
Description.zh: 发射[Projectile|投射物]，击中时对敌人施加一个造成高额持续[Chaos|混沌]伤害的减益效果。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a [Projectile] that inflicts powerful [Chaos] damage over time on hit.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一个[Projectile|投射物]，击中时造成强力的持续[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Description.en: Slams the ground with a Mace, Sceptre, Axe or Staff, creating a wave of broken ground that damages enemies in an area in front of you. Enemies hit by the wave will release a circular shockwave, dealing damage to other enemies around them.
Description.zh: 用锤类、权杖、斧类或长杖重击地面，创造一道冲击波，对前方一片区域内的敌人造成伤害。被冲击波击中的敌人会释放出一道圆形震波，对其周围的敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: [Slam] the ground, creating a roiling fissure that damages enemies in a sequence of areas in front of you. A number of enemies hit by the wave will release a shockwave, damaging other enemies. Hitting an enemy with [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour] applies [SunderedArmour|Sundered Armour], making it take additional increased [Physical] damage.
Description.zh: [Slam|猛击]地面，产生一道激荡的裂隙冲击波，接连对前方一定范围内的敌人造成伤害。一定数量的敌人被冲击波击中后会向周围其它敌人施放伤害性震波。击中[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]的敌人会造成[SunderedArmour|护甲撕裂]，进一步提高造成的[Physical|物理]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: [Slam] the ground and send out a fissure in front of you, [SunderedArmour|Sundering] enemies with [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour].
ShortDescription.zh: [Slam|猛击]地面，在你前方迸射出裂缝，对[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]的敌人造成[SunderedArmour|护甲撕裂]。

Description.en: Fire a slow-moving [Pierce|Piercing] [Projectile|Projectile] that is effective at [Chill|Chilling] enemies and explodes on colliding with terrain.
Description.zh: 发射出一个缓慢移动的[Pierce|穿透][Projectile|投射物]，能够有效[Chill|冰缓]敌人，并在击中地形后爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a [Chill|Chilling] frozen sphere.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一个造成[Chill|冰缓]的冰冻球体。

Description.en: An icy blast explodes around the caster, dealing cold damage to enemies, and leaving behind a whirling vortex which deals cold damage over time and chills enemies caught in it. If the caster targets near their Frostbolt projectiles, it will explode from a number of those projectiles instead, destroying them.
Description.zh: 一个会在施法者周围爆炸的冰爆, 对敌人造成冰霜伤害, 并留下一个漩涡, 对于在其中的敌人继续造成持续冰霜伤害和冰缓. 若施法目标区域附近存在着寒冰弹, 冰爆则会出现在寒冰弹的位置.

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Apply a debuff to enemies in front of you which deals chaos damage over time. Enemies who aren't already debuffed by Blight are also hindered for a shorter secondary duration, slowing their movement. Continued channelling adds layers of damage to the debuff, each with their own duration.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 持续吟唱该技能会对前方锥形范围内的敌人造成一个可叠加的减益效果和持续混沌伤害. 当敌人刚被法术命中时会被短暂的减速. 每层可叠加的减益和伤害都有独自的持续时间.

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Apply a powerful debuff to enemies around you which deals chaos damage over time. Then applies two additional layers in a larger area, growing greatly in size each time. Enemies are also substantially hindered for a shorter secondary duration, slowing their movement.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 对你周围的敌人施加一个强力的减益效果，持续对其造成混沌伤害。随后在一片较大的区域内施加额外两层，每一次施加都会大幅扩大面积。被主要作用区域影响的敌人还会遭受短时间的减速效果。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Repeatedly hit enemies in a circle in front of you while channelling, dealing damage to and around the enemy. The damage is continually boosted while channelling. You unleash an additional hit for each stage reached once the channelling ends.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 持续吟唱时反复击中前方圆周范围内的敌人，对周围敌人造成伤害。伤害会随吟唱持续增加。吟唱结束时会根据吟唱的层数额外施放一次击中。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Channel to create an expanding circle area around you that blinds enemies within it. When you stop channelling, deals damage in a smaller area around each enemy in the circle.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 在周身引导并创造一个不断拓展的圆环区域，身处其中的敌人将被致盲。当你停止引导时，对圆环较小区域内的所有敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: Summons a Lightning Golem that grants you increased Attack and Cast speed. The Lightning Golem fires a projectile spell, creates orbs of Lightning that zap nearby enemies, and casts a temporary aura that grants added Lightning Damage to spells and attacks used by the Golem and its nearby allies.
Description.zh: 召唤一个闪电魔像，提高你的攻击和施法速度。 闪电魔像发射投射物法术，制造闪电球击中附近的敌人，并施放临时光环，为魔像及其周围友军使用的法术和攻击增加闪电伤害。

Description.en: Slashes twice, releasing waves of force that damage enemies they hit. Enemies in the middle of the slashes can be hit by both. The slashes will have a chance to inflict bleeding in Blood Stance, or have a wider angle in Sand Stance, Can be used with Axes and Swords. You are in Blood Stance by default.
Description.zh: 挥斩两次，击中敌人会释放出给敌人造成伤害的冲击波。在挥斩中间的敌人会被击中两次。挥斩在血姿态下有一定几率施加流血效果，在沙姿态下拥有更宽的角度。限定斧类和剑类。默认为血姿态。

Description.en: Sacrifice the life of a [Minion] to deal [Chaos] damage in an area around it. If you have no [Minion|Minions], your own life is sacrificed instead.
Description.zh: 牺牲一个[Minion|召唤生物]的生命，对其周围区域造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。如果你没有[Minion|召唤生物]，可用自己的生命作为代替牺牲。

ShortDescription.en: Deal [Chaos] damage to nearby enemies at the cost of you or your [Minion|Minion's] life.
ShortDescription.zh: 牺牲你或[Minion|召唤生物]的生命，对附近敌人造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Description.en: Sacrifice some of a damageable [Minion|Minion's] life to deal [Physical] damage in an area around it.
Description.zh: 牺牲一部分可受伤[Minion|召唤生物的]生命，在其附近范围内造成[Physical|物理]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Sacrifice a [Minion|Minion's] life to deal [Physical] damage around it.
ShortDescription.zh: 牺牲一个[Minion|召唤生物的]生命，在其附近造成[Physical|物理]伤害。

Description.en: Unleash a beam of fire that burns enemies it touches. Remaining in the beam intensifies the burning, adding a portion of the beam's damage in stages. Inflicts Fire Exposure at maximum stages. Enemies who leave the beam continue to burn for a duration. Increasing cast speed also increases the rate at which the beam can turn.
Description.zh: 发出一束灼热光线, 被击中的敌人会受到不断叠加的燃烧效果.每叠加一层效果都会附加一定比例的光线基础伤害。叠满之后会造成负面效果“火焰曝露”。脱离光线范围后的一段时间内依然会受到燃烧伤害. 增加施法速度和光线的转角速度.

Description.en: An ethereal blade spins around you for a duration, repeatedly damaging enemies that it passes through.
Description.zh: 在你的四周召唤出虚空的武器, 以你为中心不断飞舞旋转, 反复对敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: A bolt of lightning strikes an area, dealing lightning damage.
Description.zh: 使用雷击攻击一个区域, 造成闪电伤害.

Description.en: Raise two spectral spiders from each nearby corpse that will attack your enemies with Viper Strike. Each raised spider grants you increased Attack Speed and increased Damage with Poison. Enemies will not engage the spiders directly, and they are immune to damage.
Description.zh: 周遭每具灵柩召唤两只幽魂巨蛛, 他们将扑向你的敌人. 敌人将不会主动攻击你的蜘蛛.

Description.en: Activate to summon [Reviving] Skeletal Warriors.
Description.zh: 激活以召唤[Reviving|可复活的]魔侍武士。

Description.en: Activate to summon aggressive, [Reviving] Skeletal Reavers that can enrage on [Command]. Skeletal Reavers do more [Attack] Damage and gain increased [Attack] speed based on their [Rage]
Description.zh: 激活以召唤多个攻击性强且[Reviving|可复活的]魔侍掠夺者，受到[Command|命令]时可以进入狂暴状态。魔侍掠夺者会根据自身[Rage|怒火]值造成更多[Attack|攻击]伤害并获得[Attack|攻击]速度提升。

Description.en: Activate to summon hard-hitting, [Reviving] Skeletal Brutes that can [Stun] [PrimedStun|Primed] enemies and [Warcry] on [Command]. This [Warcry] [Intimidate|Intimidates] nearby enemies and [Consume|Consumes] [Freeze] on enemies and allies to deal damage in an Area around them.
Description.zh: 激活以召唤多个攻击势大力沉且[Reviving|可复活的]魔侍蛮兵，可以[Stun|晕眩][PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的敌人，受到[Command|命令]时可以发出[Warcry|战吼]。此[Warcry|战吼]会[Intimidate|威吓]附近敌人并[Consume|消耗]敌人和友军身上的[Freeze|冻结]，在其周围区域造成伤害。

Description.en: Activate to summon long-ranged, [Reviving] Skeletal Snipers that can fire a gas arrow on [Command].
Description.zh: 激活以召唤多个远程攻击且[Reviving|可复活的]魔侍神射手，受到[Command|命令]时可以射出瓦斯之箭。

DisplayedName.zh: 魔侍冰霜法师召唤生物

Description.en: Activate to summon [Reviving] Skeletal Frost Mages that can envelop your [Minion|Minions] in an icy shield on [Command].
Description.zh: 激活以召唤多个[Reviving|可复活的]魔侍冰霜法师，受到[Command|命令]时可以用冰霜护盾包裹你的[Minion|召唤生物]。

DisplayedName.zh: 魔侍风暴法师召唤生物

Description.en: Activate to summon [Reviving] Skeletal Storm Mages that can call down a lightning strike on dead Skeletons on [Command].
Description.zh: 激活以召唤多个[Reviving|可复活的]魔侍风暴法师，受到[Command|命令]时可以在陨落的魔侍处降下闪电打击。

Description.en: Activate to summon bomb-throwing, [Reviving] Skeletal Arsonists that can detonate other [Minion|Minions] on [Command].
Description.zh: 激活以召唤多个投掷炸弹且[Reviving|可复活的]魔侍焚焰使，受到[Command|命令]时可以引爆其他[Minion|召唤生物]。

Description.en: Activate to summon [Reviving] Skeletal Clerics that heal other minions and revive fallen Skeletons.
Description.zh: 激活以召唤多个[Reviving|可复活的]魔侍祭司，可以治疗其他召唤生物并复活陨落的魔侍。

Description.en: Summons an ancient [Reviving] Azmerian Wolf that can howl, calling to spirits convening an Eternal Hunt on [Command]. It [Maim|Maims] when attacking foes, and can lunge to bite and inflict [Bleeding], or howl to inspire nearby allies.
Description.zh: 召唤一只会复活的远古阿兹莫里巨狼。巨狼会嚎叫，听从[Command|命令]召唤万灵发起永恒狩猎。攻击时使敌人[Maim|瘫痪]，并能跃起撕咬造成[Bleeding|流血]，或嚎叫激励附近的盟友。

Description.en: Summons a mysterious undamageable Mist Raven that can be [Command|Commanded] to dive at target location, crashing through an otherworldly mirror and damaging enemies in an area. The raven grants you a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] for each enemy it [CullingStrike|Culls].
Description.zh: 召唤一只神秘的、无法被伤害的雾鸦。可[Command|命令]它向目标位置俯冲，撞破异界之镜，对一片区域内的敌人造成伤害。雾鸦每[CullingStrike|终结]一名敌人，便会赋予你一个[Charges|狂怒球]。

Description.en: A flock of mist ravens circle you, dealing damage over time in an area. Their numbers are bolstered by slain foes, or in the [Presence] of dangerous enemies, but the flock as a whole is considered a single minion. You can [Command] some of them to take flight, leaving the flock to assail your enemies.
Description.zh: 一群雾鸦萦绕在你身周，对范围内敌人造成持续伤害。其数量会随击杀敌人或因强敌的[Presence|存在]而壮大，但整个鸦群被视为一个召唤生物。你可以[Command|命令]其中一部分脱离鸦群，飞袭你的敌人。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Channel to project an illusion which you steer. You gain stages while it moves, until it stops at a maximum total distance. Waves of area damage frequently pulse along its path, based on your attack speed. Stop channelling to teleport to the illusion, dealing a final wave of damage.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 向你朝向的方向吟唱并发射一个幻象。幻象移动时你获得层数，直至其移动到最大距离为止。幻象行进的路径上会根据你的攻击速度来频繁爆发范围伤害。停止吟唱后可将自己传送至幻象处，并以一波伤害作为技能收尾。

Description.en: Covers the target in [CorruptedBlood|Corrupted Blood] which damages them.
Description.zh: 用[CorruptedBlood|腐化之血]覆盖目标，对其造成伤害。

Description.en: Covers the target in large quantities of [CorruptedBlood|Corrupted Blood] which severly damages them.
Description.zh: 用大量[CorruptedBlood|腐化之血]覆盖目标，造成大量伤害。

Description.en: Inflicts Decay on the target, dealing [Chaos] Damage over time.
Description.zh: 使目标感染朽坏，造成持续的[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Description.en: Consume a [Corpse] to create a volatile core that seeks out enemies and [Ignite|Ignites] enemies near it. The core explodes at the end of its duration.
Description.zh: 消耗一个[Corpse|灵柩]，产生一个可以搜寻敌人并[Ignite|点燃]附近敌人的无常之核。核心在持续时间结束时爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Consume a [Corpse] to create a volatile core that seeks out enemies, [Ignite|Ignites] them, and explodes.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗一个[Corpse|灵柩]，产生一个可以搜寻敌人、[Ignite|点燃]并爆炸的无常之核。

Description.en: A corpse near the targeted location explodes, dealing damage in a small area and creating an orb which moves towards nearby enemies before dealing spell damage in a larger area. The explosion of the corpse is not affected by modifiers to spell damage, and cannot be reflected.
Description.zh: 目标附近的灵柩爆炸造成小范围伤害，并召唤一个自动追踪敌人的火球，可以造成较大范围的法术伤害。灵柩爆炸造成的伤害无法被法术伤害词缀加成，并且无法被反射。

Description.en: A targeted corpse explodes, dealing area damage and turning into a volcanic geyser, which will repeatedly unleash exploding projectiles sequentially over the surrounding area for a duration. The explosion of the corpse is not affected by modifiers to spell damage, and cannot be reflected.
Description.zh: 使目标灵柩爆炸，造成范围伤害并转化为一座喷射的火山。它将在一段时间内持续向周围放出爆炸投射物。灵柩的爆炸无法被法术伤害词缀加成，并且无法被重复施法。

Description.en: Slam the ground, unleashing a fiery fissure in front of you, dealing area damage and randomly releasing a number of smaller fissures branching off from it. Consume an Endurance Charge every third time you slam the ground with this skill.
Description.zh: 猛击地面，在前方制造一道灼热的裂缝，造成范围伤害，并随机分出一些更小的裂缝。用该技能每三次猛击地面都会消耗一个耐力球。

Description.en: [Curse] all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their [Chaos|Chaos] [Resistances|Resistance].
Description.zh: 在短暂的延迟后对一片区域内的所有目标降下[Curse|诅咒]，降低其[Chaos|混沌][Resistances|抗性]。

ShortDescription.en: Curse enemies to have lower [Chaos] [Resistances|Resistance].
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人降下诅咒，降低[Chaos|混沌][Resistances|抗性]。

Description.en: Creates a Petrification Statue in front of you, which will slow enemies with its gaze, until they become fully petrified.
Description.zh: 在你的面前召唤一个石化雕像，被它凝视的的敌人将会减速，持续凝视直到石化为止。

Description.en: Creates an Eternity Sphere at your location, which reduces the Action Speed of enemies within it. The amount of Action Speed reduction applied by the sphere decreases to zero over its duration.
Description.zh: 在脚下创造一个永恒之球，使置于其中的敌人行动速度降低。行动速度降低的量级会在永恒之球的持续时间内逐渐减少至零。

Description.en: Launches an unpredictable, piercing twister projectile that moves randomly for a duration, repeatedly dealing damage to enemies it intersects.
Description.zh: 发出一道无法预测的旋风，它会随机移动一段时间，并反复对接触的敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: Throws a trap which, once triggered, repeatedly releases a number of waves for a duration. Each wave deals damage in a series of small bursts in a line, ending with a larger burst. Modifiers to trap throwing speed affects how frequently it releases waves.
Description.zh: 投掷陷阱，触发后会在一定时间内持续发射冲击波。每股冲击波都会在其行进线路上产生连续的小冲击，最后以一次大冲击结束。你的施法速度会影响释放冲击波的频率。

Description.en: Slams the ground at a targeted location. If an enemy is near where you target, you'll teleport to it from a short distance away, slam, and create an area of consecrated ground.
Description.zh: 重击目标地点。若目标周围有敌人，你可以短距离传送到它旁边，用一道猛击创造一片奉献地面。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Performs a melee attack, and causes lightning to strike a targeted location or nearby enemy, dealing damage in an area. Each target can only be hit once by this skill. Hitting an enemy grants an aura, giving you and your allies additional lightning damage for a duration.
Description.zh: 发动一次近战攻击，用闪电攻击目标区域或周围的敌人，造成范围伤害。每个目标只能被该技能击中一次。击中敌人时使你获得光环，为你和友军附加额外闪电伤害并持续一段时间。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Calls lightning down to infuse your weapon, then performs a melee attack and causes lightning to strike nearby enemies, dealing damage in an area around each. Hitting an enemy grants an aura, giving you and your allies additional lightning damage for a duration, and additional lightning bolts with Smite.
Description.zh: 召唤雷霆灌注武器，然后发动一次近战攻击并用闪电攻击周围的敌人，对每个敌人周围的区域造成伤害。击中敌人后会产生一个光环，在一定时间内使你和友军造成额外的闪电伤害，并且惩击还会有额外的闪电箭。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Channel to infuse an arrow with chaos, gaining stages while it is held. Release to fire it, leaving spore pods in its wake. Each spore pod blooms, firing thorn arrows, which travel for a short time before dissipating. Modifiers that cause additional projectiles to be fired will only apply to the initial arrows, and the spore pods will be split between those arrows.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 通过吟唱给一支箭矢灌注混沌能量，可以蓄力积累阶数。将其发射后，飞行轨迹上会投下孢囊。每个孢囊都会绽放，喷射荆棘之箭，飞行一小段时间后消失。产生额外投射物的词缀只可以影响最初的箭矢数量，产生的孢囊会由它们分担。

Description.en: Fire arrows into the air that rain down around the targeted area, dealing damage to enemies they hit and creating spore pods where they land. Each spore pod deals chaos damage over time to nearby enemies and slows their movement speed. The pods last for a duration before bursting, dealing area damage.
Description.zh: 向天空射出一串箭矢，并洒向目标区域，对击中的敌人造成伤害，并在落地后创造孢囊。每个孢囊会对周围的敌人持续造成混沌伤害，并减低他们的移动速度。短时间后，孢囊会爆炸，造成范围伤害。

Description.en: Fire arrows into the air that rain down around the targeted area, dealing damage to enemies they hit and creating spore pods where they land. Each spore pod deals chaos damage over time to nearby enemies and slows their movement speed. The pods last for a duration before bursting, dealing area damage.
Description.zh: 向天空发射箭矢，化作箭雨落向目标区域，击中敌人造成伤害，并在落地时产生孢囊。每个孢囊都会对周围的敌人造成持续混沌伤害，并减慢它们的移动速度。孢囊持续一段时间后爆炸，造成范围伤害。

Description.en: Summon a Holy Relic that stays near you. When you hit an enemy with an attack, the Holy Relic triggers a nova spell, with a very short cooldown, that deals physical damage to enemies and grants life regeneration to allies. This life regeneration is higher when applied to minions.
Description.zh: 召唤一个停留在你身旁的圣物。当你使用攻击击中敌人，圣物会触发一个新星法术，对敌人造成物理伤害并为友方回复生命。圣物的新星法术冷却时间非常短。

DisplayedName.en: Summon an image of Beidat, Archangel of Death
DisplayedName.zh: 召唤死亡天使贝达特的影像

Description.en: Summon an image of Beidat, Archangel of Death. This is a non-combat entity.
Description.zh: 召唤死亡天使贝达特的影像。这是一个非战斗实体。

ShortDescription.en: Summon an image of Beidat, Archangel of Death. This is a non-combat entity.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤死亡天使贝达特的影像。这是一个非战斗实体。

Description.en: Summon a Pale Angel. This is a non-combat entity.
Description.zh: 召唤一个苍白神侍。这是一个非战斗实体。

ShortDescription.en: Summon a Pale Angel. This is a non-combat entity.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一个苍白神侍。这是一个非战斗实体。

Description.en: Summon a Pale Cherubim. This is a non-combat entity.
Description.zh: 召唤一个苍白圣侍。这是一个非战斗实体。

ShortDescription.en: Summon a Pale Cherubim. This is a non-combat entity.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一个苍白圣侍。这是一个非战斗实体。

Description.en: Summon a Pale Servitor. This is a non-combat entity.
Description.zh: 召唤一个苍白圣使。这是一个非战斗实体。

ShortDescription.en: Summon a Pale Servitor. This is a non-combat entity.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一个苍白圣使。这是一个非战斗实体。

DisplayedName.en: Summon an image of K'tash, the Hate Shepherd
DisplayedName.zh: 召唤憎恨牧者科塔席的影像

Description.en: Summon an illusion of K'tash, the Hate Shepherd. This is a non-combat entity.
Description.zh: 召唤憎恨牧者科塔席的影像。这是一个非战斗实体。

ShortDescription.en: Summon an illusion of K'tash, the Hate Shepherd. This is a non-combat entity.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤憎恨牧者科塔席的影像。这是一个非战斗实体。

Description.en: Summon a Demon Harpy. This is a non-combat entity.
Description.zh: 召唤一个鸟魔。这是一个非战斗实体。

ShortDescription.en: Summon a Demon Harpy. This is a non-combat entity.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一个鸟魔。这是一个非战斗实体。

Description.en: Summon a Demon Imp. This is a non-combat entity.
Description.zh: 召唤一个劣魔。这是一个非战斗实体。

ShortDescription.en: Summon a Demon Imp. This is a non-combat entity.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一个劣魔。这是一个非战斗实体。

Description.en: Summon a Demon Beast. This is a non-combat entity.
Description.zh: 召唤一个兽魔。这是一个非战斗实体。

ShortDescription.en: Summon a Demon Beast. This is a non-combat entity.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一个兽魔。这是一个非战斗实体。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, firing beams which deal damage to nearby enemies and those around them. The brand will detach if the enemy dies.
Description.zh: 创造一个可以附着于周围某个敌人的魔法烙印。该烙印附着后会阶段性激活，发射光束，对周围和围绕他们的敌人造成伤害。敌人被击败后烙印消失。

Description.en: [Consume] [Corpse|Corpses] near you to recover Life and Mana over a short time per [Corpse] [Consume|Consumed].
Description.zh: [Consume|消耗]你附近的[Corpse|灵柩]，在短时间内再生生命和魔力，每[Consume|消耗]一个[Corpse|灵柩]都有效果。

ShortDescription.en: [Consume] nearby [Corpse|Corpses] to recover Life and Mana.
ShortDescription.zh: [Consume|消耗]附近的[Corpse|灵柩]以再生生命和魔力。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, causing a fiery meteor to fall from the sky. The brand will detach if the enemy dies.
Description.zh: 创造一个可以附着于周围某个敌人的魔法烙印。该烙印附着后会阶段性激活，召唤从天而降的流星。敌人被击败后烙印消失。

Description.en: Fire a [Pierce|Piercing] [Projectile] that seeks out enemies. Enemies hit are inflicted with a [Debuff] that [Hinder|Hinders] them and deals [Chaos] damage over time for a short duration.
Description.zh: 发射一个可索敌的[Pierce|穿透][Projectile|投射物]。对击中的敌人造成[Hinder|缓速]的[Debuff|减益]效果，并在短时间内持续造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a [Projectile] that inflicts [Chaos] damage over time as it passes enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一个[Projectile|投射物]，穿过敌人时造成持续[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Description.en: Applies a debuff to enemies in an area, which deals chaos damage over Time. Linked hex curses are also applied to those enemies. The debuff deals more damage and lasts longer for each hex applied this way.  This skill cannot be used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
Description.zh: 对一片区域里的敌人施加减益效果，造成持续混沌伤害，并把连接的魔蛊技能施加给它们。通过这种方式每施加一种魔蛊，就能使该减益效果的伤害更高，持续越久。该技能不能用于图腾、陷阱和地雷。

Description.en: An expanding wave of energy surges forward, damaging enemies in a cone-shaped area over a duration. Each enemy hit is inflicted with Exposure matching the element of which they took the highest damage. Only one Wave of Conviction can be active at a time
Description.zh: 一股逐渐拓展的能量波向前涌动，在一段时间内对锥形范围内的敌人造成伤害。被击中的每个敌人会根据受到的最高伤害的类型，遭受一个该元素的曝露负面效果。一次只能激活一个定罪波。

Description.en: Casts an aura that grants bonuses to damage and critical strike chance of spells to you and your allies, and gives a chance to create Consecrated Ground against stronger enemies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环, 使你与受光环影响的友军获得伤害和法术暴击率加成，并在面对强大敌人时有几率创造奉献地面。

Description.en: Casts an aura that multiplies damage over time and increases skill effect duration of you and your allies.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环，使你与受光环影响友军造成的持续伤害叠加，技能效果延长。

Description.en: Applies a buff which can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
Description.zh: 施加一个增益效果，在其耗尽之前替你承受部分伤害。和其它防卫技能共用冷却时间。

Description.en: Performs a series of quick teleports towards a targeted location. If using the "Attack in Place" option, the direction is reversed. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
Description.zh: 朝目标方向发起一连串快速传送。如果使用“原地攻击”，会朝反方向传送。和其它闪现技能共用冷却时间。

Description.en: Perform a spinning attack, damaging enemies around you and creating a bladestorm matching your stance. The bladestorm repeatedly damages enemies, based on your weapon damage and attack time, for a duration. Blood bladestorms are stationary and cause Bleeding, while Sand bladestorms move slowly forwards and Blind enemies. You are in Blood Stance by default.
Description.zh: 发动一次旋转攻击，对你周围的敌人造成伤害，并根据你的姿态创造剑刃风暴，根据你的武器伤害和攻击速度对敌人反复造成伤害，并持续一段时间。血姿态下的剑刃风暴静止不动，并造成流血状态。沙姿态下的剑刃风暴会缓慢向前移动，并将敌人致盲。默认为血姿态。
