Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Casts a buff that grants different bonuses to melee skills depending on your stance. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
Description.zh: 施放一个增益效果，基于不同的姿态给近战技能施加不同的加成。再次使用该技能会在血姿态和沙姿态之间切换。

Description.en: Smash the ground to bring forth multiple spears to damage enemies. When in Blood Stance, multiple spikes burst from the ground in sequence, able to hit enemies multiple times. In Sand Stance, the spikes are thrust outwards. You are in Blood Stance by default.
Description.zh: 重击地面，产生前进的多重尖刺伤害敌人。在血姿态下，地面上的多重尖刺会依次爆发，多次击中敌人。在沙姿态下，尖刺会朝外推进。默认为血姿态。

Description.en: When used at range, throws out a chain, pulling you to the enemy hit dealing damage in an area behind them. When close to the enemy, just causes the area damage directly.
Description.zh: 远程使用时，会投掷一条锁链，将你拉向被击中的敌人，并对它们身后一片区域内造成伤害。如果贴近敌人使用，则只会直接造成范围伤害。

Description.en: Deals attack damage in an area.
Description.zh: 对一片区域造成攻击伤害。

Description.en: Deals attack damage in an area.
Description.zh: 对一片区域造成攻击伤害。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Casts an aura that affects you and nearby enemies differently depending on your stance. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环，影响你和周围的敌人，它的效果取决于你的姿态。再次使用该技能会在血姿态和沙姿态之间切换。

Description.en: Casts an aura that causes nearby enemies to take more physical damage.
Description.zh: 施放一个光环，使你周围的敌人受到的物理伤害提高。

Description.en: Summons a Carrion Golem that grants added physical damage for your non-golem minions. The Carrion Golem attacks with a series of slashes that increase in speed and damage, as well as a cascade of bone spikes, and deals more damage for each of your non-golem minions near it.
Description.zh: 召唤一个腐化魔像，给非魔像召唤生物附加物理伤害。这种魔像可以挥出伤害递增，速度越来越快的破空斩，还可以发出突刺。并使它附近每个非魔像召唤生物造成更多伤害。

Description.en: Grants Elusive and a buff that grants Phasing. While you have this buff, monsters that enter an area around you will be Withered. Using a skill or losing the Elusive buff ends this skill's effects. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills. Cannot be used while already Elusive.
Description.zh: 获得灵巧和给予迷踪效果的增益效果。当你具有该增益效果时，你周围一定范围内的怪物会受到死亡凋零影响。使用技能或灵巧耗尽会终止该技能的效果。和其它闪现技能共用冷却时间。已有灵巧时无法使用。

Description.en: Throws a mine that deals damage in an area when detonated, then launches fiery projectiles that rain down around it, each exploding to deal damage in a smaller area.
Description.zh: 投掷一个地雷，引爆时对一片区域造成伤害，然后发射一束燃烧的投射物，在其周围降下火雨，每一次爆炸都对一小片区域造成伤害。

Description.en: Throws a mine that deals damage in an area when detonated.
Description.zh: 投掷一个地雷，引爆时对一片区域造成伤害。

Description.en: Throws a mine that fires projectiles around it when detonated. These projectiles quickly dissipate as they travel, before disappearing
Description.zh: 投掷一个地雷，引爆时向周围发射投射物，在飞行途中快速消散，并很快消失。

Description.en: Performs a series of quick teleports towards a targeted location. If using the "Attack in Place" option, the direction is reversed. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
Description.zh: 朝目标方向发起一连串快速传送。如果使用“原地攻击”，会朝反方向传送。和其它闪现技能共用冷却时间。

Description.en: Fires a returning projectile that can be caught. Caught projectiles spiral outwards when you use Whirling Blades and do not return.
Description.zh: 发射一个可以抓回的投射物。当你使用回旋之刃时，抓回的投射物向外盘旋飞出，并不再返回。

Description.en: Creates already-caught projectiles without firing them first, both immediately and over a secondary duration. Caught projectiles spiral outwards when you use Whirling Blades and do not return.
Description.zh: 创造已经抓回的投射物，但先不把它们发射出去，并且都有即时和附加的持续时间。当你使用回旋之刃时，抓回的投射物向外盘旋飞出，并不再返回。

Description.en: Fires an arrow that remains in the ground behind its final target, tethering that enemy to it. Ensnared enemies always count as moving, and have less movement speed while trying to break the snare. The snare will break if they leave the area of effect.
Description.zh: 射出一支箭矢，在击中最后的目标后留在地面，将其拘束在其中。被诱捕的敌人始终视为在移动，并以更缓慢的速度试图突破圈套。一旦被捕猎的敌人离开效果区域，该圈套就被破坏。

Description.en: Deploy a [Ballista] [Totem] that fires bolts skyward, to explode a short time after landing.
Description.zh: 部署一个[Ballista|弩炮][Totem|图腾]，向空中发射弩箭，落地一小段时间后爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Deploy a [Ballista] that fires arcing explosive shots.
ShortDescription.zh: 部署一个[Ballista|弩炮]，发射弧形爆炸弹。

Description.en: Spends a portion of your mana to grant a buff that takes some of the damage from hits for you until depleted. The buff grants added lightning damage based on the amount of mana spent by this skill. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
Description.zh: 消耗部分魔力，获得一个增益效果，在耗尽前承受部分击中伤害。该增益根据该技能消耗的魔力数量获得额外闪电伤害。和其它防卫技能共用冷却时间。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to charge up your bow before releasing a powerful shot. Releasing with [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing] causes the arrow to explode on impact and [Consume] [Freeze] on directly [HitDamage|Hitting]. [Consume|Consuming] [Freeze] enhances the explosion.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]给弓箭充能后射出强力一击。在[PerfectTiming|完美时机]施放可以使箭矢在击中时爆炸，直接[HitDamage|击中]时[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]。[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]可增强爆炸效果。

ShortDescription.en: Charge up a powerful shot that enhances its damage if it [Consume|Consumes] [Freeze] with [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing].
ShortDescription.zh: 充能后射出强力一击，在[PerfectTiming|完美时机]下[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]可提升伤害效果。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, triggering linked spells. The brand will detach if the enemy dies.
Description.zh: 创造一道魔法烙印，附着在周围一个敌人身上。附着后会周期性激活，触发链接的法术。附着烙印的敌人被击败后烙印才会解除。

Description.en: Perform a [Warcry], [Empowered|Empowering] subsequent [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] if there are enemies nearby. Enemies in the warcry's area are destabilised and will Combust on death. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an [Charges|Endurance Charge].
Description.zh: 发出一声[Warcry|战吼]，如果附近有敌人则[Empowered|强化]后续[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]。瓦解战吼范围内的敌人，令其被击败时触发燃尽。消耗一个[Charges|耐力球]可以跳过此技能的冷却时间。

ShortDescription.en: Perform a [Warcry] that [Empowered|Empowers] your [Attack|Attacks] and causes enemies to Combust on death.
ShortDescription.zh: 进行一次[Warcry|战吼]，[Empowered|强化]你的[Attack|攻击]并使被击败的敌人触发燃尽。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Overcharges your brands near the targeted area, causing them to accelerate how quickly they activate and expire. Deals damage in an area around each overcharged brand when it expires.
Description.zh: 使你在目标区域附近的烙印超载，让它们更快激活，也更快耗尽。被超载的烙印耗尽时对一片区域造成伤害。

Description.en: Perform a damaging [Warcry], [Knockback|Knocking Back] nearby enemies and [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunning] enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun]. If an enemy is [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunned] or a currently [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunned] enemy is [HitDamage|Hit], this Skill [Empowered|Empowers] subsequent [Slam|Slams] to perform an additional [Aftershock|Aftershock]. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an [Charges|Endurance Charge].
Description.zh: 发出一声伤害性[Warcry|战吼]，[Knockback|击退]附近敌人并[HeavyStun|重度晕眩][PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的敌人。如果敌人被[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]或[HitDamage|击中]正处于[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]的敌人，此技能[Empowered|强化]后续的[Slam|猛击]，使其额外产生一次[Aftershock|余震]。消耗一个[Charges|耐力球]可以跳过此技能的冷却时间。

ShortDescription.en: Perform a damaging [Warcry] that [Empowered|Empowers] your [Slam|Slams] if it [HeavyStun|Heavy Stuns].
ShortDescription.zh: 发出一声伤害性[Warcry|战吼]，若造成[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]则[Empowered|强化]你的[Slam|猛击]。

Description.en: Perform a [Warcry] using [Glory] gained by [Ignite|Igniting] enemies to turn you into an embodiment of Kaom. While embodying Kaom, you [Trigger] Volcanic Steps while travelling, [Melee] [Strike|Strikes] and [Slam|Slams] are [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosted], and your [Melee] [Strike|Strikes] [Trigger] Volcanic Eruption.
Description.zh: 使用[Ignite|点燃]敌人获得的[Glory|荣耀]发出[Warcry|战吼]，将你变成冈姆的化身。化身冈姆时，你的脚步会[Trigger|触发]火山踏步，[Melee|近战][Strike|打击]和[Slam|猛击]获得[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]，你的[Melee|近战][Strike|打击]会[Trigger|触发]熔火喷发。

ShortDescription.en: Performs a [Warcry] that [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosts] your [Strike|Strikes] and [Slam|Slams] with the power of Kaom.
ShortDescription.zh: 发出一声[Warcry|战吼]，以冈姆的力量使你的[Strike|打击]和[Slam|猛击]获得[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]。

Description.en: [Slam] the ground around you, dealing damage to nearby enemies.
Description.zh: 你的每一步都会[Slam|猛击]周围的地面，对附近敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: Fire molten [Projectile|Projectiles] from the struck enemy, which will land nearby dealing [Attack] damage in an area.
Description.zh: 从被击中的敌人发射熔火[Projectile|投射物]，落在周围并造成范围[Attack|攻击]伤害。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, adding energy to the branded enemy. Each activation, energy spreads from each energised enemy to an enemy in range which is not energised by the brand. If the branded enemy has 20 energy, each activation will instead deal a pulse of area damage. Energy explodes when the energised enemy dies or the brand is removed, dealing damage in an area.
Description.zh: 创造一道魔法烙印，附着在周围一个敌人身上。一旦附着就会周期性激活，给附着烙印的敌人上能量。每次激活，能量都会从每个有能量的敌人身上朝周围范围内一个没有能量的敌人身上扩散。一旦附着烙印的敌人有 20 层能量，则改为辐射范围伤害。有能量的生物被击败或烙印被移除时会爆炸，对一片区域造成伤害。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy, dealing cold damage over time and chilling them. It periodically activates while attached, gaining stages that raise the damage. When removed, a short-duration debuff dealing the same damage over time and chill is applied to each nearby enemy. The brand keeps its charges while detached.
Description.zh: 创造一道魔法烙印，附着在周围一个敌人身上，造成持续冰霜伤害，并冰缓敌人。同时附着后会周期性激活，积累层数提升伤害。移除烙印时会附加一个减益效果，在短时间内造成相同的持续伤害，并对范围内的每个敌人施加冰缓。解除烙印时会保留使用次数。

Description.en: [Slam|Slam] the ground, sending out a fissure that deals area damage to enemies it passes under and thrusts a spike from the ground when it ends. [Warcry|Warcries] performed near the spike will cause it to shatter, damaging surrounding enemies.
Description.zh: [Slam|猛击]地面，打出一道裂缝，对经过的敌人造成范围伤害，裂缝尽头会伸出尖刺。在尖刺附近发动的[Warcry|战吼]会让它破碎，对周围敌人造成伤害。

ShortDescription.en: [Slam] to create an explosive spike.
ShortDescription.zh: [Slam|猛击]以产生一个爆炸尖刺。

Description.en: Release a beam which deals lightning damage to enemies in a long area in front of you, and has several smaller beams branch off from it at an angle, hitting more enemies to the sides.
Description.zh: 发射波束，对你前方长形范围内的敌人造成闪电伤害，并呈一定角度分裂出一些小型波束，击中两侧其它敌人。

Description.en: Place a Sigil on the ground, providing a powerful [Buff] to you and [Allies] standing in it which grants Life Regeneration and amplifies [Armour], [Evasion] and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]. The [Buff] becomes more powerful the more mana you spend while standing in the Sigil.
Description.zh: 在地面上放置一个法印，为立于其中的你与[Allies|友军]提供强大的[Buff|增益状态]，赋予生命回复并增强[Armour|护甲]、[Evasion|闪避]与[EnergyShield|能量护盾]。在印记中消耗的魔力越多，此[Buff|增益状态]效果越强。

Description.en: Place a Sigil on the ground, providing a powerful [Spell] Damage [Buff] to you and [Allies] while standing in it. The [Buff] becomes more powerful the more mana you spend while standing in the Sigil.
Description.zh: 在地面放置一个法印，当你和你的[Allies|友军]处于法印内时获得高额[Spell|法术]伤害[Buff|增益状态]。你在法印内消耗的魔力越多，[Buff|增益状态]会变得越强大。

ShortDescription.en: Place a [Spell]-strengthening Sigil on the ground.
ShortDescription.zh: 在地面放置一个强化[Spell|法术]的魔符。

Description.en: Create a wall of [Fire|Fire] in front of you, which [Ignite|Ignites] everything within its area. Any [Projectile|Projectiles] fired through the wall by you and [Allies] deal added [Fire|Fire] damage. [Consume|Consumes] a [Lightning] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to also add [Lightning] damage to the [Projectile|Projectiles].
Description.zh: 在你身前创造一面[Fire|火焰]之墙，[Ignite|点燃]区域内的一切。你和[Allies|友军]发射的[Projectile|投射物]只要穿过火墙都会附加[Fire|火焰]伤害。若可能，[Consume|消耗]一个[Lightning|闪电][ElementalInfusion|灌注]，可为[Projectile|投射物]同时附加[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Create a wall of [Fire] that [Ignite|Ignites] enemies and your [Projectile|Projectiles].
ShortDescription.zh: 产生一道[Fire|火焰]之墙，对敌人和你的[Projectile|投射物]施加[Ignite|点燃]。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Calls impale debuffs from enemies, alive or dead, in a large area around you to gain steel shards. Deals reflected damage in a smaller area around each such enemy based on the impales removed from them. Continues to grant shards over time until you reach maximum or spend them.
Description.zh: 召唤大范围内所有敌人（无论生死）身上的穿刺减益，为你提供钢刃碎片。基于从每个敌人身上移除的穿刺层数，在其周围小范围内造成反射伤害。持续提供钢刃碎片直至达到上限或被消耗。

Description.en: Deal [Chaos] damage in an area around the previously [Curse|Cursed] enemy.
Description.zh: 在之前[Curse|被诅咒的]敌人周围的区域造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Description.en: Icicles emerge from the ground in a series of small bursts, each damaging enemies caught in the area and knocking them back in the direction of the next burst.
Description.zh: 从地面的一系列爆发中冒出冰结之刺，每一次都对该区域内的敌人造成伤害，并将它们击退到下一次爆发的距离。

Description.en: Detonate a [Curse] on every enemy in an area, causing explosions of [Chaos] damage but removing the [Curse]. Can only detonate [Curse|Curses] for which at least half of the duration has expired.
Description.zh: 引爆一片区域内每个敌人身上的一个[Curse|诅咒]，产生爆炸，造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害，并移除[Curse|诅咒]。只能引爆持续时间至少过半的[Curse|诅咒]。

ShortDescription.en: Detonate [Curse|Curses] on enemies in an area.
ShortDescription.zh: 引爆区域内敌人身上的[Curse|诅咒]。

Description.en: Create a sphere of water, or move an existing sphere and reset its duration. The sphere continually applies a drenched debuff with a short duration to enemies in its area or those it moves through. You can hit the sphere with other skills to inflict Cold and Lightning Ailments (other than Chill). The sphere pulses when created, at regular intervals while afflicted by an Ailment, and after moving, damaging all drenched enemies in a large area.
Description.zh: 创造一个水球，或移动一个现有的水球并重置它的持续时间。水球持续不断会给它范围内或穿越其范围的生物施加一个短时间存在的浸湿减益效果。你可以用其它技能攻击水球，使其施加冰霜和闪电异常状态。它会固定间隔一段时间发射脉冲。它移动后，会对浸湿的敌人造成广域伤害。

Description.en: Create a sphere of water, or move an existing sphere and reset its duration. The sphere continually applies a drenched debuff with a short duration to enemies in its area or those it moves through. You can hit the sphere with other skills to inflict Cold and Lightning Ailments (other than Chill). The sphere pulses when created, at regular intervals while afflicted by an Ailment, and after moving, damaging all drenched enemies in a large area.
Description.zh: 创造一个水球，或移动一个现有的水球并重置它的持续时间。水球持续不断会给它范围内或穿越其范围的生物施加一个短时间存在的浸湿减益效果。你可以用其它技能攻击水球，使其施加冰霜和闪电异常状态。它会固定间隔一段时间发射脉冲。它移动后，会对浸湿的敌人造成广域伤害。

Description.en: Casts all socketed aura spells. They will not apply to you. Auras that only apply to enemies cannot be socketed.
Description.zh: 施放所有镶嵌的光环法术，它们不会对你生效。无法镶嵌仅对敌人生效的光环。

Description.en: Consume 3 [Charges|Endurance Charges] to Raise a [Totem|Totem] that conjures spirit warriors. Each warrior uses a socketed [Mace] Skill once, then disappears. Cannot use [Channelling] Skills or Skills with Cooldowns.
Description.zh: 消耗 3 个[Charges|耐力球]竖立一个[Totem|图腾]，图腾会召唤灵魂战士。每位战士会使用一次已镶嵌的[Mace|锤类]技能，随后消失。无法使用[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能或有冷却时间的技能。

ShortDescription.en: Consume [Charges|Endurance Charges] to raise a [Totem] that uses [Mace] Skills you socket.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗[Charges|耐力球]竖立一个[Totem|图腾]，图腾可使用你镶嵌的[Mace|锤类]技能。

Description.en: Consume any combination of 3 [Charges|Power and/or Endurance Charges] to raise a [Totem] that uses socketed [Spell|Spells]. Cannot use Skills with Cooldowns.
Description.zh: 消耗任意组合的 3 个[Charges|暴击球和/或耐力球]竖立一个[Totem|图腾]，施放镶嵌的[Spell|法术]。无法使用有冷却时间的技能。

ShortDescription.en: Consume 3 [Charges|Power or Endurance Charges] to raise a [Totem] that casts socketed [Spell|Spells].
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗 3 个[Charges|暴击球或耐力球]竖立一个[Totem|图腾]，施放镶嵌的[Spell|法术]。

Description.en: Place a ballista totem which uses the socketed bow or wand attack skills.
Description.zh: 放置一个弩炮图腾，使用镶嵌的弓类或法杖攻击技能。

Description.en: Raise a cannon [Ballista] [Totem] which uses socketed [Grenade] Skills, with significantly improved [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate].
Description.zh: 竖立一个[Ballista|弩炮][Totem|图腾]，使用镶嵌的[Grenade|榴弹]技能，[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]显著提高。

ShortDescription.en: Raise a [Totem] that uses socketed [Grenade|Grenades].
ShortDescription.zh: 竖立一个[Totem|图腾]，使用镶嵌的[Grenade|榴弹]。

Description.en: Applies a buff which can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
Description.zh: 施加一个增益效果，在其耗尽之前替你承受部分伤害。和其它防卫技能共用冷却时间。

Description.en: Expel your own blood as [Chain|Chaining] blood tendrils in a cone in front of you. Enemies [HitDamage|Hit] by the tendrils take [Physical] damage and are inflicted with [Bleeding].
Description.zh: 在你前方锥形范围内射出数道[Chain|连锁]的赤色光束。被光束[HitDamage|击中]的敌人会受到[Physical|物理]伤害，并被施加[Bleeding|流血]效果。

ShortDescription.en: Expel blood tendrils at enemies, inflicting [Bleeding] on [HitDamage|Hit].
ShortDescription.zh: 对敌人释放赤色光束，对[HitDamage|击中]的敌人施加[Bleeding|流血]。

Description.en: Draws out your own blood to power a buff for a duration, letting this skill inflict the Corrupting Blood debuff on enemies you hit, dealing physical damage over time for a short secondary duration. The buff's duration will be refreshed if you spend enough life before it expires.
Description.zh: 用自己的生命提供一个增益效果，并持续一段时间，使你击中敌人时对其施加腐化之血，在短时间内造成物理持续伤害。在该增益效果消减前花费足量生命可以刷新该增益效果的持续时间。

Description.en: Conjure a bloody scythe that sweeps across the targeted area, dealing [Physical] damage to enemies and applying [CriticalWeakness|Critical Weakness]. Cannot be [Trigger|Triggered].
Description.zh: 召唤一把赤色镰刀横扫选择的区域，对敌人造成[Physical|物理]伤害，并施加[CriticalWeakness|暴击弱点]。无法被[Trigger|触发]。

ShortDescription.en: Conjures a bloody scythe to damage enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一把魔法镰刀，对敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: Bloody scythes swipe around a selected area, hitting enemies with physical damage. An area of boiling blood is left beneath them for a duration which deals physical damage over time. Also gives a bonus to maximum Blood Charges for a secondary duration.
Description.zh: 召唤一把赤色镰刀横扫选择的区域，对敌人造成物理伤害，之后会留下一片沸血区域，持续造成物理伤害。附加持续时间内还会提高赤炼球的上限。

Description.en: Conjure an abyssal scythe that sweeps across the targeted area, dealing [Fire] damage to enemies and [Consume|Consuming] [Ignite] to create pillars of flame. Cannot be [Trigger|Triggered].
Description.zh: 召唤一把深渊镰刀横扫选择的区域，对敌人造成[Fire|火焰]伤害，并[Consume|消耗][Ignite|点燃]产生烈焰之柱。无法被[Trigger|触发]。

ShortDescription.en: Conjures an abyssal scythe to damage enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一把深渊镰刀，对敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
Description.zh: 施加一个增益效果，在你生命低于一半时提供保护，防止被击中时立刻失去生命，改为随时间缓慢失去生命值。在该增益效果下，你无法通过除药剂外的手段将生命恢复至高于低血状态，并且一旦生命高于低血状态，施放技能时会同时消耗生命和魔力。

Description.en: Each cast of this spell waits for a short duration, releasing a burst of lightning and chaos spell damage in an area around you when that duration ends. Enemies killed by this damage, or shortly after, will explode. The explosions of the corpses are not affected by modifiers to spell damage, and cannot be reflected.
Description.zh: 每次施放该法术都会在等待一小段时间后对一片区域释放闪电和混沌法术伤害的爆炸。被这种方式消灭的敌人也会爆炸，但它们的灵柩产生的爆炸不受法术伤害类词缀影响，也不能被反射。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Spin with a sword or axe to deal damage in an area around you. Sacrifices some rage to send a ragestorm forward. While enemies are inside it, the ragestorm will slow its movement and repeatedly deal attack damage based on your attack speed.
Description.zh: 用刀剑或斧类施放旋转攻击，对周围范围内的敌人造成伤害。牺牲部分怒火可以朝前方发射一道怒火风暴。在怒火风暴内的敌人会降低移动速度，并根据你的攻击速度反复承受攻击伤害。

Description.en: Performs a warcry, empowering subsequent attacks. Grants a buff which boosts critical strike chance and allows attacks to benefit from increases to spell damage.
Description.zh: 发出一声战吼，强化后续的攻击。并提供一个增益状态，提高暴击率，并使攻击能够得到法术伤害加成的强化。

Description.en: Teleports you to a nearby enemy, applying a buff to you for a short duration and blinding the enemy for a secondary duration. Performing a melee attack with a One-Handed Weapon removes the buff to exert that attack.
Description.zh: 将你传送到敌人周围，并在短时间内施加一个增益效果。施展近战攻击会移除该增益效果，并增助这次攻击。

Description.en: Throws a trap which, once triggered, swings two copies of your equipped Dagger, Claw or One Handed Sword around it in a circle, each repeatedly damaging enemies they spin through.
Description.zh: 投掷一个陷阱，触发时旋转挥舞你装备的两把匕首、爪类或单手剑的副本，反复不断对它范围内的敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Lobs an exploding [Projectile|Projectile] near the targeted location, and extra [Projectile|Projectiles] toward enemies around you. The [Projectile|Projectiles] deal [Chaos|Chaos] damage based on your life and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]. Casting this [Spell|Spell] damages you.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 朝目标地点扔出一枚爆炸[Projectile|投射物]，并朝你周围的敌人发射额外[Projectile|投射物]。这些[Projectile|投射物]根据你的生命和[EnergyShield|能量护盾]造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。施放该[Spell|法术]会对你自己造成伤害。

Description.en: Deals lightning damage based upon your missing mana in a circular area around the targeted location, as well as in four rectangular extensions whose lengths depend upon your remaining mana.
Description.zh: 对目标地点的环形区域造成闪电伤害，并以矩形朝四角的方向延伸，其长度由你剩余的魔力决定。造成的额外闪电伤害则由你失去的魔力决定。

Description.en: Fires an arrow into the air to land at a targeted location, dealing area damage. The arrow sticks in the ground where it lands, and periodically fires a beam of lightning to another arrow near it, dealing area damage between them.
Description.zh: 朝天射出一支箭矢落在目标地点，造成区域伤害。箭矢会刺入大地，定期朝周围的其它箭矢发射一道闪电束，在彼此之间造成区域伤害。

Description.en: Swipe your shield, dealing area damage in three waves in front of you. Enemies can be hit by two of the waves where they overlap.
Description.zh: 挥舞盾牌，朝你面前造成三道范围伤害的冲击波。敌人可以被两道交叠的冲击波伤害。

Description.en: Throws a spectral copy of your melee weapon. It spins around while flying in a large spiral, damaging enemies in its path, and bouncing if it collides with walls.
Description.zh: 复制一把手中的近战武器并投掷出去。它会盘旋飞出，形成一个巨大的螺旋，对路径上所有敌人造成伤害。如果碰到墙壁会回弹。

Description.en: Attack enemies with a melee [Strike|Strike]. The [Strike|Strike] will cause a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] on enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun]. Upon causing a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] it will also create a Shockwave, dealing a large amount of damage in an area.
Description.zh: 使用近战[Strike|打击]攻击敌人。[Strike|打击]会对[PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的敌人造成[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]。在造成[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]时产生一道震波，对区域内的敌人造成大量伤害。

ShortDescription.en: [Strike] enemies and release shockwaves on [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun].
ShortDescription.zh: [Strike|打击]敌人，造成[HeavyStun|重度昏迷]时释放冲击波。

Description.en: A [Strike|Strike] that causes a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] on enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun]. Upon causing a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] it will also create a Shockwave, dealing a large amount of damage in an area.
Description.zh: [Strike|打击]会对[PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的敌人造成[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]。在造成[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]时产生一道震波，对区域内的敌人造成大量伤害。

Description.en: Fires a single eye projectile which constantly releases shard projectiles in a spiral. The shards will damage enemies they impact, dealing cold damage. The eye cannot damage enemies. When the eye dissipates or collides with terrain, it releases a faster spiral of extra shards.
Description.zh: 发射一枚眼球形投射物，不断螺旋发射霰弹投射物。霰弹撞击敌人会造成冰霜伤害。眼球本身并不能伤害敌人。眼球撞击地面或自然消散时，会额外发射一圈更快速的霰弹。

Description.en: Fire a single Eye [Projectile] which does not [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. The Eye constantly releases damaging shard [Projectile|Projectiles] in a spiral as it flies. If the Eye passes over an [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surface] or [Orb], it will take on that surface's effect causing shards to deal more damage of the corresponding [DamageTypes|Type].
Description.zh: 发射一枚无法[HitDamage|击中]敌人的眼球形[Projectile|投射物]。眼球在飞行过程中会不断以螺旋状释放伤害性霰弹[Projectile|投射物]。如果眼球飞过[ElementalGround|元素地面效果]或[Orb|法球]，则会受到该效果的影响，并使碎片造成更高的对应[DamageTypes|类型]的伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Create a [Projectile] that fires spirals of shards as it travels.
ShortDescription.zh: 产生一个[Projectile|投射物]，飞行时发射螺旋碎片。

Description.en: While active, passively leaves afterimages of your recent past. Cast the [Spell] to return to the oldest afterimage, teleporting to that location and resetting your Life, Mana and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] to the values they had at the time. Removes any upcoming damage delayed by Phased Form on use.
Description.zh: 激活时，被动地留下不久之前的残影。施放该[Spell|法术]会回归到最早的残影处，并将你的生命、魔力和[EnergyShield|能量护盾]重置为当时的状态。使用时，移除任何因变化多端形态而延迟的即将到来的伤害。

Description.en: Create a storm that sucks in enemies and deals [Physical] damage over time. A Tornado that overlaps an [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surface] absorbs that surface's [Debuff], applying it to enemies inside the Tornado and causing the Tornado to deal extra damage of that element.
Description.zh: 生成一道龙卷风，持续卷入敌人并对其造成[Physical|物理]伤害。当龙卷风叠加[ElementalGround|元素地面效果]时，将继承其[Debuff|减益状态]，并对范围内的敌人施加该状态，并使龙卷风额外造成该元素的伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Create a Tornado that sucks in and damages enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 生成一道龙卷风，卷入敌人并对其造成伤害。

Description.en: Create a stationary [Fire], [Cold] or [Lightning] storm at a target location for a duration, based on the highest [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] type for the [HitDamage|Hit] that [Trigger|Triggered] the storm. [HitDamage|Hits] which do not deal [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] will not [Trigger] the storm.
Description.zh: 在目标维持创造一个持续一段时间并静止不动的[Fire|火焰]，[Cold|冰霜]或[Lightning|闪电]风暴，类型由[Trigger|触发]风暴的[HitDamage|击中]的最高[ElementalDamage|元素伤害]类型决定。不造成[ElementalDamage|元素伤害]的[HitDamage|击中]无法[Trigger|触发]风暴。

Description.en: Grants a buff which significantly lowers your maximum Energy Shield to transform your equipped weapons into Swords formed from that energy. Casting the spell again removes the buff. This skill cannot be triggered.
Description.zh: 获得一个增益效果，它会大幅降低你的能量护盾，用于将你装备的武器变为一把能量之刃。再次施放该法术会移除此增益。该技能无法被触发。

Description.en: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, your Energy Shield will intercept some of the damage they would take. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
Description.zh: 同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，你的能量护盾可以为羁绊对象阻挡一部分伤害。若羁绊对象在此期间被击败，你也会同时被击败。该技能不能由图腾、陷阱、地雷施放，也不能被触发。

Description.en: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, they deal additional fire damage based on your life. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
Description.zh: 同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，羁绊对象按照你的生命造成额外火焰伤害。若羁绊对象在此期间被击败，你也会同时被击败。该技能不能由图腾、陷阱、地雷施放，也不能被触发。

Description.en: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, they get recovery from your life leech instead of you. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
Description.zh: 同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，你的生命偷取改为给羁绊对象恢复生命。若羁绊对象在此期间被击败，你也会同时被击败。该技能不能由图腾、陷阱、地雷施放，也不能被触发。

Description.en: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, they copy your block chance and recover life when they block. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
Description.zh: 同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，羁绊对象会复制你的格挡率，并在格挡时回复生命。若羁绊对象在此期间被击败，你也会同时被击败。该技能不能由图腾、陷阱、地雷施放，也不能被触发。

Description.en: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, their hits can trigger your supported spells. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
Description.zh: 同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，羁绊对象可以触发你辅助的法术。若羁绊对象在此期间被击败，你也会同时被击败。该技能不能由图腾、陷阱、地雷施放，也不能被触发。

Description.en: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, they use your main hand critical strike chance. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
Description.zh: 同一名友方玩家产生羁绊并持续一段时间。在羁绊期间，羁绊对象可以使用你的主手暴击率。若羁绊对象在此期间被击败，你也会同时被击败。该技能不能由图腾、陷阱、地雷施放，也不能被触发。

Description.en: Call down [Lightning] to hit all enemies in a cone in front of you, dealing significantly more damage to [Shock|Shocked] enemies. If there is a [Shock|Shocked] enemy in the target area, additional lightning bolts are distributed among the targets hit. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast.
Description.zh: 召唤[Lightning|闪电]击中你面前锥形范围内的所有敌人，对[Shock|感电]敌人造成的伤害显著提高。如果目标区域内有[Shock|感电]敌人，会在击中的目标间分散额外的闪电箭。向近距离施放会使你在施法时向后跳跃。

ShortDescription.en: Call down lightning bolts that devastate [Shock|Shocked] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤闪电摧毁[Shock|感电]敌人。

Description.en: Gain a [Buff] that boosts your [Shock] chance. [Shock|Shocking] an enemy consumes the [Buff] to attach an [Orb] of electricity to that enemy. The [Orb] fires bolts of electricity at nearby enemies until it expires.
Description.zh: 获得一个[Buff|增益状态]，提高你的[Shock|感电]几率。对敌人施加[Shock|感电]会消耗[Buff|增益]效果，并在该敌人身上附加一个电能[Orb|法球]。[Orb|法球]会向附近的敌人发射电击，直至法球失效。

ShortDescription.en: Gain a [Buff] that creates an [Orb] of static next time you [Shock].
ShortDescription.zh: 获得一个[Buff|增益状态]，下次你造成[Shock|感电]时产生一个静电[Orb|法球]。

Description.en: Direct your ants to move to the target location.
Description.zh: 引导你的蚁群前往目标地点。

ShortDescription.en: Direct your ants to move to the target location.
ShortDescription.zh: 引导你的蚁群前往目标地点。

Description.en: Polymorph a party member in town, or a player in your hideout, into an animal.
Description.zh: 将城镇中队友或你藏身处的一名玩家变成一只小动物。

ShortDescription.en: Polymorph a party member in town, or a player in your hideout, into an animal.
ShortDescription.zh: 将城镇中队友或你藏身处的一名玩家变成一只小动物。

Description.en: The character swings their weapon (or both weapons if dual wielding) in an arc, damaging monsters in an area in front of them. Killing Blows on Rare or Unique enemies grant a buff that improves Cleave for a duration. Killing Blows on Rare Enemies also steal their modifiers for a secondary duration. Only works with Axes and Swords.
Description.zh: 在身体前方以弧状挥动武器（双持时则挥动两把武器），对前方区域的怪物造成伤害。消灭一个稀有或传奇敌人会给你一个增益，在一段时间内强化劈砍。消灭一个稀有敌人还能够在一段时间内窃取其词缀。限定斧类与剑类。

Description.en: Perform a series of six rapid stabs. The final stab inflicts [Bleeding] and leaves a spearhead stuck in the target, [Maim|Maiming] them for a duration. [Detonator] Skills will cause the stuck spearheads to explode, dealing further damage to the target and other nearby enemies.
Description.zh: 施展六次迅猛的戳刺，最终戳刺造成[Bleeding|流血]，并使矛尖嵌入目标体内，使其在一定时间内[Maim|瘫痪]。[Detonator|引爆]技能会使嵌入的矛头爆裂，对目标和周围的敌人造成伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Perform six quick stabs and leave a spearhead stuck in the target.
ShortDescription.zh: 进行六次快速刺击，并在目标身上留下矛头。

Description.en: Lunge at a target and skewers them. Hitting an enemy that has suffered [BloodLoss|Blood Loss] will cause a blood explosion and also [Consume] [Bleeding]. This skill cannot be [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosted].
Description.zh: 扑向一个目标并将其洞穿。击中受到[BloodLoss|失血]的敌人会引发大规模的猩红爆炸并[Consume|消耗][Bleeding|流血]。该技能无法获得[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]。

ShortDescription.en: Dash to a target and cause an explosion if they've suffered sufficient [BloodLoss|Blood Loss].
ShortDescription.zh: 冲向目标，若其遭受足量[BloodLoss|失血]则造成爆炸。

Description.en: Jump back as you rupture the earth in front of you with spearpoints, damaging enemies. [Consume|Consumes] the [ParriedDebuff|Parried Debuff] on [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies to release a shockwave and grant you a [Charges|Frenzy Charge]. This skill can be used while using other skills, and causes [Strike|Strikes] and [Projectile|Projectiles] to miss you while jumping. This skill cannot be [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosted].
Description.zh: 向后跳跃并用矛尖刺破前方的大地，对敌人造成伤害。[HitDamage|击中]敌人时[Consume|消耗][ParriedDebuff|被招架减益状态]，释放一股震波并使你获得一个[Charges|狂怒球]。该技能可以在使用其他技能期间使用，并且跳跃时[Strike|打击]和[Projectile|投射物]无法命中你。该技能无法获得[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]。

ShortDescription.en: Jump away from enemies as you attack them.
ShortDescription.zh: 攻击敌人时跳离他们。

Description.en: Perform a circular slash that kicks up a [Whirlwind] around you, [Slow|Slowing] enemies and [Blind|Blinding] them in its area of effect. Leaving the area collapses the storm, dealing damage and causing [Knockback].
Description.zh: 施展环形挥斩，在你周围踢起一阵的[Whirlwind|旋风]，使效果范围内的敌人[Slow|减速]并[Blind|致盲]。离开该区域会使风暴塌缩，造成伤害和[Knockback|击退]。

ShortDescription.en: Kick up a [Whirlwind] with your swing.
ShortDescription.zh: 挥击时激起[Whirlwind|旋风]。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] A two-swing attack, swiping to one side, then the other. Struck enemies are knocked in front of the user.
Description.zh: 一次双重横扫攻击，往两侧依次横扫，被击中的敌人会被推往施法者面前。

Description.en: Stab the ground causing multiple spears to burst out of the ground in front of you in a large area. The spears remain for a duration, or explode when enemies touch them, damaging and [Maim|Maiming] them.
Description.zh: 猛刺地面，在你面前的大范围内爆发出多重战矛。战矛会留存一段时间，并在敌人接触它们时爆炸，造成伤害并使其[Maim|瘫痪]。

ShortDescription.en: Burst a large number of spears from the ground.
ShortDescription.zh: 从地面迸发出大量战矛。

Description.en: Activate to summon a [Reviving] Demon Magus which casts socketed [Spell|Spells] in order.
Description.zh: 激活以召唤一个[Reviving|可复活的]恶魔术士，按顺序施放镶嵌的[Spell|法术]。

Description.en: Throw a single copy of your spear. When it hits an enemy it bursts, firing secondary lightning bolt [Projectile|Projectiles] at multiple other enemies within a large area around it. Consumes a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] if possible to cause the main spear to split into multiple copies on impact, each of which then bursts.
Description.zh: 复制你的战矛并将其掷出，击中一名敌人后爆发，向其周围大片区域内的其他多个敌人发射次级闪电箭[Projectile|投射物]。尽量消耗一个[Charges|狂怒球]，使主战矛在击中时分裂成多个复制体，每一个复制体都会产生爆发。

ShortDescription.en: Throw a charged spear that zaps a number of enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 投掷一支带电战矛，电击多个敌人。

Description.en: Throw a spear leaving a trail of [Fire|Fire] in its wake, [Burning|Burning] enemies. Then throws a second spear in the same direction, causing the trail of [Fire|Fire] to expand outwards.
Description.zh: 投掷一柄留下[Fire|火焰]痕迹的战矛，使敌人[Burning|燃烧]，随后朝相同方向投出第二柄战矛，使[Fire|火焰]痕迹向外延伸。

Description.en: Activate to summon a [Reviving] Infernal Hound which [Ignite|Ignites] enemies near it.
Description.zh: 激活以召唤一头[Reviving|可复活的]炽焰猎犬，能够[Ignite|点燃]周围的敌人。

Description.en: Summon Navira, an invulnerable Water Djinn [Minion] to do your bidding. Navira will only act when you [Command] her to do so, bestowing restorative blessings upon you and your [Allies] with her [Spell|Spells].
Description.zh: 召唤无敌的流水巨灵[Minion|召唤生物]纳薇拉为你效命。纳薇拉仅在你下达[Command|命令]时行动，通过其[Spell|法术]为你和你的[Allies|友军]施加恢复性祝福。

Description.en: Summon Ruzhan, an invulnerable Flame Djinn [Minion], to do your bidding. Ruzhan emerges to [Strike] enemies with his greatsword whenever you use a damaging Skill, and casts devastating [Fire] [Spell|Spells] when [Command|Commanded] to do so.
Description.zh: 召唤无敌的火焰巨灵[Minion|召唤生物]鲁詹为你效命。每当你使用伤害技能时，鲁詹便会现身用巨剑[Strike|打击]敌人；当你对其下达[Command|命令]时，他还会施放毁灭性的[Fire|火焰][Spell|法术]。

Description.en: Summon Kelari, an invulnerable Sand Djinn [Minion], to do your bidding. Kelari will only act when you [Command] him to do so. Kelari delivers swift [HitDamage|Hits] with massive [Critical|Critical Hit] potential.
Description.zh: 召唤无敌的沙之巨灵[Minion|召唤生物]凯拉里为你效命。凯拉里仅在你下达[Command|命令]时行动，能以迅猛的[HitDamage|击中]造成巨大的[Critical|暴击]威胁。

Description.en: Harness Kelari's power to passively [Consume] [Corpse|Corpses] in your [Presence], causing Corpse Beetle [Minion|Minions] to burst forth. The Beetles passively follow you until [Command|Commanded]. On your [Command], they rush the target and explode.
Description.zh: 利用凯拉里的力量，被动[Consume|消耗]你[Presence|在场]处的[Corpse|灵柩]，令灵柩甲虫[Minion|召唤生物]破体而出。甲虫会一直被动跟随你，直至接到[Command|命令]。当你下达[Command|命令]时，它们将冲向目标并自爆。

Description.en: Fires a powerful bolt.
Description.zh: 发射一支强能弩箭。

Description.en: Fire a flaming bolt that explodes on impact. The explosion will cause any [Grenade|Grenades] in its area of effect to also explode.
Description.zh: 发射一支火焰之箭，在命中时会爆炸。爆炸会使作用范围内的所有[Grenade|榴弹]同时爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a flaming explosive bolt.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一支火焰爆炸弩箭。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with flaming bolts that explode on impact. The explosion will cause any [Grenade|Grenades] in its area of effect to also explode.
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]火焰之箭，弩箭在命中时会爆炸。爆炸会使作用范围内的所有[Grenade|榴弹]同时爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Load flaming explosive bolts.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填火焰爆炸弩箭。

Description.en: Fire a powerful [Pierce|Piercing] bolt that applies [RivenArmour|Riven Armour] to enemies with [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour], causing any [HitDamage|Hits] against those enemies to deal extra damage.
Description.zh: 发射一枚威力强大的[Pierce|穿透]箭，对[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]的敌人施加[RivenArmour|撕裂护甲]效果，使对这些敌人的所有[HitDamage|击中]都造成额外伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a powerful [Pierce|Piercing] bolt.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一支强能[Pierce|穿透]弩箭。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with [Pierce|Piercing] bolts that apply [RivenArmour|Riven Armour] to enemies with [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour], causing any [HitDamage|Hits] against those enemies to deal extra damage.
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填][Pierce|穿透]箭，对[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]的敌人施加[RivenArmour|撕裂护甲]效果，使对这些敌人的所有[HitDamage|击中]都造成额外伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Load powerful [Pierce|Piercing] bolts.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填强能[Pierce|穿透]弩箭。

Description.en: Fire an icy bolt that creates two walls of [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] at the end of its flight.
Description.zh: 发射一支冰箭，在飞行结束时形成两面[IceCrystals|冰晶]之墙。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a bolt that creates walls of ice.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一支生成冰墙的弩箭。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with icy bolts that create two walls of [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] at the end of their flight.
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]冰箭，弩箭在飞行结束时形成两面[IceCrystals|冰晶]之墙。

ShortDescription.en: Load bolts that create walls of ice.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填生成冰墙的弩箭。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to charge an unstable bolt. The bolt deals devastating damage and explodes on hitting terrain, but cannot be fired at all unless fully charged. Additional [Projectile|Projectiles] are fired in a spread, unlike other [Crossbow|Crossbow] Skills.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]，为一支不稳定的箭矢充能。箭矢会造成毁灭性的伤害，并在击中地形时发生爆炸，但只有完全充能后才可以射出。额外[Projectile|投射物]以散射方式发射，不同于其他[Crossbow|战弩]技能。

ShortDescription.en: Charge up a devastating bolt.
ShortDescription.zh: 蓄力毁灭性弩箭。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with unstable bolts that require a lengthy charging period to fire but deal devastating damage, [Pierce] through enemies, and explode upon hitting terrain. Additional [Projectile|Projectiles] are fired in a spread, unlike other [Crossbow|Crossbow] Skills.
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]不稳定的弩箭，需要较长的时间充能才能发射，但可以造成毁灭性的伤害，[Pierce|穿透]敌人并在击中地形时发生爆炸。额外[Projectile|投射物]以散射方式发射，不同于其他[Crossbow|战弩]技能。

ShortDescription.en: Loads unstable bolts with lengthy charge times.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填需要长时间蓄力的不稳定弩箭。

Description.en: Aim skyward and fires an enemy-seeking payload which drops a bolt near every enemy in the target area. These bolts lodge in the ground and explode after a short delay.
Description.zh: 瞄准天空，发射一支索敌母箭，在目标区域内的每个敌人附近落下一支弩箭。弩箭会嵌入地面，在短暂延迟后爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Fire skyward, dropping a bolt on every enemy in the target area.
ShortDescription.zh: 射向天空，对目标区域内每个敌人投下弩箭。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with enemy-seeking payloads which are fired into the air, dropping a bolt near every enemy in the target area. These bolts lodge in the ground and explode after a short delay.
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]索敌母箭，弩箭会射向空中，在目标区域内的每个敌人附近落下一支弩箭。弩箭会嵌入地面，在短暂延迟后爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Load payload bolts that drop on every enemy in the target area.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填对目标区域内每个敌人投下的载荷弩箭。

Description.en: Fire all loaded bolts into the sky, causing them to rain down over the target area, starting at the centre and spreading outward.
Description.zh: 将所有装填的弩箭射向高空，洒落在目标区域，并从中心开始向外扩散。

ShortDescription.en: Fire all loaded bolts to rain down over the target area.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射所有装填的弩箭，在目标区域降下箭雨。

Description.en: Passively generate bolts of ice at a frequency equal to reload time, up to a cap. Activate to [Ammunition|Load] the accumulated bolts into your [Crossbow]. All loaded bolts are fired at once, causing them to rain down over the target area.
Description.zh: 以等同于装填时间的间隔被动生成冰箭，直至达到上限。激活技能可以将积累的冰箭[Ammunition|装填]到[Crossbow|战弩]中。装填的所有冰箭会同时射出，并洒落在目标区域。

ShortDescription.en: Load ice bolts that have been generated passively.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填被动生成的冰霜弩箭。

Description.en: Aims skyward and fires charged bolts that land around the target location, dealing damage and lodging in the ground for a duration. [Detonator] Skills will cause these bolts to explode. Can fire a limited number of bolts before needing to reload.
Description.zh: 瞄准天空，发射一支充能弩箭并落在目标位置，造成伤害并嵌入地面一段时间。[Detonator|引爆]技能会使弩箭发生爆炸。在需要重新装填前，可以发射有限数量的弩箭。

ShortDescription.en: Fire explosive lightning bolts into the air.
ShortDescription.zh: 向空中发射爆炸闪电弩箭。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with charged bolts that land around the target location and explode if hit by a [Detonator] Skill. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]充能箭矢，可以落在目标位置周围，并在被[Detonator|引爆]技能击中时爆炸。再次使用此技能可以重新装填箭匣。

ShortDescription.en: Load explosive lightning bolts.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填爆炸闪电弩箭。

Description.en: Advance while hitting enemies around you with a series of spinning [Strike|Strikes].
Description.zh: 向前推进并以回旋攻势[Strike|打击]周围的敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Rapidly [Strike] enemies as you spin forward.
ShortDescription.zh: 前冲旋转时快速[Strike|打击]敌人。

Description.en: [Slam|Slam] the ground to [Stun|Stun] enemies and [Knockback|knock them away], then continue forward and perform a devastating second [Slam|Slam].
Description.zh: [Slam|猛击]地面，使敌人[Stun|晕眩]并将其[Knockback|击退]，随后追身上前并施展毁灭性的二次[Slam|猛击]。

ShortDescription.en: Perform a double [Slam] as you jump forward.
ShortDescription.zh: 向前跳跃时进行双重[Slam|猛击]。

Description.en: Leap backwards, firing an icy arrow which can [Chill] or [Freeze] enemies around the location from which you escaped. This arrow will create [IceFragment|Ice Fragments] on impact.
Description.zh: 向后跳跃，同时发射一支冰霜箭矢，可以[Chill|冰缓]或[Freeze|冻结]你逃离位置周围的敌人。此箭矢击中时会产生[IceFragment|冰霜碎片]。

ShortDescription.en: Leap backwards while firing an icy arrow which creates Ice Fragments on impact.
ShortDescription.zh: 向后跳跃，同时发射一支冰霜箭矢，击中时产生冰霜碎片。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to charge up a heavy swing, drawing earth from the ground to enlarge your mace. Release to [Slam|Slam] the ground, dealing damage in an area around the impact, followed by [Aftershock|Aftershocks] dealing damage in a larger area. This Skill has its own [Attack] time, which is not affected by your weapon's attack speed and cannot be modified.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]并积蓄一次威猛的挥击，汲取大地之力并将武器扩展为巨锤。释放时[Slam|猛击]地面，对击中周围区域造成伤害，随后在较大范围内产生[Aftershock|余震]，并造成伤害。此技能拥有独立的[Attack|攻击]时间，不受武器攻击速度影响，也无法被修改。

ShortDescription.en: Wind up a massive [Slam] that causes several [Aftershock|Aftershocks].
ShortDescription.zh: 蓄力一次强烈的[Slam|猛击]，造成多次[Aftershock|余震]。

Description.en: Batter enemies at range by generating a gust of wind as you swing. Enemies will be [Daze|Dazed] and [Knockback|Knocked Back] based on how close they are to you.
Description.zh: 挥舞时生成风涌，冲击远距离的敌人，敌人将会[Daze|恍惚]，并根据敌人与你的距离将其[Knockback|击退]。

ShortDescription.en: [Knockback|Knock Back] and damage enemies with a [Daze|Dazing] gust of wind.
ShortDescription.zh: 用一阵的风[Knockback|击退]敌人并造成伤害，并使敌人[Daze|恍惚]。

Description.en: [Slam|Slam] the ground, creating a branching [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissure] that deals damage as it travels and remains for a duration. Using a different [Slam] on a [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissure] creates a spreading [Aftershock].
Description.zh: [Slam|猛击]地面，生成一个向外分支的[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]，在移动过程中造成伤害并保持一段时间。对[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]使用不同的[Slam|猛击]会产生扩散的[Aftershock|余震]。

ShortDescription.en: [Slam] the ground to create a [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissure] that will [Aftershock] when [Slam|Slammed] again.
ShortDescription.zh: [Slam|猛击]地面产生一个[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]，再次[Slam|猛击]时产生[Aftershock|余震]。

Description.en: This spell consumes multiple cooldown uses to summon icy Statues in a ring. Each Statue uses your Frozen Sweep attack once before vanishing.
Description.zh: 此法术消耗多个冷却时间次数来召唤一圈寒冰雕像。每个雕像都会在消失前使用你的冰封横扫攻击。

Description.en: This attack is used by your Statues to deal damage in an area around them while stepping forward. This skill cannot repeat and can only be used by Statues from Frozen Legion.
Description.zh: 此攻击由你的雕像使用，在其向前移动的同时对它们周围区域造成伤害。该技能无法重复，且只能由冰封军团召唤的雕像使用。

Description.en: Slam the ground, creating a winding fissure that deals area damage while travelling outwards. When it reaches the target location it erupts, releasing a burst of molten projectiles. After erupting, the fissure continues moving towards enemies to cause further eruptions.
Description.zh: 猛击地面，生成一个向外延伸的同时造成范围伤害的曲折裂缝。裂缝会在抵达目标地点时喷发，释放出熔岩投射物。喷发之后，裂缝会继续朝敌人移动，造成进一步的喷发。

Description.en: Summon two Triggerbots which follow you around and run towards enemies.
Description.zh: 召唤两个会跟随你移动的触发机器人，它们会冲向你的敌人。

Description.en: Throw a coin into the air, letting fate decide the outcome.
Description.zh: 向空中抛出一枚硬币，让命运昭示结果。

ShortDescription.en: Throw a coin into the air, letting fate decide the outcome.
ShortDescription.zh: 向空中抛出一枚硬币，让命运昭示结果。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Casts a buff that grants different bonuses to attack skills depending on your stance. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
Description.zh: 施放一个增益效果，基于不同的姿态给攻击技能施加不同的加成。再次使用该技能会在血姿态和沙姿态之间切换。

Description.en: Create a new home for your pet Raccoon.
Description.zh: 给你的宠物浣熊造一个新家。

ShortDescription.en: Create a new home for your pet Raccoon.
ShortDescription.zh: 给你的宠物浣熊造一个新家。

Description.en: Performs a series of quick teleports towards a targeted location, stopping if you would overlap with monsters or terrain. If using the "Attack in Place" option, the direction is reversed. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills. Cannot be supported.
Description.zh: 朝目标方向发起一连串快速传送，与怪物或地形重叠时停止。如果使用“原地攻击”，会朝反方向传送。和其它闪现技能共用冷却时间。无法被辅助。

Description.en: Launches a ball of fire which explodes at the end of its flight, damaging foes in a small area.
Description.zh: 向目标射出一团火球，在飞行结束时爆炸，对小范围的敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: Fire a burst of [Chaos] energy at the target.
Description.zh: 对目标发射一股[Chaos|混沌]能量。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a burst of [Chaos] energy at the target.
ShortDescription.zh: 对目标发射一股[Chaos|混沌]能量。

Description.en: Simultaneously fires a [Physical] [Projectile] and a [Chaos] [Projectile] at the target. These projectiles [Chain] through any number of [Curse|Cursed] targets.
Description.zh: 同时向目标发射一枚[Physical|物理][Projectile|投射物]与一枚[Chaos|混沌][Projectile|投射物]。这些投射物可在任意数量的[Curse|被诅咒]目标间[Chain|连锁]。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a pair of [Physical] and [Chaos] projectiles at the target.
ShortDescription.zh: 向目标发射一对[Chaos|混沌]与[Physical|物理]投射物。

Description.en: Sweep your [Quarterstaff|Quarterstaff] upwards, releasing an icy fissure which deals damage in a series of bursts culminating in a large spike. [Frozen|Frozen] enemies hit by the final spike are dealt heavy damage but the [Freeze] is [Consume|Consumed]. [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] hit by the final spike explode.
Description.zh: 将[Quarterstaff|节杖]向上挑出，释放一道寒冰裂缝，持续爆发并造成伤害，最后爆发一根大型冰棱。最终冰棱击中被[Frozen|冻结]的敌人可造成高额伤害，但会[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]。被最终冰棱击中的[IceCrystals|冰晶]将会爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Send out an icy fissure that bursts into a large spike.
ShortDescription.zh: 释放会爆发大型尖刺的寒冰裂隙。

Description.en: Flip backwards and send forth a [Freeze|Freezing] wave in front of you, immediately [Freeze|Freezing] enemies which are [PrimedFreeze|Primed for Freeze].
Description.zh: 向后翻腾并朝你的前方发出一道[Freeze|冰霜]波，立即[Freeze|冻结][PrimedFreeze|可被冻结]的敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Flip backwards and send forth a [Freeze|Freezing] wave in front of you.
ShortDescription.zh: 向后翻腾并朝你的前方发出一道[Freeze|冰霜]波。

Description.en: Fires bolts in rapid succession. The skill has limited ammunition. This ammunition will reload when using a bolt skill, or automatically when bolts are depleted.
Description.zh: 快速连续发射弩箭。该技能有弹药限制。使用弩箭技能时会装填弹药，弩箭耗尽时也会自动装填。

Description.en: Fire a stream of heated bolts. [Heat] builds up on your [Crossbow] as you fire, and reaching maximum heat will prevent you from firing these bolts for a short time. However, other Skills can Consume [Heat] for extra benefits.
Description.zh: 发射一连串的加热弩箭。发射时你的[Crossbow|战弩]会积蓄[Heat|热度]，达到最大热度会在短时间内阻止你发射这些弩箭。但是，其他技能可以消耗[Heat|热度]获得额外增益。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a rapid stream of heated bolts.
ShortDescription.zh: 快速倾泻一连串的加热弩箭。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with a large clip of heated bolts. [Heat] builds up on your [Crossbow] as you fire them, and reaching maximum [Heat] will prevent you from firing or reloading these bolts for a short time. However, other Skills can Consume [Heat] for extra benefits. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]一大匣加热弩箭。发射时你的[Crossbow|战弩]会积蓄[Heat|热度]，达到最大[Heat|热度]会在短时间内阻止你发射或装填这些弩箭。但是，其他技能可以消耗[Heat|热度]获得额外增益。再次使用此技能可以重新装填箭匣。

ShortDescription.en: Load heated bolts that fire in a rapid stream.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填快速倾泻的加热弩箭。

Description.en: Rapidly fire bolts that [ArmourBreak|Break enemy Armour]. Can fire a limited number of bolts before needing to reload.
Description.zh: 快速发射能够[ArmourBreak|粉碎敌人护甲]的弩箭。在需要重新装填前，可以发射有限数量的弩箭。

ShortDescription.en: Fire [ArmourBreak|Armour-Breaking] bolts.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射[ArmourBreak|破甲]弩箭。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with a clip of bolts that can be fired rapidly and [ArmourBreak|Break enemy Armour]. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]一匣弩箭，能够快速发射并[ArmourBreak|粉碎敌人护甲]。再次使用此技能可以重新装填箭匣。

ShortDescription.en: Load [ArmourBreak|Armour-Breaking] bolts.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填[ArmourBreak|破甲]弩箭。

Description.en: Rapidly fire icy bolts at the ground, leaving a shard of ice at the impact location that arms after a duration. After arming, the ice shards explode when enemies step on them, dealing more damage the longer they have been armed, up to a maximum. Can fire a limited number of bolts before needing to reload.
Description.zh: 向地面快速发射冰箭，在击中位置留下一片冰霜碎片，经过一段时间后激活。激活后，当敌人踩到冰霜碎片时会爆炸，激活时间越长，造成的伤害越高（存在上限）。在需要重新装填前，可以发射有限数量的弩箭。

ShortDescription.en: Fire ice shards that linger on the ground until enemies step on them.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射冰霜碎片，停留在地面上直到敌人踩到。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with a clip of icy bolts that rapidly fire at the ground, leaving a shard of ice at the impact location that arms after a duration. After arming, the ice shards explode when enemies step on them, dealing more damage the longer they have been armed, up to a maximum. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]一匣冰箭，能够快速向地面发射，在撞击位置留下一片冰霜碎片，经过一段时间后激活。激活后，当敌人踩到冰霜碎片时会爆炸，激活时间越长，造成的伤害越高（存在上限）。再次使用此技能可以重新装填箭匣。

ShortDescription.en: Load ice shards that linger on the ground until enemies step on them.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填停留在地面上直到敌人踩到的冰霜碎片。

Description.en: Rapidly fire charged bolts which release damaging pulses upon [HitDamage|Hitting] an enemy affected by a [LightningAilment|Lightning Ailment]. Can fire a limited number of bolts before needing to reload.
Description.zh: 快速发射充能弩箭，在[HitDamage|击中]受到[LightningAilment|闪电异常状态]影响的敌人时释放出伤害性脉冲。在需要重新装填前，可以发射有限数量的弩箭。

ShortDescription.en: Fire bolts that release extra pulses when hitting [Shock|Shocked] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射弩箭，击中[Shock|感电]敌人时额外释放出脉冲。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with a clip of charged bolts which release damaging pulses upon [HitDamage|Hitting] an enemy affected by a [LightningAilment|Lightning Ailment]. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]一匣充能弩箭，在[HitDamage|击中]受到[LightningAilment|闪电异常状态]影响的敌人时释放出伤害性脉冲。再次使用此技能可以重新装填箭匣。

ShortDescription.en: Load bolts that release extra pulses when hitting [Shock|Shocked] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填击中[Shock|感电]敌人时额外释放脉冲的弩箭。

Description.en: Fire a burst of projectiles. The projectiles have a small area of damage behind where they impact enemies.
Description.zh: 发射一阵爆发投射物，投射物命中敌人时还会在后方小范围内造成伤害。

Description.en: Fire flaming bolts that fragment in flight, damaging and [Ignite|Igniting] enemies on hit, and in a small cone behind their final target. These fragments can [Merging|Merge].
Description.zh: 发射在飞行时分成碎片的火焰之箭，击中后对最终目标和身后一小片锥形范围内的敌人造成伤害和[Ignite|点燃]。这些碎片可以[Merging|融合]。

ShortDescription.en: Fire flaming bolts that fragment and [Ignite] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射火焰弩箭，分裂并[Ignite|点燃]敌人。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with flaming bolts that fragment in flight, damaging and [Ignite|Igniting] enemies on hit and in a small cone behind their final target. These fragments can [Merging|Merge].
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]在飞行时分成碎片的火焰之箭，击中后对最终目标和身后一小片锥形范围内的敌人造成伤害和[Ignite|点燃]。这些碎片可以[Merging|融合]。

ShortDescription.en: Load flaming bolts that fragment and [Ignite] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填分裂并[Ignite|点燃]敌人的火焰弩箭。

Description.en: Fire [Pierce|Piercing] bolts that fragment in flight. Bolts that hit a [Frozen] enemy [Consume] the [Freeze] and cause an explosion of ice shards. These fragments can [Merging|Merge].
Description.zh: 发射在飞行时分成碎片的[Pierce|穿透]箭矢。箭矢击中[Frozen|被冻结]的敌人时会[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]，并产生冰霜碎片爆炸。这些碎片可以[Merging|融合]。

ShortDescription.en: Fire [Pierce|Piercing] bolts that fragment and explode when hitting [Frozen] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射[Pierce|穿透]弩箭，击中[Frozen|冰冻]敌人时分裂爆炸。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with [Pierce|Piercing] bolts that fragment in flight. Bolts that hit a [Frozen] enemy [Consume] the Freeze and cause an explosion of shrapnel. Bolts that hit an [IceCrystals|Ice Crystal] cause it to explode. These fragments can [Merging|Merge].
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]在飞行时分成碎片的[Pierce|穿透]箭矢。箭矢击中[Frozen|被冻结]的敌人时会[Consume|消耗]冻结，并产生破片爆炸。箭矢击中[IceCrystals|冰晶]也会使其爆炸。这些碎片可以[Merging|融合]。

ShortDescription.en: Load [Pierce|Piercing] bolts that fragment and explode when hitting [Frozen] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填击中[Frozen|冰冻]敌人时分裂爆炸的[Pierce|穿透]弩箭。

Description.en: Fire icy bolts that  fragment in flight, damaging enemies on hit and in a small cone behind their final target. The icy coating on the bolts makes them extremely potent at [Freeze|Freezing] enemies. These fragments can [Merging|Merge].
Description.zh: 发射在飞行时分成碎片的冰箭，击中时对最终目标和身后锥形区域内的敌人造成伤害。箭矢表面的冰霜涂层使其在[Freeze|冻结]敌人方面极其有效。这些碎片可以[Merging|融合]。

ShortDescription.en: Fire icy bolts that fragment and [Freeze] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射冰霜弩箭，分裂并[Freeze|冰冻]敌人。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with icy bolts that fragment in flight, damaging enemies on hit and in a small cone behind their final target. The icy coating on the bolts makes them extremely potent at [Freeze|Freezing] enemies. These fragments can [Merging|Merge].
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]在飞行时分成碎片的冰箭，击中时对最终目标和身后锥形区域内的敌人造成伤害。箭矢表面的冰霜涂层使其在[Freeze|冻结]敌人方面极其有效。这些碎片可以[Merging|融合]。

ShortDescription.en: Load icy bolts that fragment and [Freeze] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填分裂并[Freeze|冰冻]敌人的冰霜弩箭。

Description.en: Rapidly fire charged bolts that fragment in flight, releasing [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] beams when they [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. Can fire a limited number of bursts before needing to reload. These fragments can [Merging|Merge].
Description.zh: 快速发射在飞行时分成碎片的充能弩箭，每次[HitDamage|击中]敌人都会释放出[Chain|连锁][Lightning|闪电]光束。在需要重新装填前，可以发射有限阵数的弩箭。这些碎片可以[Merging|融合]。

ShortDescription.en: Fire charged bolts that fragment and emit [Lightning] beams.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射带电弩箭，分裂并发出[Lightning|闪电]光束。

Description.en: [Ammunition|Load your Crossbow] with charged bolts that fragment in flight, releasing [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] beams when they [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. These fragments can [Merging|Merge].
Description.zh: 为你的战弩[Ammunition|装填]在飞行时分成碎片的充能弩箭，每次[HitDamage|击中]敌人都会释放出[Chain|连锁][Lightning|闪电]光束。这些碎片可以[Merging|融合]。

ShortDescription.en: Load charged bolts that fragment and emit [Lightning] beams.
ShortDescription.zh: 装填分裂并发出[Lightning|闪电]光束的带电弩箭。

Description.en: Perform a fast icy [Strike]. Using this [Attack|Attack] three times in quick succession causes a final strike that is slower and more powerful.
Description.zh: 发起迅猛而冷冽的[Strike|打击]，快速连续使用该[Attack|攻击]三次时，最后一次使用较为缓慢但更为强力。

ShortDescription.en: Attack three times in succession to perform a powerful icy sweep.
ShortDescription.zh: 连续攻击三次以进行强力冰霜横扫。

Description.en: Call down a mass of ice from the sky, dealing high damage at the targeted location. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast. [Consume|Consumes] a [Fire] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to cause a devastating blast of ice and fire.
Description.zh: 从空中降下巨大的冰凌，在目标位置造成高额伤害。向近距离施放会使你在施法时向后跳跃。尽量[Consume|消耗]一次[Fire|火焰][ElementalInfusion|灌注]，造成毁灭性的冰火爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Drop a mass of ice on the target.
ShortDescription.zh: 在目标身上投下大块冰块。

Description.en: Conjure a horrific skull rising from the lightless depths to bite your enemies dealing high damage at target location and leaving [WitheringGround|Withering Ground] in its wake. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast.
Description.zh: 召唤一颗从无光深渊升起的恐怖颅骨，噬咬目标位置的敌人并造成高额伤害，同时在飞行轨迹上留下[WitheringGround|凋零地面]。若以你附近的敌人为目标时，施法时将使你向后跳跃。

ShortDescription.en: Conjure an immense skull from below to attack your enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 从地底召唤一颗巨型颅骨攻击你的敌人。

Description.en: Infuses your melee weapon with electrical energies as you swing. In addition to converting some of your physical damage to lightning damage, the stored energy is released from the weapon as projectiles as you strike, flying out to hit farther-away enemies. The projectiles cannot miss if the melee attack hits a target.
Description.zh: 凝聚闪电之力，将近战武器的部分物理伤害转化为闪电伤害重击敌人。充盈的闪电之力在击中后会穿透并分裂成数道投射物，袭击更远处的敌人。若该近战攻击击中了目标，则后续的闪电投射物无法被躲避。

Description.en: Throws a trap that explodes when triggered, dealing fire damage to surrounding enemies and leaving an area of burning ground that damages enemies who walk through it.
Description.zh: 投掷一个陷阱，该陷阱被触发时会爆炸并对周围的敌人造成火焰伤害，且该区域的地面会持续燃烧，踩在上面的敌人会持续受到伤害。

Description.en: Deploy a [Ballista] [Totem] that rains down a salvo of [Pinned|Pinning], [Maim|Maiming] bolts.
Description.zh: 部署[Ballista|弩炮][Totem|图腾]，降下[Pinned|定身]、[Maim|瘫痪]弩箭齐射。

ShortDescription.en: Deploy a [Ballista] that [Pinned|Pins] and [Maim|Maims].
ShortDescription.zh: 部署一个[Ballista|弩炮]，使敌人[Pinned|定身]并[Maim|瘫痪]。

Description.en: Create a storm of arcane energies that [Empowered|Empowers] your Mana-costing [Spell|Spells] while you remain inside it. Maintaining the storm constantly drains your Mana, and spending more causes it to drain faster. The storm will dissipate when you exit it or run out of Mana.
Description.zh: 召唤一阵秘能风暴，位于其中时[Empowered|强化]你消耗魔力的[Spell|法术]。维持风暴会持续消耗你的魔力，每次施放都会提高消耗速度。离开风暴或耗尽魔力会使其消散。

ShortDescription.en: [Empowered|Empower] your [Spell|Spells] but drain your Mana.
ShortDescription.zh: [Empowered|强化]你的[Spell|法术]，但会吸取你的魔力。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Create a storm of deathly energies that [Empowered|Empowers] your Mana-costing [Spell|Spells] with [Cold] damage while you remain inside it. Maintaining the storm constantly drains your Mana, and spending more causes it to drain faster. As the storm persists it creates slowly expanding [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground]. Enemies that enter the eye of the storm are [Blinded]. When you leave the storm, or run out of Mana, the storm ends and unleashes a death-wave, damaging enemies on the [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground].
Description.zh: 创造一股死亡能量风暴，身处其中时，[Empowered|强化]所有消耗魔力的[Spell|法术]并附加[Cold|冰霜伤害]。维持风暴会持续消耗魔力，魔力消耗越多则消逝速度越快。风暴持续期间将生成缓慢扩张的[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]。进入风暴中心的敌人会被[Blinded|致盲]。当你离开风暴区域或魔力耗尽时，风暴将消散并释放出一道死亡冲击波，对[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]上的敌人造成伤害。

ShortDescription.en: [DNT-UNUSED] [Empowered|Empowers] your [Spell|Spells] and creates expanding [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground], but drains your Mana.
ShortDescription.zh: [Empowered|强化]你的[Spell|法术]，生成扩张的[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]，但会耗尽你的魔力。

Description.en: While active, conjures an icy barrier that gains stages over time. While the barrier has stages, [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] that hit you will remove a stage to cause a burst of ice that deals [Cold] [Spell] damage to the attacker.
Description.zh: 激活时召唤冰霜屏障，冰霜屏障会累积层数。当屏障具有层数时，击中你的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]会移除一层屏障，产生一阵冰爆，对攻击者造成[Cold|冰霜][Spell|法术]伤害。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] While you channel this skill, it releases pulses of electrical energy, dealing lightning damage.
Description.zh: [DNT-未使用] 吟唱该技能时，释放出多股电能脉冲，造成闪电伤害。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to [ESRecharge|Recharge Energy Shield] and allow that [ESRecharge|Recharge] to [Overflow|Overflow]. [Channelling] ends when you take damage or your [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] is fully [Overflow|Overflowed].
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]为[ESRecharge|能量护盾充能]，可使你的[EnergyShield|能量护盾][Overflow|溢出]上限。当你受到伤害或你的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]达到完全[Overflow|溢出]时，[Channelling|吟唱]结束。

ShortDescription.en: Channel to [ESRecharge|Recharge] and [Overflow] your [EnergyShield|Energy Shield].
ShortDescription.zh: 吟唱以[ESRecharge|充能][EnergyShield|能量护盾]并使其[Overflow|溢出]。

Description.en: Dash to an enemy and [Strike] them, [CullingStrike|Culling] enemies if their life is low enough and performing additional dashing [Strike|Strikes] to other [CullingStrike|Cullable] targets in range if your target was [CullingStrike|Culled]. Each enemy killed by this strike grants a [Charges|Power Charge], with higher [Rarity] monsters granting additional [Charges]. Enemies around you that can be [CullingStrike|Culled] will be highlighted.
Description.zh: 冲向一名敌人并发起[Strike|打击]，[CullingStrike|终结]生命值足够低的敌人。若目标被[CullingStrike|终结]，将对范围内其他可[CullingStrike|终结]的目标发动额外的冲刺[Strike|打击]。每次以此技能终结敌人可获得一个[Charges|暴击球]，击败高[Rarity|稀有度]的怪物可以获得额外[Charges|能量球]。周围可以被[CullingStrike|终结]的敌人会被高亮显示。

ShortDescription.en: Dash to an enemy and kill near-death enemies instantly to gain a [Charges|Power Charge].
ShortDescription.zh: 冲向敌人并立即击败濒死敌人，并获得一个[Charges|暴击球]。

Description.en: Suffuse your [Quarterstaff|Quarterstaff] with electrical energy, then [Slam] the ground to deal damage in a large cone in front of you. Consumes your [Charges|Power Charges] to fire [Lightning|Lightning] [Projectile|Projectiles] forwards from the impact.
Description.zh: 为你的[Quarterstaff|节杖]注入雷电之能，随后[Slam|猛击]地面，在你前方大片锥形范围内造成伤害。消耗你拥有的[Charges|暴击球]，从冲击点向前发射[Lightning|闪电][Projectile|投射物]。

ShortDescription.en: [Slam] the ground and Consume [Charges|Power Charges] to fire [Lightning] bolts forward.
ShortDescription.zh: [Slam|猛击]地面，消耗[Charges|暴击球]以向前方发射[Lightning|闪电]光束。

Description.en: Uplift a volcano from the earth, damaging enemies standing on it and releasing a spray of molten [Projectile|Projectiles]. While the volcano persists, [Slam|Slamming] it will cause another [Projectile] spray. [Channelling] this Skill for longer makes the initial eruption more violent, but does not affect subsequent [Projectile] sprays.
Description.zh: 从大地中拔起一座火山，对站在上方的敌人造成伤害并喷发大量炽热[Projectile|投射物]。火山存续期间，遭受[Slam|猛击]会再次喷发[Projectile|投射物]。[Channelling|引导]此技能的时间越长，初始喷发越猛烈，但不会影响后续的[Projectile|投射物]喷发。

ShortDescription.en: Uplift a volcano that sprays molten [Projectile|Projectiles].
ShortDescription.zh: 拔起一座会喷发[Projectile|投射物]的火山。

Description.en: Activate to summon a pack of Wolf [Companion|Companions]. The pack treated as a single [Companion] for effects that count or limit [Companion|Companions], regardless of the number of Wolves in the pack.
Description.zh: 激活后召唤一组狼群[Companion|伙伴]。无论召唤的狼群中有多少只狼，该狼群在涉及计数或限制[Companion|伙伴]的效果中，均被视作一个[Companion|伙伴]单位。

Description.en: Activate to summon a cackle of Hyena [Companion|Companions]. The cackle is treated as a single [Companion] for effects that count or limit [Companion|Companions], regardless of the number of Hyenas in the cackle. Hyenas whoop when they first appear, [Hinder|Hindering] nearby enemies, and have a chance to [Maim] enemies they [HitDamage|Hit].
Description.zh: 激活以召唤一群鬣狗[Companion|伙伴]。无论群中鬣狗数量多少，该群体在涉及计数或限制[Companion|伙伴]的效果中，均被视作一个[Companion|伙伴]单位。鬣狗在首次出现时会发出尖啸，使附近的敌人[Hinder|缓速]，并且其[HitDamage|击中]有一定几率使敌人[Maim|瘫痪]。

Description.en: Dash to an enemy and [Strike] them with an [Attack|Attack] that manifests a wave of cold, coating nearby enemies in shards of ice. Dealing enough damage to these enemies will shatter the shards, causing an icy explosion that deals [Attack] damage.
Description.zh: 冲向一名敌人并以[Attack|攻击]发起[Strike|打击]，释放一股寒流，将附近的敌人包裹在冰霜碎片中。对这些敌人造成足量伤害后会击碎这些碎片，产生冰爆，造成[Attack|攻击]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Dash to an enemy and cover enemies in shards of ice, which will explode when they take enough damage.
ShortDescription.zh: 冲向敌人并用冰霜碎片覆盖敌人，当他们受到足量伤害时爆炸。

Description.en: Load your [Bow] with a volley of enchanted arrows and fire them in a circle as you spin forward, firing directly at targets if possible. Consumes [Charges|Frenzy Charges] to cause the arrows to deal more damage and [Chain] to other targets. Each target can only be [HitDamage|Hit] once.
Description.zh: 为你的[Bow|弓类]武器搭上一束附魔箭矢，在你向前飞身旋转的时候以环形射出，并尽量径直飞向目标。消耗[Charges|狂怒球]会使箭矢造成更高的伤害，并[Chain|连锁]至其他目标。每个目标只能被[HitDamage|击中]一次。

ShortDescription.en: Spin and fire a volley of arrows that [Chain] on Consuming [Charges|Frenzy Charges].
ShortDescription.zh: 旋转并发射一轮箭矢，消耗[Charges|狂怒球]时施加[Chain|连锁]效果。

Description.en: Attacks with your weapon, inflicting a debuff on enemies hit by the strike. If a debuffed enemy dies while poisoned, Pestilent Strike inflicts a secondary chaos damage over time debuff on enemies around them, based on the poisons on the slain enemy. This damage is not affected by your damage modifiers.
Description.zh: 用武器发动攻击，击中给敌人施加一个减益效果。一旦具有该减益效果的敌人中毒时被击败，致疫打击就会给它周围的敌人施加第二重减益效果，基于被击败的敌人身上的中毒效果造成混沌持续伤害。该伤害不受伤害词缀影响。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Bear] and rake enemies with your claws, generating [Rage] on [HitDamage|Hit].
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为一头[Bear|巨熊]，用利爪肆意横扫。[HitDamage|击中]敌人时产生[Rage|怒火]。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Bear] and rake enemies with your claws, generating [Rage] on [HitDamage|Hit].
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为一头[Bear|巨熊]，用利爪肆意横扫。[HitDamage|击中]敌人时产生[Rage|怒火]。

Description.en: Make path. Slide on path. Movement skill cancel slide. Cast any other skill while sliding.
Description.zh: 铺开一条道路，可在道路上滑行。移动技能会取消滑行，滑行时可时施放已其他技能。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and leap to a target location, damaging enemies in an area around where you land. Predator's Mark will be [Trigger|Triggered] targeting the highest [Rarity] enemy [HitDamage|Hit], or if a [Mark] gem is socketed into this Skill, that [Mark] will be [Trigger|Triggered] instead. Using this Skill allows any Wolf [Minion|Minions] you have to leap immediately.
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，并跃向目标地点，对落点范围内的敌人造成伤害。此技能将[Trigger|触发]掠食者印记，并以所[HitDamage|击中]敌人中[Rarity|稀有度]最高的敌人为目标；若此技能中镶嵌了[Mark|印记]类宝石，则将改为[Trigger|触发]该[Mark|印记]。使用此技能将使你拥有的所有狼类[Minion|召唤生物]立即进行跳跃。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and leap to a target location.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，并跃向目标地点。

Description.en: Call down a [Shock|Shocking] bolt of [Lightning] to strike enemies in a small area.
Description.zh: 召唤一道能够造成[Shock|感电]的[Lightning|闪电]，打击小范围内的敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Call down a [Shock|Shocking] bolt of [Lightning] to strike enemies in a small area.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一道能够造成[Shock|感电]的[Lightning|闪电]，打击小范围内的敌人。

Description.en: Call down a [Shock|Shocking] bolt of [Lightning] to strike enemies in a small area.
Description.zh: 召唤一道能够造成[Shock|感电]的[Lightning|闪电]，打击小范围内的敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Call down a [Shock|Shocking] bolt of [Lightning] to strike enemies in a small area.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一道能够造成[Shock|感电]的[Lightning|闪电]，打击小范围内的敌人。

Description.en: Strike your foes down with a powerful blow.
Description.zh: 对你的敌人无情痛击。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Bear] and charge forward, [Slam|Slamming] the ground as you run. [Channelling] ends after a short amount of time but can be prolonged by spending [Rage].
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Bear|巨熊]并向前方横冲直撞，在奔行时[Slam|猛击]地面。[Channelling|持续吟唱]会在短时间内结束，但可通过消耗[Rage|怒火]延长持续时间。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Bear] and charge forward, [Slam|Slamming] the ground as you run.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为一头[Bear|巨熊]并向前方横冲直撞，在奔行时[Slam|猛击]地面。

Description.en: Hurl your [Spear] with force. Consumes a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] if you have one to cause the [Spear] to explode at the end of its flight.
Description.zh: 大力掷出[Spear|战矛]。尽量消耗一个[Charges|狂怒球]，使[Spear|战矛]结束飞行时爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Hurl your [Spear], exploding if you Consume a [Charges|Frenzy Charge].
ShortDescription.zh: 投掷你的[Spear|战矛]，若消耗了一个[Charges|狂怒球]则产生爆炸。

Description.en: Augment yourself with temporal magic for a short duration, [Empowered|Empowering] the next [Repeat|Repeatable] [Spell] you cast to [Repeat|Repeat] multiple times. Cannot [Empowered|Empower] Skills with a Cooldown.
Description.zh: 在短时间内为用时间魔法强化自身，[Empowered|强化]你施放下一个[Repeat|可重复][Spell|法术]，使其[Repeat|重复]施放多次。无法[Empowered|强化]具有冷却时间的技能。

ShortDescription.en: [Empowered|Empower] the next [Spell] you cast to [Repeat|Repeat] multiple times.
ShortDescription.zh: [Empowered|强化]你施放下一个[Spell|法术]，使其[Repeat|重复]施放多次。

Description.en: Conjure a thunderstorm which causes lightning strikes and torrential rain in an area. Enemies in the area are Drenched, causing them to become [Shock|Shocked] or [Frozen] more easily. [Plant|Plants] in the area become [Plant|Overgrown].
Description.zh: 召唤雷霆风暴，引发闪电与暴雨。区域内的敌人将被浸湿，更容易[Shock|感电]或[Frozen|冻结]。区域内的[Plant|植物]则会进入[Plant|蔓生]状态。

ShortDescription.en: Conjure a thunderstorm which causes lightning strikes and torrential rain.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤雷霆风暴，引发闪电与暴雨。

Description.en: The enemy's [Corpse|Corpse] violently explodes, dealing [Fire|Fire] damage in an area around it.
Description.zh: 敌人的[Corpse|灵柩]剧烈爆炸，对周围造成[Fire|火焰]伤害。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Bear] and [Slam] the ground with great force, causing a pair of shockwaves. Can spend [Rage] to create larger shockwaves that leave behind [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground].
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Bear|巨熊]并猛力[Slam|猛击]地面，引发两道震波。可消耗[Rage|怒火]制造更大的震波，并留下[JaggedGround|崎岖之地]。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Bear] and [Slam] the ground, consuming [Rage] for a larger [Slam].
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Bear|巨熊]并[Slam|猛击]地面，消耗[Rage|怒火]制造更重的[Slam|猛击]。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Bear] and roar in defiance, immediately gaining [Rage] if there are enemies nearby and [Empowered|Empowering] subsequent [Attack|Attacks] to [ArmourBreak|Break Armour]. Alternatively, socketing a human-form [Warcry] into this Skill triggers that [Warcry] instead, and augments its damage and area. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an [Charges|Endurance Charge].
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Bear|巨熊]，发出挑衅咆哮。若周围有敌人则立即获得[Rage|怒火]，并[Empowered|强化]后续[Attack|攻击]，从而使敌人[ArmourBreak|粉碎护甲]。作为替代，若将人类形态的[Warcry|战吼]技能镶嵌于此技能槽中，则会触发该[Warcry|战吼]并扩大造成的伤害及其范围。消耗一个[Charges|耐力球]可以跳过此技能的冷却时间。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Bear] and roar, gaining [Rage] and [Empowered|Empowering] [Attack|Attacks] to [ArmourBreak|Break Armour]
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Bear|巨熊]，发出咆哮。获得[Rage|怒火]，并[Empowered|强化][Attack|攻击]，从而使敌人[ArmourBreak|粉碎护甲]。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [Shock|Shock] enemies and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你令敌人[Shock|感电]时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的法术。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [Freeze] enemies and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你令敌人[Freeze|冻结]时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的法术。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [Ignite] enemies and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你[Ignite|点燃]敌人时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的法术。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [Freeze], [Shock], or [Ignite] enemies, and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你令敌人[Freeze|冻结]、[Shock|感电]或[Ignite|点燃]时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的法术。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you kill enemies with [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你使用[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]击败敌人时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的法术。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you are [Stun|Stunned] and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你被[Stun|晕眩]时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的法术。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you take damage and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你受到伤害时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的法术。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [Critical|Critically Hit] enemies and triggers socketed [Spell|Spells] on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你对敌人造成[Critical|暴击]时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的[Spell|法术]。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when your [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] is damaged by Enemy [HitDamage|Hits]. Using the Invocation once sufficient [Energy|Energy] is gathered will consume the [Energy|Energy] to trigger socketed [Spell|Spells], and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough [Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]受到敌人[HitDamage|击中]伤害时获得[Energy|能量]。积累一定的[Energy|能量]后使用该咒祈，即可消耗[Energy|能量]并触发镶嵌的[Spell|法术]。[Energy|能量]足够时可以多次触发。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you dodge roll and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你闪避翻滚时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的法术。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] while you're channelling a skill and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你持续吟唱一个技能时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的法术。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [Stun] enemies with [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你使用[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]令敌人[Stun|晕眩]时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的法术。

Description.en: While active, creates a short-lived illusory copy of yourself whenever you dodge roll. The copy can be damaged by enemies, and copies that are destroyed by an enemy will drop a [Remnant] that grants you a [Charges|Power Charge] on pickup.
Description.zh: 激活时，每当你进行闪避翻滚，就会产生一个短暂持续的自身复制体。复制体可被敌人伤害，被敌人摧毁的复制体会掉落一个[Remnant|残片]，使你获得一个[Charges|暴击球]。

Description.en: While active, creates a short-lived illusory copy of yourself whenever you dodge roll. The copy can be damaged by enemies, and copies that are destroyed by an enemy will cause damaging explosions. Copies created this way have 1 Life.
Description.zh: 激活时，每当你进行闪避翻滚，就会产生一个短暂持续的自身复制体。复制体可被敌人伤害，被敌人摧毁的复制体会产生伤害性爆炸。以此方式产生的复制体只有一点生命。

Description.en: While active, causes you to periodically gain Ghost Shrouds. If you are [HitDamage|Hit] while you have a Ghost Shroud, it is immediately consumed to recover [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] based on your [Evasion].
Description.zh: 激活时，你会周期性获得鬼影缠身。如果你在具有鬼影缠身时被[HitDamage|击中]，则会立即将其消耗，并根据你的[Evasion|闪避]回复[EnergyShield|能量护盾]。

Description.en: Capture the spirit of a defeated monster, transforming this gem to instead allow you to summon the monster's ghost as a [Reviving] [Minion|Minion].
Description.zh: 捕获一个被击败的怪物的灵魂，改变该宝石以使你能够将怪物的鬼魂召唤为[Reviving|复活][Minion|召唤生物]。

Description.en: Gain Stealth after not using Skills or being Hit for a short time.
Description.zh: 在短时间内未使用技能或被击中即可获得潜行。

Description.en: Clear your active Bolt and reload any ammunition.
Description.zh: 清除激活的弩箭并装填弹药。

Description.en: Summon a [Reviving] Companion to aid you in combat. The Mercenary will use socketed [Attack|Attacks], and can be given equipment in the Skills Panel.
Description.zh: 召唤一名[Reviving|可复活的]同伴协助作战。佣兵可以使用镶嵌的[Attack|攻击]，可以在技能面板中给予装备。

Description.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that unleashes a devastating fiery blast when its fuse expires.
Description.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时，释放出毁灭性的炽烈爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that explodes when its fuse expires.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时爆炸。

Description.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that unleashes a devastating fiery blast when its fuse expires.
Description.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时，释放出毁灭性的炽烈爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that explodes when its fuse expires.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时爆炸。

Description.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that unleashes a [Blind|Blinding], [Stun|Stunning] explosion when its fuse expires.
Description.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时，释放导致[Blind|致盲]和[Stun|晕眩]的炽烈爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that [Stun|Stuns] and [Blind|Blinds] when its fuse expires.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时爆炸，并造成[Stun|晕眩]和[Blind|致盲]。

Description.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that causes a burst of [Poison|Poison] gas when its fuse expires, damaging enemies and leaving behind a growing [Poison|Poison] cloud. [Burning] effects or [Detonator|Detonator] skills will cause the cloud to explode in a fiery blast.
Description.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时，产生一阵[Poison|毒]气，对敌人造成伤害，并在身后留下弥漫的[Poison|毒]云。[Burning|燃烧]效果或[Detonator|引爆]技能会使毒云爆炸，并产生炽焰冲击。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that releases [Poison] gas when its fuse expires.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时爆炸，并释放[Poison|剧毒]云雾。

Description.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that bursts in a spray of [Oil] when the fuse expires or when it impacts an Enemy, dealing minimal damage but covering the [OilGround|ground] and nearby enemies in [Oil]. Oil created this way can be [Ignite|Ignited] by [Detonator] Skills or [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground].
Description.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽或击中敌人时喷射出一滩[Oil|黏油]，造成少量伤害，并使[OilGround|地面]和附近的敌人沾满[Oil|黏油]。以这种方式产生的黏油可以被[Detonator|引爆]技能或[IgnitedGround|点燃地面][Ignite|点燃]。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that sprays [Oil] when its fuse expires.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时爆炸，并喷洒[Oil|黏油]。

Description.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that bursts in a spray of [Oil] when the fuse expires or when it impacts an Enemy, dealing minimal damage but covering the [OilGround|ground] and nearby enemies in [Oil]. Oil created this way can be [Ignite|Ignited] by [Detonator] Skills or [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground].
Description.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽或击中敌人时喷射出一滩[Oil|黏油]，造成少量伤害，并使[OilGround|地面]和附近的敌人沾满[Oil|黏油]。以这种方式产生的黏油可以被[Detonator|引爆]技能或[IgnitedGround|点燃地面][Ignite|点燃]。

Description.en: Attacks with a bouncing bomb that explodes on hit.
Description.zh: 以弹跳的炸弹发起攻击，击中时产生爆炸。

Description.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that discharges an [Electrocute|Electrocuting] [Lightning] blast when its fuse expires, causing all [Lightning] [HitDamage|Hits] against enemies to contribute to [Electrocute|Electrocution] buildup for a duration.
Description.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时释放出[Electrocute|触电][Lightning|闪电]爆炸，使所有对敌人的[Lightning|闪电][HitDamage|击中]在一段时间内作用于[Electrocute|触电]积蓄。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that [Electrocute|Electrocutes] enemies when its fuse expires and causes [Lightning] [HitDamage|Hits] to contribute to [Electrocute|Electrocution].
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时[Electrocute|触电]敌人并使[Lightning|闪电][HitDamage|击中]作用于[Electrocute|触电]积蓄。

Description.en: Revive a fallen Skeleton
Description.zh: 复活一个陨落的魔侍

Description.en: Skewer a Skeleton on a bone spike to send nearby [Minion|Minions] into a frenzy as long as the spike remains, making their skills faster and harder hitting.  The bone spike is itself a [Minion]. If it dies, the effect ends immediately.
