Description.zh: 将一个魔侍穿刺在骨刺上，使附近的[Minion|召唤生物]陷入狂乱，只要尖刺存在，就会使他们可以更快地使用技能，并造成更高的伤害。尖刺为[Minion|召唤生物]。一旦尖刺被击败，该效果会立刻消失。

ShortDescription.en: Sacrifice a Skeleton to grant your [Minion|Minions]' skills speed and damage.
ShortDescription.zh: 牺牲一个魔侍，为[Minion|召唤生物]提供技能速度和伤害。

Description.en: A [Slam|Slam] that causes [Aftershock|Aftershocks] when hitting an [Immobilised|Immobilised] enemy.
Description.zh: 一次[Slam|猛击]，击中[Immobilised|不可移动]的敌人时会引发[Aftershock|余震]。

Description.en: Enrage all Skeletal Reavers, causing them to lose life over time and gain [Rage|Rage] on hit.
Description.zh: 所有魔侍掠夺者陷入狂暴，逐渐失去生命，并在击中时获得[Rage|怒火]。

ShortDescription.en: Enrage your Skeletal Reavers at the cost of accelerating life loss.
ShortDescription.zh: 激怒你的魔侍掠夺者，但其会以越来越快的速度损失生命。

Description.en: Rain an arrow down from above, creating a cloud of flammable [Poison|poisonous] gas where it lands. The cloud will detonate if hit by a [Detonator] skill or if an [Ignite|Ignited] enemy touches it, creating a fiery explosion.
Description.zh: 从空中降下一支箭矢，在落点产生一团可燃的[Poison|剧毒]瓦斯云雾。如果云雾被[Detonator|引爆]技能击中或受到[Ignite|点燃]的敌人触碰，云雾会被引爆，产生强烈的爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Command a Skeletal Sniper to fire an arrow that releases [Poison|Poisonous] gas.
ShortDescription.zh: 命令魔侍神射手发射释放[Poison|剧毒]云雾的箭矢。

Description.en: The Azmerian Wolf howls, reaching out to the spirits to begin an Eternal Hunt. While the Eternal Hunt persists, spirits manifest as spectral wolves to ambush foes, damaging and [Maim|Maiming] enemies they [HitDamage|Hit] before disappearing.
Description.zh: 阿兹莫里巨狼发出嚎叫，向万灵发出呼唤，开启永恒狩猎。在永恒狩猎持续期间，万灵会显现为幽灵狼伏击敌人，对它们[HitDamage|击中]的敌人造成伤害并施加[Maim|瘫痪]，随后消失。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] the Azmerian Wolf to begin an Eternal Hunt.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]你的阿兹莫里巨狼开启永恒狩猎。

Description.en: Lightning bolts strike all fallen Skeletons in the area, creating [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground] around them.
Description.zh: 闪电劈向范围内所有陨落的魔侍，在其周围产生[ShockedGround|感电地面]。

ShortDescription.en: Command a Skeletal Storm Mage to cause [Lightning] bolts around your dead skeletons.
ShortDescription.zh: 命令魔侍风暴法师在你被击败的魔侍周围造成[Lightning|闪电]光束。

Description.en: Detonate an allied [Minion] whose current Life is below a threshold, dealing heavy [Attack] damage to nearby enemies.
Description.zh: 引爆一个当前生命低于一定阈值的友方[Minion|召唤生物]，对周围的敌人造成高额[Attack|攻击]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Command a Skeletal Arsonist to detonate one of your minions.
ShortDescription.zh: 命令魔侍焚焰使引爆你的一个召唤生物。

Description.en: Command Navira to bolster your [EnergyShield|Energy Shield], causing it to begin [ESRecharge|Recharging] immediately and granting you increased [ESRechargeRate|Energy Shield Recharge Rate] for a duration.
Description.zh: 命令纳薇拉强化你的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]，使其立即开始[ESRecharge|充能]，并在持续期间提升你的[ESRechargeRate|能量护盾充能速度]。

ShortDescription.en: Command Navira to cause your [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] to begin [ESRecharge|Recharging] immediately.
ShortDescription.zh: 命令纳薇拉，使你的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]立即开始[ESRecharge|充能]。

Description.en: When you [Command] Navira to use a Skill, she also emits a restorative wave that grants you and any other [Allies] it touches increased Mana Regeneration for a short duration.
Description.zh: 当你[Command|命令]纳薇拉使用技能时，她同时会释放一道恢复波纹，使波及到的你及其他[Allies|友军]在短时间内获得魔力回复提升。

Description.en: Perform a series of aggressive [Strike|Strikes]. When used in quick succession, the third use [Strike|Strikes] three times, and the fourth use performs a [FinalStrike|Final Strike] that calls down a powerful [Shock|Shocking] bolt.
Description.zh: 发起一连串凶狠的[Strike|打击]。连续使用时，第三次使用会[Strike|打击]三次，第四次使用会发动[FinalStrike|绝杀打击]，劈下一道强力的[Shock|感电]霹雳。

ShortDescription.en: [Strike] with [Lightning], becoming more powerful each successive use.
ShortDescription.zh: 使用[Lightning|闪电]进行[Strike|打击]，每次连续使用都会提高伤害。

Description.en: Dash to an enemy and [Strike] them, instantly [HeavyStun|Heavily Stunning] enemies which are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun] and performing additional dashing [Strike|Strikes] to other [PrimedStun|Primed] targets in range if your first target was [HeavyStun|Stunned]. [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunning] an enemy with this Skill grants you a [Buff] that causes your [Quarterstaff] [Attack|Attacks] to also fire [Projectile|Projectiles] for a short duration. [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunning] additional enemies adds to the [Buff]'s duration.
Description.zh: 冲向一名敌人并发起[Strike|打击]，立即[HeavyStun|重度晕眩][PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的敌人。若首个目标[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]，则会对范围内其他[PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的目标发动额外的冲刺[Strike|打击]。使用该技能令敌人[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]会使你获得[Buff|增益状态]，在短时间内令你的[Quarterstaff|节杖][Attack|攻击]额外发射[Projectile|投射物]。使更多敌人[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]会额外增加[Buff|增益状态]的持续时间。

ShortDescription.en: Dash to an enemy, causing wind blasts from your other attacks if this [HeavyStun|Heavy Stuns].
ShortDescription.zh: 冲向敌人，造成[HeavyStun|重度昏迷]时使你的其他攻击造成迅风爆。

Description.en: Consume all [Charges|Power Charges] to charge your [Quarterstaff|Quarterstaff] with electricity, adding [Lightning|Lightning] damage and a [Lightning|Lightning] shockwave to your [Quarterstaff|Quarterstaff] [Attack|Attacks]. Reusing this skill while the [Buff] is active adds to the [Buff]'s duration and damage.
Description.zh: 消耗所有[Charges|暴击球]，为[Quarterstaff|节杖]注入雷电之能，使你的[Quarterstaff|节杖][Attack|攻击]附加[Lightning|闪电]伤害和一道[Lightning|闪电]震波。[Buff|增益状态]激活时，重复使用该技能可获得增加[Buff|增益状态]的持续时间和伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Consume all [Charges|Power Charges] to infuse your [Quarterstaff|Quarterstaff] with electricity.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗所有[Charges|暴击球]，为你的[Quarterstaff|节杖]灌注电力。

Description.en: Dash to a target and [Strike|Strike] them with your [Quarterstaff|Quarterstaff]. If the target is [Shock|Shocked], [Consume] their [Shock|Shock] to release a [Lightning|Lightning] shockwave around the target and grant you a [Charges|Power Charge]. This skill cannot be [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosted].
Description.zh: 冲向一个目标，并以[Quarterstaff|节杖]发起[Strike|打击]。如果目标[Shock|感电]，则会[Consume|消耗][Shock|感电]，在目标周围释放一道[Lightning|闪电]震波，并使你获得一个[Charges|暴击球]。该技能无法获得[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]。

ShortDescription.en: Dash to a target, gaining a [Charges|Power Charge] and releasing a shockwave if the target is [Shock|Shocked].
ShortDescription.zh: 冲向目标，若目标受到[Shock|感电]影响则获得[Charges|暴击球]并释放冲击波。

Description.en: Build [Combo|Combo] by successfully [Strike|Striking] Enemies with other skills. After reaching maximum [Combo|Combo], use this skill to cause the Bell on your staff to grow to massive size as you drop it on the ground. The Bell damages enemies on impact and can be [HitDamage|Hit] by your skills, creating a damaging shockwave. [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] applied to the Bell cause its shockwaves to deal extra damage of the corresponding type, and [HitDamage|Hits] which would have caused [Knockback] increase the area of effect of the shockwaves.
Description.zh: 成功使用其他技能[Strike|打击]敌人可以积累[Combo|连击]。达到[Combo|连击]上限后，使用此技能可使长杖上的风雷钟变得巨大并掉落在地。风雷钟会对击中的敌人造成伤害，并可被你的技能[HitDamage|击中]，产生伤害性震波。对风雷钟施加[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]会使风雷钟的震波额外造成对应类型的伤害，原本能够造成[Knockback|击退]的[HitDamage|击中]会扩大震波的效果范围。

ShortDescription.en: Build [Combo] to place a resonating Bell that damages enemies when [HitDamage|Hit].
ShortDescription.zh: 累积[Combo|连击]以放置共鸣钟，被[HitDamage|击中]时伤害敌人。

Description.en: Direct your permanent minions to attack a target or move to a location.
Description.zh: 指示你的永久召唤生物攻击一个目标，或移动到一个位置。

ShortDescription.en: Direct your permanent minions to attack a target or move to a location.
ShortDescription.zh: 指示你的永久召唤生物攻击一个目标，或移动到一个位置。

Description.en: Leap backward and crack the ground with your staff to call forth an [IceCrystals|Ice Crystal] which can be damaged by you and enemies. If the [IceCrystals|Crystal] is destroyed it causes an icy explosion. This skill can be used while using other skills.
Description.zh: 向后腾跃并持杖击碎地面，召唤一簇[IceCrystals|冰晶]，它可以被你和敌人破坏。[IceCrystals|冰晶]被摧毁时产生寒冰爆炸。该技能可以在使用其他技能时使用。

ShortDescription.en: Leap backwards and create a [Chill|Chilling], damageable [IceCrystals|Ice Crystal].
ShortDescription.zh: 向后跃起并产生一个施加[Chill|冰缓]的可破坏[IceCrystals|冰晶]。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to conjure a swarm of bone spikes in the air, then release to fire them at enemies and explode. Shrapnel [Impale|Impales] enemies [HitDamage|Hit], causing subsequent [Attack] [HitDamage|Hits] against those targets to deal extra damage. Consumes your [Charges|Power Charges] to cause much larger explosions.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]，召唤一阵悬浮的尖刺，随后将其射向敌人并爆炸。碎片[Impale|穿刺]被[HitDamage|击中]的敌人，使后续[Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]这些目标时造成额外伤害。消耗你的[Charges|暴击球]会扩大爆炸范围。

ShortDescription.en: Conjure a swarm of bone spikes then release to fire them.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤一阵尖刺然后释放发射。

Description.en: Raise a ring of bone spikes around you. The spikes are destroyed when enemies touch them, damaging and [Pinned|Pinning] those enemies. Raising a new ring of spikes destroys the previous one.
Description.zh: 在你的周围升起一圈尖刺，当敌人触及时会被摧毁，对敌人造成伤害和[Pinned|定身]。生成新的一圈尖刺时，旧的将立即消散。

ShortDescription.en: Raise damaging bone spikes around you.
ShortDescription.zh: 在你周围竖起造成伤害的尖刺。

Description.en: Consume [Corpse|Corpses] in an area
Description.zh: 消耗范围内的[Corpse|灵柩]

Description.en: Raise spikes of bone from the earth in front of you, damaging enemies. The bones of [Corpse|Corpses] and dead [Reviving] [Minion|Minions] in the area are ripped out and reassembled into short-lived Bone Construct [Minion|Minions] that fight for you. Larger [Corpse|Corpses] create more than one Bone Construct.
Description.zh: 从前方的地面中升起骨刺，对敌人造成伤害。区域内的[Corpse|灵柩]和被击败的[Reviving|可复活][Minion|召唤生物]将被剥离，并重组成短命的构造体[Minion|召唤生物]为你而战。更大的[Corpse|灵柩]会产生多个构造体。

ShortDescription.en: Raise a cone of bone spikes and convert [Corpse|Corpses] into [Minion|Minions].
ShortDescription.zh: 竖起锥形尖刺并将[Corpse|灵柩]转化为[Minion|召唤生物]。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to charge up before firing off a burning arrow. At maximum stages, the arrow will create a [Detonator|Detonating] explosion at the end of its flight.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]积蓄力量，随后发射一支燃烧箭矢。达到最大层数时，箭矢会在飞行结束时[Detonator|引爆]。

ShortDescription.en: Charge up a fire arrow that explodes if fully charged.
ShortDescription.zh: 蓄力一发火焰箭矢，若完全蓄力则爆炸。

Description.en: Fire a virulent arrow that creates a burst of [Poison|Poison] on hit, affecting all enemies in an area.
Description.zh: 射出一支毒素箭矢，击中时产生[Poison|毒素]爆发，影响范围内的所有敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Fire an arrow that [Poison|Poisons] enemies in an area on hit.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射箭矢，击中时对区域内敌人施加[Poison|中毒]。

Description.en: Fire a rain of Toxic Pustules into the air. The Pustules deal damage on impact, then [DetonationTime|Detonate] after a delay. They can also be [Poison|Poisoned], causing them to [DetonationTime|Detonate] faster and more violently.
Description.zh: 向空中发射剧毒芽孢雨。芽孢在击中时造成伤害，短暂延迟后[DetonationTime|引爆]，可以对其施加[Poison|中毒]，使[DetonationTime|引爆]更为迅速猛烈。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a hail of explosive [Poison|Poisonous] Pustules into the air.
ShortDescription.zh: 向空中发射可爆炸的[Poison|剧毒]芽孢雨。

Description.en: Fire an arrow that embeds where it lands for a short duration. At the end of the duration, a [Lightning] Bolt strikes the arrow, disintegrating it and damaging enemies, with a high chance to [Shock]. [Shock|Shocking] any enemy with the Bolt also applies [Shock] to all enemies near the impact.
Description.zh: 发射一支箭矢并嵌入落点一段时间。在持续时间结束时，一道[Lightning|闪电]劈向箭矢，将其击碎并对敌人造成伤害，有较高几率造成[Shock|感电]。箭矢对敌人施加[Shock|感电]时也会对命中处附近的所有敌人施加[Shock|感电]。

ShortDescription.en: Fire an arrow that calls down a lightning bolt after a delay.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射箭矢，延迟一段时间后召唤闪电。

Description.en: Fires an arrow that embeds where it lands for a short duration. At the end of the duration, the arrow explodes in spectral flame, turning it to ashes and damaging enemies, with a high chance to [Ignite]. [Ignite|Igniting] any enemy with the Explosion also applies [Ignite] to enemies within range.
Description.zh: 发射一支箭矢并嵌入落点一段时间。在持续时间结束时，箭矢以灵体烈焰形式爆炸，化为灰烬并对敌人造成伤害，有较高几率造成[Ignite|点燃]。爆炸对敌人施加[Ignite|点燃]时也会对命中处范围内的敌人施加[Ignite|点燃]。

ShortDescription.en: Fires an arrow that releases a burning explosion after a delay.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一支箭矢，延迟一段时间后释放燃烧爆炸。

Description.en: Fire an arrow that drops from above, creating a [Lightning|Lightning] burst. The arrow remains in the ground, and any [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning|Lightning] beams can [Chain|Chain] to it. When [Chain|Chained] to, the arrows charge up for a brief period before releasing another [Lightning|Lightning] burst. The Lightning Arrow Skill reduces this delay, causing bursts to happen more quickly.
Description.zh: 发射一支从上方落下的箭矢，产生[Lightning|闪电]爆发。箭矢会留在地面，任何[Chain|连锁][Lightning|闪电]光束都可以与它[Chain|连锁]。[Chain|连锁]时，箭矢会短暂蓄力，随后会再释放一次[Lightning|闪电]爆发。闪电箭矢技能会缩短延迟，使其更快爆发。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a [Lightning] rod into the ground, attracting [Lightning] beams to cause bursts of damage.
ShortDescription.zh: 向地面发射一根[Lightning|引雷针]，吸引[Lightning|闪电]光束并造成爆发伤害。

Description.en: Fire a noxious arrow at the ground, creating a cloud of flammable poisonous gas at the end of its flight. The cloud will detonate if hit by a [Detonator] skill or if an [Ignite|Ignited] enemy touches it, creating a fiery explosion.
Description.zh: 向地面发射一支有毒的箭矢，在飞行结束时产生一团可燃的剧毒瓦斯云雾。如果云雾被[Detonator|引爆]技能击中或受到[Ignite|点燃]的敌人触碰，云雾会被引爆，产生强烈的爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Fire an arrow that releases a [Poison] gas cloud.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射释放[Poison|剧毒]云雾的箭矢。

Description.en: Fire a hail of arrows into the air, causing them to rain from above. [Consume|Consumes] a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] to fire more arrows.
Description.zh: 向空中发射一阵箭矢，使箭矢从上方落下。[Consume|消耗]一个[Charges|狂怒球]可发射更多箭矢。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a hail of arrows into the air, raining over the target area.
ShortDescription.zh: 向空中发射箭雨，在目标区域降下。

Description.en: Create a fiery [Orb|Orb] that periodically releases fiery pulses. Enemies that are very close to the [Orb|Orb] are [Ignite|Ignited]. Flameblast can target a Solar Orb to be centred on the Orb instead of your location.
Description.zh: 产生一个炽焰[Orb|法球]，周期性释放出火焰脉冲。距离[Orb|法球]极近的敌人会被[Ignite|点燃]。烈焰爆破可以将日曜球作为目标，以法球为中心而非你的位置释放。

ShortDescription.en: Create a [Fire] [Orb] that pulses damage and [Ignite|Ignites] close enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 产生一个[Fire|火焰][Orb|法球]，对附近敌人造成脉冲伤害并施加[Ignite|点燃]。

Description.en: Launch a large ball of [Fire|Fire] which explodes on impact. The explosion [Consume|Consumes] a [Fire] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to launch a ring of smaller firebolts.
Description.zh: 发射一个大型[Fire|火球]，击中时爆炸。爆炸尽量[Consume|消耗]一次[Fire|火焰][ElementalInfusion|灌注]来发射一圈较小的火弹。

ShortDescription.en: Launch a large, explosive fireball.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一个大型的爆炸火球。

Description.en: While active, stores a portion of the [Poison] Damage you deal. Using this Skill unleashes the stored [Poison|Poison] to damage and [Poison] enemies around you.
Description.zh: 激活时，储存你造成的所有[Poison|中毒]伤害的一部分。使用此技能释放储存的[Poison|毒素]，伤害并使你周围的敌人[Poison|中毒]。

ShortDescription.en: Releases stored [Poison] to damage and [Poison] enemies around you.
ShortDescription.zh: 释放储存的[Poison|毒素]，对周围敌人造成伤害并使其[Poison|中毒]。

Description.en: Fire an electrifying arrow that explodes in an Area on [HitDamage|Hit]. [HitDamage|Hitting] an enemy will attach an Electrocuting Rod to them, causing all incoming [Lightning|Lightning] damage to build up [Electrocute|Electrocution.] This rod is removed when the enemy is next [Electrocute|Electrocuted.]
Description.zh: 发射一支电光箭矢，[HitDamage|击中]时产生范围爆炸。[HitDamage|击中]敌人会对其附着一根电殛棒，使其受到的所有[Lightning|闪电]伤害积累[Electrocute|触电]效果。敌人下次被[Electrocute|触电]时，电殛棒会被移除。

ShortDescription.en: Fire an arrow that explodes and lodges an [Electrocute|Electrocuting] rod in enemies hit.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一支爆炸箭矢，为击中的敌人插入[Electrocute|触电]引雷针。

Description.en: [Consume] the elemental energy from a [Frozen], [Shock|Shocked] or [Ignite|Ignited] enemy, creating an elemental blast that leaves behind an [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] [Remnant]. The blast will spread to other enemies affected by the same [ElementalAilments|Ailment], but those blasts cannot spread further. Can also be cast on a Frostbolt to create a larger cold blast.
Description.zh: [Consume|消耗][Frozen|冻结]、[Shock|感电]或[Ignite|点燃]敌人的元素能量，产生一道元素爆炸，并留下一个[ElementalInfusion|灌注][Remnant|残片]。爆炸会扩散到受到同一[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]的其他敌人，但爆炸无法进一步扩散。可对寒冰弹施放产生更大范围的冰霜爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Create an elemental blast from a [Frozen], [Shock|Shocked] or [Ignite|Ignited] enemy, leaving behind an [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] [Remnant].
ShortDescription.zh: 从一个[Frozen|被冻结]、[Shock|感电]或[Ignite|点燃]敌人产生元素爆炸，留下一个[ElementalInfusion|灌注][Remnant|残片]。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to charge up your weapon with [Fire]. Releasing with [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing] will create a damaging wave of intense [Fire].
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]用[Fire|火焰]为你的武器充能，在[PerfectTiming|完美时机]施放会创造一波[Fire|火焰]波浪，杀伤敌人。

ShortDescription.en: [Channelling|Channel] to charge up a [Strike] that releases a wave of [Fire] if released with [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing].
ShortDescription.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]释放蓄力[Strike|打击]，在[PerfectTiming|完美时机]释放会产生[Fire|火焰]波浪。

Description.en: Raise your [Shield] to [Block] all incoming [Block|Blockable] hits. Release immediately after [Block|Blocking] when an enemy is close to perform a Shield Bash, damaging and [Stun|Stunning] enemies. While your [Shield] is raised you cannot be [LightStun|Light Stunned] by hits you [Block], but [Block|Blocking] too much damage may [HeavyStunPlayer|Heavy Stun] you. You cannot [Evasion|Evade] while your [Shield] is raised, but [Evasion] instead grants an equal chance to avoid this [HeavyStunPlayer|Heavy Stun] buildup.
Description.zh: 举起[Shield|盾牌]，[Block|格挡]所有来袭的[Block|可格挡]击中。在敌人靠近时[Block|格挡]后立即释放以进行盾牌猛击，对敌人造成伤害并施加[Stun|晕眩]。当你举起[Shield|盾牌]时，[Block|格挡]的击中不会对你造成[LightStun|轻度晕眩]，但[Block|格挡]过多伤害可能会使你[HeavyStunPlayer|重度晕眩]。你举起[Shield|盾牌]时无法[Evasion|闪避]，但[Evasion|闪避]会提供同等的几率避免产生[HeavyStunPlayer|重度晕眩]积蓄。

ShortDescription.en: [Block] incoming [HitDamage|Hits] from the front.
ShortDescription.zh: [Block|格挡]前方来袭的[HitDamage|击中]。

ShortDescription.en: [Block] incoming [HitDamage|Hits] from the front.
ShortDescription.zh: [Block|格挡]前方来袭的[HitDamage|击中]。

Description.en: Repeatedly hammer your [Shield|Shield] with your weapon causing damaging shockwaves in an area around you. Enemies hit by the shockwave lose [Armour|Armour] for a duration. While [Channelling] Resonating Shield, your [Shield|Shield] is raised and you will [Block|Block] all incoming [Block|Blockable] hits.
Description.zh: 使用武器反复捶打你的[Shield|盾牌]，在你周围的区域产生伤害性震波。被震波击中的敌人在一段时间内会失去[Armour|护甲]。可在移动中使用。[Channelling|持续吟唱]共振护盾时你会举起[Shield|盾牌]，[Block|格挡]所有[Block|可格挡]的攻击。

ShortDescription.en: Hammer your [Shield] to damage and strip [Armour] from enemies nearby.
ShortDescription.zh: 用[Shield|盾牌]重击对附近敌人造成伤害，并剥除[Armour|护甲]。

Description.en: Conjure surging arcane energy to restore your Mana. While active, enemies you kill affected by [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] have a chance to spawn a Mana [Remnant], and [Critical|Critically Hitting] a target with [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] spawns a Mana [Remnant] every few seconds. Picking up a Mana [Remnant] grants you Mana which can [Overflow|Overflow] maximum Mana.
Description.zh: 召唤汹涌的秘术能量来回复你的魔力。激活时，击败带有[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]的敌人有几率生成一个魔力[Remnant|残片]，对[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]的目标造成[Critical|暴击]每隔几秒可以生成一个魔力[Remnant|残片]。拾取魔力[Remnant|残片]可获得魔力，并且能够[Overflow|溢出]魔力上限。

Description.en: Conjure hateful energy to fuel your Rage and Life. While active, [Bleeding] enemies you kill have a chance to spawn a Hateful [Remnant], and [HitDamage|Hitting] a [Bleeding] target spawns a Hateful [Remnant] every few seconds. Picking up a Hateful [Remnant] grants you Rage and recovers Life based on your current Rage.
Description.zh: 汇聚仇恨能量以滋养你的怒火与生命。激活期间，被你击杀的[Bleeding|流血]敌人有几率生成一个仇恨[Remnant|残片]，且[HitDamage|击中][Bleeding|流血]目标时每隔数秒也会生成一个仇恨[Remnant|残片]。拾取仇恨[Remnant|残片]会为你提供怒火，并根据你当前的怒火值回复生命。

Description.en: While active, increases your [ChanceToBlock|Block Chance] passively and imbues your [Shield] with lava over time. When fully imbued, your next [Block|Block] with your [Shield] raised will expend the lava to [Trigger] the Magma Spray skill and grant you an [Charges|Endurance Charge].
Description.zh: 激活时，被动增加你的[ChanceToBlock|格挡几率]，并随时间为你的[Shield|盾牌]注入熔岩。完全注入后，你下一次举起[Shield|盾牌]进行[Block|格挡]时会消耗熔岩，[Trigger|触发]熔岩溅射，并获得一个[Charges|耐力球]。

Description.en: Perform an [Unarmed|Unarmed] [Strike].
Description.zh: 发动一次[Unarmed|徒手][Strike|打击]。

ShortDescription.en: Perform an [Unarmed|Unarmed] [Strike].
ShortDescription.zh: 发动一次[Unarmed|徒手][Strike|打击]。

Description.zh: 使用爪进行[Strike|打击]。

Description.zh: 使用匕首进行[Strike|打击]。

ShortDescription.en: [Strike] with your Daggers.
ShortDescription.zh: 使用匕首进行[Strike|打击]。

Description.en: [Strike] with your [Spear].
Description.zh: 使用[Spear|战矛]进行[Strike|打击]。

ShortDescription.en: [Strike] with your [Spear].
ShortDescription.zh: 使用[Spear|战矛]进行[Strike|打击]。

Description.en: [Strike] with your [Spear].
Description.zh: 使用[Spear|战矛]进行[Strike|打击]。

ShortDescription.en: [Strike] with your [Spear].
ShortDescription.zh: 使用[Spear|战矛]进行[Strike|打击]。

Description.en: Fire an arrow with your Bow.
Description.zh: 使用弓发射一支箭矢。

ShortDescription.en: Fire an arrow with your Bow.
ShortDescription.zh: 使用弓发射一支箭矢。

Description.en: Fire a bolt from your crossbow.
Description.zh: 从你的战弩射出一支箭矢。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a bolt from your crossbow.
ShortDescription.zh: 从你的战弩射出一支箭矢。

Description.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that unleashes a shrapnel blast when its fuse expires.
Description.zh: 发射一枚会弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，其引信耗尽时释放破片爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that unleashes a shrapnel blast when its fuse expires.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一枚会弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，其引信耗尽时释放破片爆炸。

Description.en: Strike your foes down with a powerful blow using a melee weapon.
Description.zh: 使用近战武器对你的敌人无情痛击。

Description.en: Jump into the air, damaging enemies where you land.
Description.zh: 跃向空中，落地时对敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: Launch a fiery [Projectile] towards a target.
Description.zh: 向目标发射一束燃烧的[Projectile|投射物]。

Description.en: Raise a [Totem|Totem] that [Slam|Slams] the ground around it, repeatedly damaging nearby enemies. [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] erupts when hit by this [Slam|Slam], damaging enemies standing on it. The [Totem] cannot create [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground]. This Skill can be used while [Shapeshift|Shapeshifted].
Description.zh: 竖立一个[Totem|图腾][Slam|猛击]其周围的地面，反复对周围的敌人造成伤害。该[Slam|猛击]击中[JaggedGround|崎岖之地]会使其喷发，对位于其上的敌人造成伤害。该[Totem|图腾]无法创造[JaggedGround|崎岖之地]。该技能可在[Shapeshift|变形]状态下使用。

ShortDescription.en: Raise a [Totem] that [Slam|Slams] the ground around it.
ShortDescription.zh: 竖立一个[Totem|图腾]，[Slam|猛击]周围地面。

Description.en: Launch icy [Projectile|Projectiles] in a sweeping arc. Multiple [Projectile|Projectiles] can hit the same enemy.
Description.zh: 以弧形发射冰冷的[Projectile|投射物]。多个[Projectile|投射物]可以击中同一个敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Launch a spray of icy [Projectile|Projectiles].
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一束冰霜[Projectile|投射物]。

Description.en: Fire an arrow into the air that lands after a short delay, damaging enemies and causing a plant to spring up at the impact location. The plant sprouts vines that latch onto nearby enemies, [Slow|Slowing] their movement speed and dealing [Chaos] damage over time. The plant can be [Poison|Poisoned], causing it to deal more damage.
Description.zh: 向空中发射一支箭矢，短暂的延迟后落下，在击中位置对敌人造成伤害并产生一株成长的植物。该植物会萌发藤蔓，附着在附近的敌人身上，[Slow|减慢]其移动速度并持续造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。植物可以[Poison|中毒]并造成更高的伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Fire an arrow that attaches vines to enemies to [Slow] them and deal [Chaos] damage over time.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射箭矢，在敌人身上附着藤蔓以[Slow|减速]他们并造成[Chaos|混沌]持续伤害。

Description.en: Harnesses a [Companion] Rhoa you can mount while you're wielding a [Bow] or [Spear]. While mounted you can use [Bow], thrown [Spear], and [Mark] Skills, and are much less slowed while using Skills, but being [HitDamage|Hit] will cause [HeavyStunPlayer|Heavy Stun] buildup. While you aren't mounted, the Rhoa will attack your enemies alongside you with its beak, but can be damaged.
Description.zh: 使用[Bow|弓类]和[Spear|战矛]时，你可以驾驭一头可骑乘的[Companion|伙伴]恐喙鸟。骑乘恐喙鸟时，你只能使用[Bow|弓类]、[Spear|战矛]投掷和[Mark|印记]技能，使用技能时减速效果大幅降低，但被[HitDamage|击中]时会产生[HeavyStunPlayer|重度晕眩]积蓄。未骑乘时，恐喙鸟可以用鸟喙啄击你的敌人，但会受到伤害。

Description.en: [Trigger|Triggered] when an enemy [Poison|Poisoned] by a supported skill dies, dealing [Physical|Physical] damage around them based on the built-up Plague.
Description.zh: 当被辅助技能施加[Poison|中毒]的敌人被击败时[Trigger|触发]，根据积蓄的灾难值，在周围造成[Physical|物理]伤害。

Description.en: Consume a [Corpse] to create a cloud of flammable [Poison|Poisonous] gas. Any [Burning|Burning] effects or Detonator skills will explode the gas cloud, creating a fiery explosion.
Description.zh: 消耗一个[Corpse|灵柩]，产生一团可燃的[Poison|毒素瓦斯]云雾。任何[Burning|燃烧]效果或引爆技能会引爆瓦斯云，产生强烈的爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Consume a [Corpse] to create a cloud of flammable [Poison|Poisonous] gas.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗一个[Corpse|灵柩]，产生一团可燃的[Poison|剧毒]云雾。

Description.en: Consume a [Corpse] to create a cloud of flammable [Poison|Poisonous] gas. Any [Burning|Burning] effects or Detonator skills will explode the gas cloud, creating a fiery explosion.
Description.zh: 消耗一个[Corpse|灵柩]，产生一团可燃的[Poison|毒素瓦斯]云雾。任何[Burning|燃烧]效果或引爆技能会引爆瓦斯云，产生强烈的爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Consume a [Corpse] to create a cloud of flammable [Poison|Poisonous] gas.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗一个[Corpse|灵柩]，产生一团可燃的[Poison|剧毒]云雾。

Description.en: While active, [Fire|Fire] [Spell|Spells] you use yourself will also summon Raging Spirits, which are short-lived flaming skulls that rush at nearby enemies and rapidly [Attack|Attack] them, ignoring commands. Enemies will not directly engage these [Minion|Minions], and can pass through them.
Description.zh: 激活时，[Fire|火焰][Spell|法术]还会召唤愤怒狂灵，这些只能存在极短时间的愤怒狂灵会无视命令，冲至敌人身边并快速[Attack|攻击]。敌方生物将不会主动攻击这些[Minion|召唤生物]，并可以穿越它们。

Description.en: [Trigger|Triggered] when supported skill [Consume|Consumes] [Ignite], [Shock], or [Freeze], to deal damage of [DamageTypes|Types] matching the [Consume|Consumed] [ElementalAilments|Ailments].
Description.zh: 当被辅助技能[Consume|消耗][Ignite|点燃]、[Shock|感电]或[Freeze|冻结]效果时[Trigger|触发]，根据所[Consume|消耗]的[ElementalAilments|异常状态]造成相应[DamageTypes|类型]的伤害。

Description.en: [Trigger|Triggered] when supported skill is boosted by an [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surface] to deal damage of the matching [ElementalDamage|Element].
Description.zh: 当被辅助技能受到[ElementalGround|元素地面效果]增强时[Trigger|触发]，造成与该[ElementalDamage|元素]相匹配的伤害。

Description.en: Whip up a twister with a flick of your [Spear]. The twister moves forward erratically, [Blind|Blinding] and repeatedly [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies within. If a twister touches a [Whirlwind] from your other skills, it Consumes the [Whirlwind] to create additional twisters that deal more damage. Passing over [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surfaces] or Consuming an elemental [Whirlwind] will grant twisters extra damage of that element.
Description.zh: 舞动[Spear|战矛]扇起一阵旋龙，旋龙会不规则移动，[Blind|致盲]并反复[HitDamage|击中]内部的敌人。如果旋龙触碰到其他技能产生的[Whirlwind|旋风]，则会消耗[Whirlwind|旋风]并产生更多旋龙，造成更高的伤害。越过[ElementalGround|元素地面效果]或消耗元素[Whirlwind|旋风]会使旋龙获得对应属性的额外伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Whip up a twister with a flick of your [Spear].
ShortDescription.zh: 挥动[Spear|战矛]，激起龙卷风。

Description.en: Hurl a single payload [Spear] that pierces through enemies and lodges in terrain where it lands. The [Spear] will explode at the end of its [DetonationTime|Detonation Time] or if [Detonator|Detonated]. Consumes a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] if you have one to explode immediately, dealing more damage in a cross-shaped area and creating [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground].
Description.zh: 掷出一柄负荷[Spear|战矛]，穿透敌人并嵌入地形。[Spear|战矛]会在[DetonationTime|引爆时间]结束或[Detonator|被引爆]时发生爆炸。尽量消耗一个[Charges|狂怒球]，使其立即爆炸，在十字形区域中造成更高的伤害，并产生[IgnitedGround|点燃地面]。

ShortDescription.en: Hurl a [Spear] that explodes after a short time, or immediately if consuming a [Charges|Frenzy Charge].
ShortDescription.zh: 投掷[Spear|战矛]，短时间后爆炸，若消耗[Charges|狂怒球]则立即爆炸。

Description.en: Dash to an enemy and nullify their [Resistances|Resistance]. Hitting an enemy with positive [Resistances|Elemental Resistance] will reduce their highest [Resistances|Elemental Resistance] to 0 for a duration and triggers Infuse Weapon, granting your [Spear] the maximum possible [Surge|Surges] corresponding to the removed [Resistances|Resistance]. If this skill doesn't remove any [Resistances], its cooldown is reset. This skill cannot be [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosted].
Description.zh: 冲向一名敌人并消除其[Resistances|抗性]。击中具有正[Resistances|元素抗性]的敌人会使其最高的[Resistances|元素抗性]在一段时间内降低为 0，同时触发灌注武器，使你的[Spear|战矛]获得与移除[Resistances|抗性]相对应的[Surge|涌动]直至上限。如果该技能没有移除任何[Resistances|抗性]，其冷却时间会重置。该技能无法获得[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]。

ShortDescription.en: Dash to an enemy and nullify their [Resistances|Resistance].
ShortDescription.zh: 冲向敌人并使其[Resistances|抗性]无效。

Description.en: Leap into the air and plunge your [Spear] into the ground at the target location, emitting a [Lightning]-charged shockwave.
Description.zh: 跃向空中并将[Spear|战矛]刺入目标位置的地面，放射出一道[Lightning|闪电]充能的震波。

ShortDescription.en: Jump to the target location and cause a shockwave.
ShortDescription.zh: 跳跃到目标位置并造成冲击波。

Description.en: While active, periodically grants stages of a buff that gives you more [Evasion] per stage. Being [HitDamage|Hit] by an Enemy while you have this buff consumes all stages to damage and [Knockback|Knock Back] enemies around you.
Description.zh: 激活时，每隔一段获得增益状态层数，每层使你的[Evasion|闪避]提高。拥有该增益状态时被敌人[HitDamage|击中]会消耗全部层数，对周围的敌人造成伤害和[Knockback|击退]。

Description.en: Mark a [Corpse] with a profane rune, dealing [Chaos] damage over time to nearby enemies. When the ritual is complete the [Corpse] is consumed and you gain a [Charges|Power Charge].
Description.zh: 为一个[Corpse|灵柩]添加不敬符文印记，持续对周围的敌人造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害。仪式完成时消耗[Corpse|灵柩]，并使你获得一个[Charges|暴击球]。

ShortDescription.en: Consume a [Corpse] to deal [Chaos] damage over time around it and gain a [Charges|Power Charge].
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗一具[Corpse|灵柩]，在其周围造成[Chaos|混沌]持续伤害并获得[Charges|暴击球]。

Description.en: Skewer a Skeleton on a bone spike, granting you a powerful [Spell] damage [Buff] as long as the spike remains. Does not affect your [Minion|Minions].  The bone spike is itself a [Minion]. If it dies, the effect ends immediately.
Description.zh: 将一个魔侍穿刺在骨刺上，只要尖刺存在，就能使你获得强大的[Spell|法术]伤害[Buff|增益状态]。不影响你的[Minion|召唤生物]。尖刺为[Minion|召唤生物]。一旦尖刺被击败，该效果会立刻消失。

ShortDescription.en: Skewer a Skeleton to gain a [Spell] damage [Buff].
ShortDescription.zh: 穿刺一个魔侍，获得[Spell|法术]伤害[Buff|增益状态]。

Description.en: Raise a [Totem] that bombards enemies afflicted by [Chaos] damage over time [Debuff|Debuffs].
Description.zh: 立起一个[Totem|图腾]，对敌人施加造成持续[Chaos|混沌]伤害的[Debuff|减益状态]。

ShortDescription.en: Raise a [Totem] that bombards enemies afflicted by [Chaos] damage over time [Debuff|Debuffs].
ShortDescription.zh: 立起一个[Totem|图腾]，对敌人施加造成持续[Chaos|混沌]伤害的[Debuff|减益状态]。

Description.en: Fire a [Projectile|Projectile] at every nearby enemy that is afflicted by a [Chaos] damage over time [Debuff]. Fires multiple [Projectile|Projectiles] at enemies afflicted by multiple [Debuff|Debuffs], but [Projectile] count cannot be otherwise modified.
Description.zh: 向周围每个受到持续[Chaos|混沌]伤害[Debuff|减益状态]影响的敌人发射一个[Projectile|投射物]，对受到多个[Debuff|减益状态]影响的敌人发射多个[Projectile|投射物]，但[Projectile|投射物]数量不受其他方式影响。

Description.en: Crystallises the air into icy shards that explode outwards when they hit the ground.
Description.zh: 将空气晶化为寒冰碎片，击中地面时向外爆发。

Description.en: While active, your [Reviving] [Minion|Minions] store a percentage of their maximum Life in a collectible Grim [Remnant] on death. Using Grim Resurrection Consumes the Life you've collected to [Reviving|Revive] up to that much total Life of dead [Minion|Minions].
Description.zh: 技能激活时，你的[Reviving|可复活的][Minion|召唤生物]在被击败时会将其生命上限的一部分储存在可收集的饕餮[Remnant|残片]中。使用饕餮复活会消耗所储存的生命，用于[Reviving|复活]被击败的[Minion|召唤生物]，复活的总生命最多等于已储存的数值。

Description.en: Turn socketed [Curse] skills into vile [Aura|Auras], applying their effects to all nearby enemies.
Description.zh: 将所有镶嵌的[Curse|诅咒]技能合并为持续的[Aura|光环]，对附近的敌人施加这些效果。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy] when one of your [Persistent] [Minion|Minions] is [MinionDeath|Killed], and triggers socketed [Spell|Spells] upon reaching maximum [Energy]. Very underlevelled [Minion|Minions] will incur an [Energy] generation penalty. Cannot socket [Spell|Spells] which create [Minion|Minions].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你的一个[Persistent|永久性][Minion|召唤生物]被[MinionDeath|击败]时，你会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的[Spell|法术]。极低等级的[Minion|召唤生物]具有[Energy|能量]生成惩罚。无法镶嵌产生[Minion|召唤生物]的[Spell|法术]。

Description.en: While active, uses fragments of armour scavenged from enemies to bolster your own. [ArmourBreak|Fully Breaking] an enemy's [Armour] grants you stacks of Scavenged Plating for a duration based on the enemy's [Rarity], and you gain [Armour] and [Thorns] per stack. Normal enemies grant 1 stack, Magic enemies grant 2 stacks, Rare enemies grant 5 stacks and Unique enemies grant 10 stacks.
Description.zh: 激活时，使用从敌人身上搜刮的护甲碎片来强化自身。使一个敌人的[Armour|护甲][ArmourBreak|完全破损]后，根据该敌人的[Rarity|稀有度]，在一定时间内使你获得装甲回收层数，每层为你提供[Armour|护甲]和[Thorns|荆棘]。普通敌人提供 1 层，魔法敌人提供 2 层，稀有敌人提供 5 层，传奇敌人提供 10 层。

Description.en: [ManaLeech|Leech] Mana from an enemy over a prolonged period, as well as briefly [Hinder|Hindering] them.
Description.zh: 在一段时间内从敌人身上[ManaLeech|偷取]法力，同时短暂[Hinder|缓速]其行动。

ShortDescription.en: [ManaLeech|Leech] Mana from an enemy, as well as briefly [Hinder|Hindering] them.
ShortDescription.zh: 从敌人身上[ManaLeech|偷取]法力，同时短暂[Hinder|缓速]其行动。

Description.en: Conjure a circle of ritual inscriptions that last for a short duration. When the duration ends, spikes of bone erupt from enemies in the area, damaging them and potentially causing [Bleeding].
Description.zh: 召唤出一圈持续较短时间的仪式铭文。持续时间结束时，从区域内的敌人处爆发出尖刺，造成伤害并有可能施加[Bleeding|流血]。

ShortDescription.en: Cause an explosion of bone fragments after a short delay.
ShortDescription.zh: 在短暂的延迟后造成一次骨片爆炸。

Description.en: While active, replaces your dodge roll with a short-cooldown [Spell] that allows you to tunnel through space, instantly reappearing a medium distance away.
Description.zh: 激活时，用一个冷却时间较短的[Spell|法术]代替你的闪避翻滚，让你穿越空间，立即出现在中等距离之外。

Description.en: While active, replaces your dodge roll with a short-cooldown [Spell] that allows you to tunnel through space, instantly reappearing a medium distance away.
Description.zh: 激活时，用一个冷却时间较短的[Spell|法术]代替你的闪避翻滚，让你穿越空间，立即出现在中等距离之外。

Description.en: Replaces your dodge roll with an explosive-assisted leap, firing off a round from your prosthetic cannon leg that [Blind|Blinds] and [Ignite|Ignites] enemies in the area you escape from. The explosion will cause any [Grenade|Grenades] in its area of effect to also explode.
Description.zh: 用爆炸辅助的跳跃取代你的闪避翻滚，从你的义肢加农炮腿发射一发炮弹，[Blind|致盲]并[Ignite|点燃]逃离区域内的敌人。爆炸会导致其效果范围内的任何[Grenade|榴弹]也一同爆炸。

Description.en: Gain fuel by spending Mana on any Skill, then use the accumulated fuel to conjure a torrent of [Fire] from your hand, [Ignite|Igniting] enemies in front of you. The flames grow stronger the longer you [Channelling|Channel]. [Consume|Consumes] a [Fire] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to also create [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground]. Cannot gain fuel while using this skill.
Description.zh: 通过为技能消耗魔力来获得燃料，然后使用积累的燃料从手中召唤[Fire|火焰]洪流，[Ignite|点燃]你前方的敌人。火焰随着你[Channelling|持续吟唱]时间的延长而增强。若可能，会[Consume|消耗]一次[Fire|火焰][ElementalInfusion|灌注]来同时产生[IgnitedGround|点燃地面]。使用此技能期间无法积累燃料。

ShortDescription.en: Gain fuel by spending Mana on any Skill, then use the accumulated fuel to conjure a torrent of [Fire] from your hand.
ShortDescription.zh: 通过为技能消耗魔力获得燃料，然后使用积累的燃料从手中召唤[Fire|火焰]洪流。

Description.en: Gouge molten rock from the ground and fling it at the target. The [Projectile] explodes on collision, damaging enemies and scattering shrapnel in a cone behind it.
Description.zh: 从地面挖出熔岩并将其抛向目标。[Projectile|投射物]在碰撞时爆炸，对敌人造成伤害，并敌人身后的锥形区域散布弹片。

ShortDescription.en: Gouge molten rock from the ground and fling it at the target.
ShortDescription.zh: 从地面挖出熔岩并将其抛向目标。

Description.en: While active, emits an [Aura] that continuously inflicts [CriticalWeakness|Critical Weakness] on enemies in your [Presence].
Description.zh: 激活时，释放一个[Aura|光环]，持续对[Presence|在场]的敌人施加[CriticalWeakness|暴击弱点]。

Description.en: While active, a companion Hydra will rear up from your body and regularly cast socketed [Projectile] [Spell|Spells] at nearby [Shock|Shocked], [Frozen], and [Ignite|Ignited] enemies.
Description.zh: 激活时，一头九头蛇会从你的身体上站起，并定期对附近[Shock|感电]、[Frozen|冻结]和[Ignite|点燃]的敌人施放镶嵌的[Projectile|投射物][Spell|法术]。

Description.en: Build [Glory] by [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunning] enemies. When you have maximum [Glory] you may entreat the Ancestors to crush your enemies, manifesting a massive hammer that falls from the sky onto your target, [Slam|Slamming] into the ground after a short duration and dealing immense damage based on your weapon.
Description.zh: 对敌人施加[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]来累积[Glory|荣耀]。[Glory|荣耀]达到满值后，你可以祈求先祖碾碎你的敌人，显化一把巨大的锤子，从天而降砸向你的目标。经过一小段时间后[Slam|猛击]地面，并根据你的武器造成巨额伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Build [Glory], then crush your enemies with a massive hammer from the sky.
ShortDescription.zh: 累积[Glory|荣耀]，用从天而降的巨锤粉碎你的敌人。

Description.en: Plant a seed of [Fire] inside an enemy. Dealing enough damage to the enemy, or killing it outright, causes the seed to explode, dealing damage in an area and leaving behind a [ElementalInfusion|Fire Infusion] [Remnant].
Description.zh: 在敌人体内种下[Fire|火焰]种子。对敌人造成足够伤害或直接将其击败会使种子爆炸，在区域内造成伤害并留下一个[ElementalInfusion|火焰灌注][Remnant|残片]。

ShortDescription.en: Cause an explosion if the target takes enough damage or dies, leaving a [ElementalInfusion|Fire Infusion] [Remnant].
ShortDescription.zh: 若目标受到足够伤害或被击败则产生爆炸，留下一个[ElementalInfusion|火焰灌注][Remnant|残片]。

Description.en: Plant a seed of Abyssal Energy on the enemy's heart. Dealing enough damage to the enemy, or killing it outright, causes their heart to explode, dealing [Physical] damage in an area.
Description.zh: 在敌人心脏上种下一颗深渊能量种子。对敌人造成足量的伤害，或直接将其击杀，会使其心脏爆炸，对范围内造成[Physical|物理]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Cause an explosion if the target takes enough damage or dies.
ShortDescription.zh: 目标受到足量的伤害，或被击杀时，会造成爆炸。

Description.en: Charges forward, cracking the earth and leaving a patch of [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] with every footstep. At the end of your charge, a massive leaping [Slam] damages enemies and causes all nearby patches of [JaggedGround|Jagged Ground] to explode, damaging enemies standing on them. Once you begin your charge, the use speed of this Skill is affected by movement speed instead of [Attack] speed.
Description.zh: 向前冲锋，踩裂大地，每一步都会留下一片[JaggedGround|崎岖之地]。冲锋结束时施展跳跃[Slam|猛击]，对敌人造成伤害，并使附近的所有[JaggedGround|崎岖之地]爆发，对其中的敌人造成伤害。当你开始冲锋后，该技能的使用速度受移动速度影响，而非受[Attack|攻击]速度影响。

ShortDescription.en: Charge forward and create cascading shockwaves.
ShortDescription.zh: 向前冲锋并产生连续的冲击波。

Description.en: Ram your [Shield] into the ground, throwing up a wall of earth. Enemies can attack your wall segments, and your [Slam|Slams], [Warcry|Warcries], and Shield Charge will instantly shatter them all. The segments explode when shattered, damaging enemies in front of and around them.
Description.zh: 将[Shield|盾牌]砸向地面，竖起一道土墙。敌人可以攻击你的墙体段落，你的[Slam|猛击]、[Warcry|战吼]和重盾冲锋会瞬间破坏它们。墙体块在破碎时会爆炸，对前方和周围的敌人造成伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Create a wall of earth that deals damage when shattered.
ShortDescription.zh: 产生一道土墙，被粉碎时造成伤害。

Description.en: Perform a [Warcry] that grants [Guard] and [Trigger|Triggers] Shield Wave when subsequent Shield [Attack|Attacks] deal damage. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an [Charges|Endurance Charge].
Description.zh: 发出[Warcry|战吼]获得[Guard|防卫]，并使后续的盾牌[Attack|攻击]造成伤害时[Trigger|触发]盾护冲击波。消耗一个[Charges|耐力球]可以跳过此技能的冷却时间。

ShortDescription.en: Perform a [Warcry] that grants [Guard] and makes your Shield [Attack|Attacks] [Trigger] Shield Wave.
ShortDescription.zh: 发出[Warcry|战吼]获得[Guard|防卫]，并使你的盾牌[Attack|攻击][Trigger|触发]盾护冲击波。

Description.en: Conjure a blazing Ember that hovers above you. After a short duration, the Ember launches at an enemy, dealing [Fire] damage in an area on impact and prioritising the last enemy targeted. Recasting this spell resets the duration for all active Embers. Multiple Embers fired in the same Fusillade will attempt to target different enemies. [Consume|Consumes] a [Lightning] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to cause the entire Fusillade to create beams that [Chain] to enemies.
Description.zh: 召唤出一团炽热的余烬在你头顶盘旋。短暂时间后，余烬会向敌人发射，在击中区域造成[Fire|火焰]伤害，优先攻击最后一个被瞄准的敌人。再次施放该法术将重置所有存在余烬的持续时间。在同一连射中发射的多个余烬会试图攻击不同的敌人。尽量[Consume|消耗]一次[Lightning|闪电][ElementalInfusion|灌注]，使整个连射产生[Chain|连锁]到敌人的光束。

ShortDescription.en: Conjure Embers that launch at enemies after a short delay.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤余烬，短暂的延迟后向敌人发射。

Description.en: Conjure a crackling Wellsprite that hovers above you. After a short duration, the Wellsprite launches at an enemy, dealing [Lightning] damage in an area on impact and prioritising the last enemy targeted. Recasting this spell resets the duration for all active Wellsprites.
Description.zh: 召唤出一团作响的魂井之灵在你头顶盘旋。短暂时间后，魂井之灵会向敌人发射，在击中区域造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害，优先攻击最后一个被瞄准的敌人。再次施放该法术将重置所有存在的魂井之灵的持续时间。

ShortDescription.en: Conjure Wellsprites that launch at enemies after a short delay.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤魂井之灵，短暂延迟后向敌人发射。

Description.en: Conjure a blazing Ember that hovers above you. After a short duration, the Ember launches at an enemy, dealing [Fire] damage in an area on impact and prioritising the last enemy targeted. Recasting this spell resets the duration for all active Embers. Multiple Embers fired in the same Fusillade will attempt to target different enemies. [Consume|Consumes] a [Lightning] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to cause the entire Fusillade to create beams that [Chain] to enemies.
Description.zh: 召唤出一团炽热的余烬在你头顶盘旋。短暂时间后，余烬会向敌人发射，在击中区域造成[Fire|火焰]伤害，优先攻击最后一个被瞄准的敌人。再次施放该法术将重置所有存在余烬的持续时间。在同一连射中发射的多个余烬会试图攻击不同的敌人。尽量[Consume|消耗]一次[Lightning|闪电][ElementalInfusion|灌注]，使整个连射产生[Chain|连锁]到敌人的光束。

ShortDescription.en: Conjure Embers that launch at enemies after a short delay.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤余烬，短暂的延迟后向敌人发射。

Description.en: Passively manifests a protective barrier which takes [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] for you until depleted. The barrier instantly recharges to its full value a short time after it stops taking damage or is fully depleted.
Description.zh: 被动地凝聚一道防护性屏障，吸收你受到的[HitDamage|击中][ElementalDamage|元素伤害]直至耗尽。屏障停止受到伤害或完全耗尽时，它会在短时间后立即回复满值。

Description.en: Drink the blood of your enemies to restore your Life. While active, enemies you kill have a chance to spawn a Life [Remnant], and [HitDamage|Hitting] a target spawns a Life [Remnant] every few seconds. Picking up a Life [Remnant] grants you Life which can [Overflow|Overflow] maximum Life.
Description.zh: 汲取敌人的鲜血以回复你的生命。激活时，被你击败的敌人有几率生成一个生命[Remnant|残片]，[HitDamage|击中]目标每隔几秒可以生成一个生命[Remnant|残片]。拾取生命[Remnant|残片]可获得生命，并且能够[Overflow|溢出]生命上限。

Description.en: Fire a [Lightning]-charged arrow that homes in on enemies afflicted by [LightningAilment|Lightning Ailments]. Hitting such an enemy will cause your arrow to release a damaging shockwave and [Chain] towards nearby targets, with those [Chain|Chaining] [HitDamage|Hits] also releasing a shockwave. After the final [Chain], the arrow lodges into the ground as a Lightning Rod. [Consume|Consumes] [Shock] from enemies it [HitDamage|Hits], but not [Electrocute|Electrocution].
Description.zh: 发射一支充能了[Lightning|闪电]的箭矢，会追踪受到[LightningAilment|闪电异常状态]影响的敌人。击中此类敌人时，箭矢会释放一道伤害性震波并[Chain|连锁]至附近目标，这些[Chain|连锁][HitDamage|击中]同样会释放震波。在最后一次[Chain|连锁]后，箭矢将作为引雷针嵌入地面。此技能会[Consume|消耗]被[HitDamage|击中]的敌人身上的[Shock|感电]效果，但不会消耗[Electrocute|触电]效果。

ShortDescription.en: Fire an arrow that creates a [Chain|Chaining] [Projectile] on [HitDamage|Hitting] a [Shock|Shocked] or [Electrocute|Electrocuted] enemy and leaves a Lightning Rod behind.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射箭矢，[HitDamage|击中][Shock|感电]和[Electrocute|触电]状态的敌人时会生成一道[Chain|连锁][Projectile|投射物]，并在原地留下一根引雷针。

Description.en: Leap forward and [Slam] the ground, sending out a shockwave. The shockwave applies [BrokenStance|Broken Stance] to [Daze|Dazed] enemies, causing any [HitDamage|Hits] against those enemies to deal extra damage.
Description.zh: 向前跃起并[Slam|猛击]地面，发出冲击波。冲击波对[Daze|恍惚]敌人施加[BrokenStance|破碎姿态]，使对这些敌人的任何[HitDamage|击中]造成额外伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Leap forward and create a shockwave that applies [BrokenStance|Broken Stance] to [Daze|Dazed] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 向前跃起并产生冲击波，对[Daze|恍惚]敌人施加[BrokenStance|破碎姿态]。

Description.en: Sweep your [Quarterstaff|Quarterstaff], projecting a bolt of [Lightning] through the ground in a long fissure ahead of you.
Description.zh: 将[Quarterstaff|节杖]扫出，在你前方的地面上射出一道[Lightning|闪电]裂隙。

ShortDescription.en: Sweep your [Quarterstaff|Quarterstaff] to project a [Lightning] fissure.
ShortDescription.zh: 横扫你的[Quarterstaff|节杖]，以投射[Lightning|闪电]裂隙。

Description.en:
Build [Combo|Combo] by successfully [Strike|Striking] Enemies with other skills. After reaching maximum [Combo|Combo], use this skill to [Empowered|Empower] your next [Quarterstaff] [Attack], causing it to deal additional [Chaos] damage. Each kill with the [Empowered] [Attack] grants
[PurpleFlamesOfChayula|Purple Flames of Chayula] for a duration.
Description.zh:
成功使用其他技能[Strike|打击]敌人可以积累[Combo|连击]。达到[Combo|连击]上限后，使用此技能可以[Empowered|强化]你的下一次[Quarterstaff|节杖][Attack|攻击]，使其造成额外的[Chaos|混沌]伤害。[Empowered|强化][Attack|攻击]每击败一个敌人都能
提供[PurpleFlamesOfChayula|紫色夏乌拉之焰]，持续一段时间。

ShortDescription.en: Build [Combo] then grant your next [Attack] extra [Chaos] damage.
ShortDescription.zh: 累积[Combo|连击]，给予你的下次[Attack|攻击]额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

Description.en: The minion's shield of bone explodes, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies.
Description.zh: 召唤生物的钙质护盾爆炸，对附近的敌人造成物理伤害。

Description.en: Consume charges from your Mana [Flask] to throw a flask that explodes, dealing [Fire] [Attack] damage in an area. Additional smaller flasks are thrown at nearby [Ignite|Ignited] Enemies. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an [UnarmedAttack|Unarmed Attack]
Description.zh: 消耗魔力[Flask|药剂]的充能，投掷一个爆炸瓶，在一片区域内造成[Fire|火焰][Attack|攻击]伤害。会向附近[Ignite|点燃]的敌人投掷额外的小型药剂瓶。此伤害不基于你的徒手伤害，因此不视为[UnarmedAttack|徒手攻击]。

ShortDescription.en: Consume Mana [Flask] charges to throw an explosive flask.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗魔力[Flask|药剂]充能，以投掷爆炸药剂。

Description.en: Consume charges from your Mana [Flask] to throw a flask that explodes, dealing [Lightning] [Attack] damage in an area with high chance to [Shock]. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an [UnarmedAttack|Unarmed Attack]
Description.zh: 消耗魔力[Flask|药剂]的充能，投掷一个爆炸药剂，在一片区域内造成[Lightning|闪电][Attack|攻击]伤害，高几率[Shock|感电]。此伤害不基于你的徒手伤害，因此不视为[UnarmedAttack|徒手攻击]。

ShortDescription.en: Consume Mana [Flask] charges to throw an explosive flask.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗魔力[Flask|药剂]充能，以投掷爆炸药剂。

Description.en: Consume charges from your Mana [Flask] to throw a flask that explodes, dealing [Cold] [Attack] damage in an area and inflicting [Exposure]. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an [UnarmedAttack|Unarmed Attack]
Description.zh: 消耗魔力[Flask|药剂]的充能，投掷一个爆炸药剂，在一片区域内造成[Cold|冰霜][Attack|攻击]伤害，并施加[Exposure|曝露]。此伤害不基于你的徒手伤害，因此不视为[UnarmedAttack|徒手攻击]。

ShortDescription.en: Consume Mana [Flask] charges to throw an explosive flask.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗魔力[Flask|药剂]充能，以投掷爆炸药剂。

Description.en: Consume charges from your Mana [Flask] to throw a flask that explodes, dealing [Physical] [Attack] damage in an area. The thrown flask [Consume|Consumes] [Poison] on [HitDamage|Hit] to cause an acidic burst. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an [UnarmedAttack|Unarmed Attack]
Description.zh: 消耗魔力[Flask|药剂]的充能，投掷一个爆炸药剂，在一片区域内造成[Physical|物理][Attack|攻击]伤害。投掷的药剂瓶[HitDamage|击中]时[Consume|消耗][Poison|中毒]，造成酸性爆发。此伤害不基于你的徒手伤害，因此不视为[UnarmedAttack|徒手攻击]。

ShortDescription.en: Consume Mana [Flask] charges to throw a flask.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗魔力[Flask|药剂]充能，投掷药剂。

Description.en: Consume charges from your Mana [Flask] to throw a flask that explodes, dealing [Physical] [Attack] damage in an area and [Aggravate|Aggravating Bleeding] on Enemies hit. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an [UnarmedAttack|Unarmed Attack]
Description.zh: 消耗魔力[Flask|药剂]的充能，投掷一个爆炸药剂，在一片区域内造成[Physical|物理][Attack|攻击]伤害，对击中的敌人造成[Aggravate|恶性流血]。此伤害不基于你的徒手伤害，因此不视为[UnarmedAttack|徒手攻击]。

ShortDescription.en: Consume Mana [Flask] charges to throw an explosive flask.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗魔力[Flask|药剂]充能，以投掷爆炸药剂。

Description.en: Create a fiery explosion, an arcing bolt of lightning, or an icy wave of projectiles. The chance for an explosion is proportional to your [Strength], for a bolt proportional to your [Dexterity], and for a wave proportional to your [Intelligence].
Description.zh: 产生一次剧烈爆炸、一道闪电弧，或者一道投射物冰霜波。爆炸的触发几率与你的[Strength|力量]成正比，闪电弧的触发几率与你的[Dexterity|敏捷]成正比，冰霜波的触发几率与你的[Intelligence|智慧]成正比。

ShortDescription.en: Place a [Banner] that grants [Attack] damage, [Attack] speed and [Accuracy].
ShortDescription.zh: 放置[Banner|旗帜]，提供[Attack|攻击]伤害、[Attack|攻击]速度和[Accuracy|命中值]。

ShortDescription.en: Place a [Banner] that grants [Armour], [Evasion] and movement speed.
ShortDescription.zh: 放置[Banner|旗帜]，提高[Armour|护甲]、[Evasion|闪避]和移动速度。

ShortDescription.en: Place a [Banner] that grants [AilmentThreshold|Elemental Ailment Threshold], [MaximumResistances|Maximum Elemental Resistances] and [Flask] charges.
ShortDescription.zh: 放置[Banner|旗帜]，提供[AilmentThreshold|元素异常状态阈值]、[MaximumResistances|最大元素抗性]和[Flask|药剂]充能。

Description.en: [Mark] a target, making them more susceptible to being [Frozen]. When the [Mark|Marked] target is [Frozen], the [Mark] [MarkActivate|Activates], granting you a [Buff] which gives extra [Cold] damage and [Consume|Consuming] the [Mark]. [Mark|Marking] another target while you have the [Buff] will remove the [Buff].
Description.zh: 给一个目标施加[Mark|印记]，使其更容易受到[Frozen|冻结]。当被施加[Mark|印记]的目标被[Frozen|冻结]时，该[Mark|印记]将[MarkActivate|激活]，你获得一个提供额外[Cold|冰霜]伤害的[Buff|增益状态]，并[Consume|消耗]该[Mark|印记]。若在拥有此[Buff|增益状态]时给另一个目标施加[Mark|印记]，则该[Buff|增益状态]会被移除。

ShortDescription.en: [Mark] a target to be easier to [Freeze], and grant you extra [Cold] damage when [Frozen].
ShortDescription.zh: 给一个目标施加[Mark|印记]，使其更容易受到[Freeze|冻结]，目标被[Frozen|冻结]时，提供额外[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

Description.en: [Mark] a target, making them more susceptible to being [Electrocute|Electrocuted]. When the [Mark|Marked] target is [Electrocute|Electrocuted], the [Mark] [MarkActivate|Activates], granting a [Buff] which gives extra [Lightning] damage and [Consume|Consuming] the [Mark]. [Mark|Marking] another target while you have the [Buff] will remove the [Buff].
Description.zh: 给一个目标施加[Mark|印记]，使其更容易受到[Electrocute|触电]。当被施加[Mark|印记]的目标处于[Electrocute|触电]状态时，该[Mark|印记]将[MarkActivate|激活]，你获得一个提供额外[Lightning|闪电]伤害的[Buff|增益状态]，并[Consume|消耗]该[Mark|印记]。若在拥有此[Buff|增益状态]时给另一个目标施加[Mark|印记]，则该[Buff|增益状态]会被移除。

ShortDescription.en: [Mark] a target to be easier to [Electrocute], and grant you extra [Lightning] damage when [Electrocute|Electrocuted].
ShortDescription.zh: 给一个目标施加[Mark|印记]，使其更容易受到[Electrocute|触电]，目标处于[Electrocute|触电]状态时，提供额外[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Hunt em down
Description.zh: 追捕她们

Description.en: Gain [UnboundFury|Unbound Fury] by inflicting [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] with [HitDamage|Hits] on enemies. Once you reach maximum Unbound Fury, consume it to become Unbound for a duration, vastly augmenting your Elemental prowess.
Description.zh: [HitDamage|击中]对敌人造成[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]时，获得[UnboundFury|不羁狂怒]。当你的不羁狂怒达到上限时，消耗它获得不羁状态，在一段时间内极大增强你的元素能力。

ShortDescription.en: Consume [UnboundFury|Unbound Fury] to augment your elemental prowess.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗[UnboundFury|不羁狂怒]，增强你的元素威力。

Description.en: Dash to an enemy and [Strike] them, triggering socketed [Mark|Marks] with increased effect and applying socketed [Curse|Curses] with increased duration.
Description.zh: 冲向一名敌人并发起[Strike|打击]，以增强效果触发镶嵌的[Mark|印记]，以增强持续时间施加镶嵌的[Curse|诅咒]。

ShortDescription.en: Dash to an enemy and apply socketed [Curse|Curses] and [Mark|Marks].
ShortDescription.zh: 冲向敌人并施加镶嵌的[Curse|诅咒]和[Mark|印记]。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Manifest words of power that freeze the air around you, coating nearby enemies in shards of ice. Dealing enough damage to these enemies will shatter the shards, causing an icy explosion that deals [Attack] damage which is not based on your [MartialWeapon|Weapon].
Description.zh: 施放冻结周围空气的力量之语，将附近的敌人包裹在寒冰碎片中。对这些敌人造成足量伤害就会击碎碎片，引发冰爆，造成[Attack|攻击]伤害，此伤害不基于你的[MartialWeapon|武器]伤害。

Description.en: Manipulate time, resetting the cooldowns of your other Skills.
Description.zh: 操控时间，重置你的其他技能的冷却时间。

ShortDescription.en: Reset the cooldowns of your other Skills.
ShortDescription.zh: 重置你的其他技能的冷却时间。

Description.en: Release a large wave that stops time for all affected enemies for a duration. Duration is lower the more times the enemy has had time stopped for them.
Description.zh: 释放出一道巨大的冲击波，在持续时间内冻结所有受影响敌人的时间。敌人被时间停止的次数越多，持续时间越短。

ShortDescription.en: Briefly stop time for enemies near you.
ShortDescription.zh: 短暂停止你附近敌人的时间。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a demon, vastly boosting the power of your [Spell|Spells]. You gain Demonflame every second you remain in demon form, causing your Life to be lost at an ever-increasing rate. Maximum 10 Demonflame. Revert to human form if you reach 1 Life, use a Skill that isn't a [Spell], or reactivate this Skill.
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]成一个恶魔，大幅增强你的[Spell|法术]。处于恶魔形态下时，你每秒都会获得魔焰焚身，使你以越来越快的速度损失生命，最多 10 层。生命降低至 1，使用非[Spell|法术]技能，或者重新激活此技能时，你都会恢复人类形态。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a demon, boosting the power of your [Spell|Spells] but draining Life.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为一只恶魔，提升你的[Spell|法术]威力但会消耗生命。

Description.en: While active, [Attack|Attacking] enemies builds [Glory]. When you have maximum [Glory], you can place an inspiring [Banner] for a duration with an [Aura] that grants you and nearby [Allies] [Attack] damage, [Attack] speed and [Accuracy].
Description.zh: 激活时，[Attack|攻击]敌人会积蓄[Glory|荣耀]。当你达到最大[Glory|荣耀]时，你可以放置一面鼓舞[Banner|旗帜]，持续一段时间，其[Aura|光环]为你和附近[Allies|友军]提供[Attack|攻击]伤害、[Attack|攻击]速度和[Accuracy|命中值]。

Description.en: While active, [Attack|Attacking] enemies builds [Glory]. When you have maximum [Glory], you can place an inspiring [Banner] for a duration with an [Aura] that grants you and nearby [Allies] [Armour], [Evasion] and movement speed.
Description.zh: 激活时，[Attack|攻击]敌人会积蓄[Glory|荣耀]。当你达到最大[Glory|荣耀]时，你可以放置一面鼓舞[Banner|旗帜]，持续一段时间，其[Aura|光环]为你和附近[Allies|友军]提供[Armour|护甲]、[Evasion|闪避]和移动速度。

Description.en: While active, [Attack|Attacking] enemies builds [Glory]. When you have maximum [Glory], you can place an inspiring [Banner] for a duration with an [Aura] that grants you and nearby [Allies] [AilmentThreshold|Elemental Ailment Threshold], [MaximumResistances|Maximum Elemental Resistances] and [Flask] charges.
Description.zh: 激活时，[Attack|攻击]敌人会积蓄[Glory|荣耀]。当你达到最大[Glory|荣耀]时，你可以放置一面鼓舞[Banner|旗帜]，持续一段时间，其[Aura|光环]为你和附近[Allies|友军]提供[AilmentThreshold|元素异常状态阈值]、[MaximumResistances|最大元素抗性]和[Flask|药剂]充能。

Description.en: While active, periodically invokes divine blessings to heal you and remove [Curse|Curses] and [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] from you.
Description.zh: 激活时，周期性地祈求祝福对你进行治疗，并移除你受到的[Curse|诅咒]和[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]效果。

Description.en: Consume all stacks of [Jade] to grant [Guard] based off your maximum Life for each [Jade] consumed. You cannot gain [Jade] stacks while you have [Guard].
Description.zh: 消耗所有[Jade|青玉护身]层数，每消耗一层[Jade|青玉护身]，获得基于最大生命的[Guard|防卫]。具有[Guard|防卫]时无法获得[Jade|青玉护身]层数。

ShortDescription.en: Consume all stacks of [Jade] to grant [Guard].
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗所有[Jade|青玉护身]层数以获得[Guard|防卫]。

Description.en: While active, visages of yourself from alternate timelines will occasionally appear and cast one of your [Spell|Spells] from your first valid [WeaponSets|Weapon Set]. Until the next visage appears, your next cast of the same [Spell] aligns your fate, [Empowered|Empowering] that [Spell]. Visages can only cast damaging, non-[Channelling], non-[Buff] [Spell|Spells] you could cast that have no cooldown.
Description.zh: 激活时，来自平行时间线的分身会偶尔出现。这些分身会从你的首个有效的[WeaponSets|武器组]中，施放一个你可用的[Spell|法术]。在下一个分身出现前，当下一次施放与分身相同的[Spell|法术]时，你将与之命运同调，从而[Empowered|强化]该[Spell|法术]。分身只能施放你可用的非[Channelling|持续吟唱]、非[Buff|增益状态]且无冷却时间的伤害性[Spell|法术]。

ShortDescription.en: Manifest versions of you that grant benefits to your [Spell] cast if you match their [Spell] cast.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤你的分身，若你施放的[Spell|法术]与分身所施放的相同，那你的[Spell|法术]效果将增强。

Description.en: Send out a temporal [Nova] to take advantage of enemies' moment of vulnerability. [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun], [PrimedElectrocution|Electrocution], or [PrimedFreeze|Freeze] causes a visage of them to appear, lasting as long as the original target would have been affected by the form of [Immobilised|Immobilisation] used to create the visage. A portion of the damage dealt to visages is also dealt to the original.
Description.zh: 释放一道时空[Nova|新星]，利用敌人的脆弱瞬间。[HitDamage|击中]处于[PrimedStun|可被晕眩]、[PrimedElectrocution|可被触电]或[PrimedFreeze|可被冻结]状态的敌人时，会制造一个他们的幻影。幻影的持续时间，与原始目标本应受[Immobilised|不可移动]效果影响的时长相同。对幻影造成的伤害将有一部分传递给原始目标。

ShortDescription.en: Exploit your enemies' vulnerability, creating a visage of them that you can damage.
ShortDescription.zh: 利用敌人的脆弱状态，创造一个你可攻击的敌方幻影。

Description.en: This skill is [Trigger|Triggered] each time you summon a [Totem|Totem], summoning an Ancestral Spirit [Minion] to fight for you. If the Totem dies then the Ancestral Spirit triggered by it's summoning will die too.
Description.zh: 每次召唤[Totem|图腾]时都会[Trigger|触发]该技能，召唤一个先祖之灵[Minion|召唤生物]为你作战。如果图腾被击败，则其召唤的先祖之灵也会随之而亡。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [Freeze], [Shock] or [Ignite] an enemy. Using the Invocation once sufficient [Energy|Energy] is gathered will consume the [Energy|Energy] to trigger socketed [Spell|Spells], and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough [Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你对敌人造成[Freeze|冻结]、[Shock|感电]或[Ignite|点燃]时都会获得[Energy|能量]。积累一定的[Energy|能量]后再次使用该咒祈，即可消耗[Energy|能量]并触发镶嵌的[Spell|法术]。[Energy|能量]足够时可以多次触发。

Description.en: Create a Breach around you, allowing you to see nearby [FlamesOfChayula|Flames of Chayula]. You are considered to be in a Breach while this skill is active.
Description.zh: 在你身旁创造出一道裂隙，使你能够看见附近的[FlamesOfChayula|夏乌拉之焰]。该技能激活时，你被视作处于裂隙之中。

ShortDescription.en: Create a Breach around you, allowing you to see nearby [FlamesOfChayula|Flames of Chayula].
ShortDescription.zh: 在你周围产生裂隙，使你能够看到附近的[FlamesOfChayula|夏乌拉之焰]。

Description.en: While active, causes you to deal more [HitDamage|Hit] damage to [Rarity|Rare] and [Rarity|Unique] enemies the longer you've been fighting them, and gain [CullingStrike|Culling Strike] against them once you've been fighting them for long enough.
Description.zh: 激活时，你与[Rarity|稀有]和[Rarity|传奇]敌人交战的时间越长，对他们造成的[HitDamage|击中]伤害就越高。战斗时间达到一定程度时，你还可以[CullingStrike|终结]他们。

Description.en: Tap into a current of raw and unpredictable [ElementalDamage|Elemental] power, causing you to deal greatly more damage of a randomly chosen [ElementalDamage|Element]. The [ElementalDamage|Element] affected changes frequently, though the same [ElementalDamage|Element] can be affected multiple times in succession.
Description.zh: 运用难以预测、原生纯粹的[ElementalDamage|元素]力量洪流，使你造成的随机一种[ElementalDamage|元素]的伤害大幅提高。受影响的[ElementalDamage|元素]会频繁改变，但同一种[ElementalDamage|元素]可能连续受到多次影响。

Description.en: Instantly reload all your [Crossbow] [Ammunition] clips and [Empowered|Empower] each clip's [Ammunition] to deal more damage for a duration.
Description.zh: 立即装填你所有的[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]匣并[Empowered|强化]每个箭匣的[Ammunition|弹药]，在一段时间内造成更多伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Instantly reload all your [Crossbow] [Ammunition] and [Empowered|Empower] your [Ammunition] with damage.
ShortDescription.zh: 立即装填你所有的[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]并用[Empowered|强化]你的[Ammunition|弹药]伤害。

Description.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that explodes when its fuse expires, throwing out a ring of mini [Grenade|Grenades] that explode when they come to a stop.
Description.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时爆炸，射出一圈在延迟后爆炸的小型[Grenade|榴弹]，落地时发生爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a bouncing [Grenade] that releases miniature grenades when its fuse expires.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一枚弹跳的[Grenade|榴弹]，引线燃尽时爆炸，并释放微型榴弹。

Description.en: While active, you gain powerful [Buff|Buffs] based on your active [Charges]. However, maintaining the [Buff] Consumes [Charges] every few seconds.
Description.zh: 激活时，你会根据激活的[Charges|能量球]而获得强大的[Buff|增益状态]。然而，维持[Buff|增益状态]时每隔几秒都会消耗[Charges|能量球]。

Description.en: While active, [Consume|Consuming] [Freeze], [Shock], [Ignite], or [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour] on an enemy reloads your [Crossbow|Crossbow], restores one cooldown use for your [Grenade|Grenades] and grants a [Buff] causing [Crossbow|Crossbow] [Attack|Attacks] to not consume bolts for a duration. This can only occur once every few seconds.
Description.zh: 技能激活时，[Consume|消耗]敌人身上的[Freeze|冻结]、[Shock|感电]、[Ignite|点燃]或[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]效果会重新装填你的[Crossbow|战弩]、恢复一次[Grenade|榴弹]的冷却，并提供一个[Buff|增益效果]，在持续时间内使[Crossbow|战弩]的[Attack|攻击]不再消耗箭矢。该效果每隔数秒只能触发一次。

Description.en: While active, emits an [Aura] that makes enemies in your [Presence] easier to [Stun] and inflict [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] upon.
Description.zh: 激活时，释放一个[Aura|光环]，使[Presence|在场]的敌人更容易受到[Stun|晕眩]和[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]影响。

Description.en: While active, grants you [Flask] charges passively and causes Life and Mana recovery from your [Flask|Flasks] to also apply to [Allies] in your [Presence].
Description.zh: 激活时，你会被动获得[Flask|药剂]充能，并且[Flask|药剂]的生命和魔力回复也会对[Presence|在场]的[Allies|友军]生效。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you kill an enemy with a [Melee] [Attack]. Using the Invocation once sufficient [Energy|Energy] is gathered will consume the [Energy|Energy] to trigger socketed [Spell|Spells], and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough [Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你用[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]击败敌人时都会获得[Energy|能量]。积累一定的[Energy|能量]后再次使用该咒祈，即可消耗[Energy|能量]并触发镶嵌的[Spell|法术]。[Energy|能量]足够时可以多次触发。

Description.en: While active, your undead [Reviving] [Minion|Minions] can be used in place of [Corpse|Corpses] by your skills, but your [Minion|Minions] [Reviving|Revive] more slowly.
Description.zh: 激活时，你的[Reviving|可复活的]亡灵[Minion|召唤生物]能够替代技能使用的[Corpse|灵柩]，但[Minion|召唤生物]的[Reviving|复活]速度会减慢。

Description.en: While active, causes your Non-[Channelling] [Spell|Spells] to cost additional mana and deal extra [Lightning] damage, both based on your maximum Mana.
Description.zh: 激活时，根据你的魔力上限，你的非[Channelling|吟唱][Spell|法术]会消耗额外的魔力，并造成额外的[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

Description.en: Create [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground] [Ignite|Igniting] Enemies based on a percentage of your Maximum Mana.
Description.zh: 产生[IgnitedGround|点燃地面]将敌人[Ignite|点燃]，效果取决于你的魔力上限的一定比例。

Description.en: Aim skyward and fire energy missiles at lingering bolts or arrows created by other [Lightning] [Attack|Attacks] in front of you. The missiles explode if they land close to a lingering bolt or arrow, dealing more damage in a larger area but destroying that bolt or arrow in the process.
Description.zh: 瞄准天空，发射能量飞弹，落向其他[Lightning|闪电][Attack|攻击]在你前方残留的弩箭或箭矢。飞弹落在残留的弩箭或箭矢附近时会产生爆炸，在较大范围内造成更高的伤害，但也会摧毁残留的弩箭和箭矢。

ShortDescription.en: Fire missiles at bolts and arrows from your other [Lightning] [Attack|Attacks].
ShortDescription.zh: 向你其他[Lightning|闪电][Attack|攻击]残留的弩箭和箭矢发射飞弹。

Description.en: Passively gains [Seal|Seals] over time. Using the skill fires a projectile, and breaks the [Seal|Seals], [Repeat|Repeating] for each of them, and for each additional projectile the skill is given. For each time it [Repeat|Repeats] normally, it will also [Repeat] an additional time targeting a different [IceFragment|Ice Fragment] in its area of effect if able, [DetonationTime|Detonating] those [IceFragment|Ice Fragments] immediately.
Description.zh: 被动随时间获得[Seal|封印]。使用该技能时发射一个投射物，并打破[Seal|封印]，每层封印以及技能赋予的每个额外投射物都会使其[Repeat|重复]。每次正常[Repeat|重复]时，若可能则瞄准其效果范围内的一个不同的[IceFragment|冰霜碎片]，还会额外[Repeat|重复]一次，并立即[DetonationTime|引爆]那些[IceFragment|冰霜碎片]。

ShortDescription.en: Fires a volley of icy missiles.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一轮冰霜导弹。

Description.en: While active, strengthens your [Rage], but causes you to lose Life while not losing [Rage].
Description.zh: 激活时，强化你的[Rage|怒火]，但在未失去[Rage|怒火]时使你损失生命。

Description.en: While active, killing a [Poison|Poisoned] enemy spreads its [Poison] to other nearby enemies, and has a chance to also [Hinder] them.
Description.zh: 激活时，击败[Poison|中毒]的敌人会将其[Poison|中毒]效果扩散给周围的其他敌人，并有几率使他们[Hinder|缓速]。

Description.en: While active, killing an enemy with [BloodLoss|Blood Loss] will cause a bloody explosion that deals [Physical] [Attack] damage to surrounding enemies. This damage is not based on your [MartialWeapon|Weapon], but is partially based on their accumulated [BloodLoss|Blood Loss]. The explosion destroys their [Corpse] if the enemy was [Rarity|Normal or Magic], and has a chance to [Aggravate] [Bleeding].
Description.zh: 激活时，击败[BloodLoss|失血]的敌人会产生一次赤血爆炸，对周围的敌人造成[Physical|物理][Attack|攻击]伤害。此伤害不基于你的[MartialWeapon|武器]，而是部分基于目标累积的[BloodLoss|失血]量。如果是[Rarity|普通或魔法]敌人，还会同时摧毁其[Corpse|灵柩]。爆炸还有几率使[Bleeding|流血]变为[Aggravate|恶性]。

Description.en: While active, emits an [Aura] that periodically [Withered|Withers] enemies in your [Presence].
Description.zh: 激活时，释放一个[Aura|光环]，周期性地对[Presence|在场]的敌人施加[Withered|死亡凋零]。

Description.en: While active and enemies are present, swarms of insects emerge from your body to pursue nearby enemies. The swarms are untargetable [Minion|Minions] that [Attack] and [Poison] enemies.
Description.zh: 激活且有敌人在场时，虫群会从你体内涌出追击附近敌人。虫群是无法被攻击的[Minion|召唤生物]，会[Attack|攻击]并使敌人[Poison|中毒]。

Description.en: While active, firing a ranged [Projectile] [Attack] will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged [Attack|Attacks] for a short duration, then vanish.
Description.zh: 激活时，发动远程[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]将创造一个幻影，该幻影在短时间内使用已镶嵌的远程[Attack|攻击]技能，随后消失。

Description.en: While active, dodge rolling will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged [Attack|Attacks] for a short duration, then vanish.
Description.zh: 激活时，闪避翻滚会创造一个幻影，该幻影在短时间内使用已镶嵌的远程[Attack|攻击]技能，随后消失。

Description.en: While active, grants you a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] when you [Freeze], [Electrocute] or [Pinned|Pin] an enemy. This can only occur once every few seconds.
Description.zh: 激活时，你对敌人造成[Freeze|冻结]、[Electrocute|触电]或[Pinned|定身]时获得一个[Charges|狂怒球]。此效果每隔几秒只能触发一次。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [Block|Block] and triggers socketed [Spell|Spells] on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你[Block|格挡]时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的使[Spell|法术]。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [Block|Block] and triggers socketed [Curse|Curses] on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你[Block|格挡]时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的[Curse|诅咒]。

Description.en: Flip backward and [Channelling|Channel] to charge your [Quarterstaff] with [Lightning]. Releasing dashes towards the target location, damaging enemies along the way. Releasing with [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing] performs a [Lightning]-assisted dash that releases shockwaves from enemies you dash through. [PerfectTiming|Perfectly Timed] dash also explodes Tempest Bells on hit creating a shockwave that deals more damage and has a larger area, leaving [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground] in its wake. This skill cannot be [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosted].
Description.zh: 向后翻腾并[Channelling|持续吟唱]，为你的[Quarterstaff|节杖]注入[Lightning|闪电]之力。释放时冲向目标位置，对沿途的敌人造成伤害。在[PerfectTiming|完美时机]释放会产生[Lightning|闪电]加持的疾冲，从你穿越的敌人处释放出震波。[PerfectTiming|完美时机]的冲刺击中时还会引爆风雷钟，产生一道冲击波，造成更多伤害且范围更大，并在其路径上留下[ShockedGround|感电地面]。此技能无法被[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]。

ShortDescription.en: Charge up a [Lightning] dash that releases shockwaves if [PerfectTiming|Perfectly Timed].
ShortDescription.zh: 蓄力[Lightning|闪电]冲刺，在[PerfectTiming|完美时机]释放时则会产生冲击波。

Description.en: Sacrifice the [Corpse] of a [Rarity|Rare] Monster to grant you its [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers] for a duration, or gain a single random [MonsterModifiers|Modifier] at the cost of your own life force.
Description.zh: 牺牲一个[Rarity|稀有]怪物的[Corpse|灵柩]，使你在一段时间内获得其[MonsterModifiers|词缀]。也可消耗自身的生命力，随机获得一条怪物[MonsterModifiers|词缀]。

ShortDescription.en: Sacrifice the [Corpse] of a [Rarity|Rare] Monster to temporarily grant you its [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers], or gain a random [MonsterModifiers|Modifier] from your own life force.
ShortDescription.zh: 牺牲一个[Rarity|稀有]怪物的[Corpse|灵柩]，使你在一段时间内获得其[MonsterModifiers|词缀]。也可消耗自身的生命力，随机获得一条怪物[MonsterModifiers|词缀]。

Description.en: Enemies in your [Presence] accumulate blood boils periodically. When they die, the boils pop applying [CorruptedBlood|Corrupted Blood] to enemies near them.
Description.zh: [Presence|在场]的敌人周期性地积累沸腾，被击败时产生爆发，对周围的敌人施加[CorruptedBlood|腐化之血]。

Description.en: Stamp your spear, destroying all Bloodstone Lances on each enemy in your [Presence] to cause a damaging explosion around that enemy. Each explosion gains new benefits when reaching higher thresholds of Bloodstone Lances removed from an enemy, causing them to deal more damage, have increased area of effect, and [Leech] Life from enemies caught in the blast.
Description.zh: 重踏你的战矛，引爆你[Presence|在场]范围内每个敌人身上的所有血石长矛，在该敌人周围引发伤害性爆炸。根据从单个敌人身上移除的血石长矛数量所达到的不同阈值，每场爆炸会获得新的强化效果：造成更多伤害、扩大影响范围，并从爆炸波及的敌人身上[Leech|偷取]生命。

ShortDescription.en: Make Bloodstone Lances on enemies in your [Presence] explode.
ShortDescription.zh: 使你[Presence|在场]范围内敌人身上的血石长矛发生爆炸。

Description.en: Call upon Spirits of the Stag, sending them leaping forward. Each Stag releases a damaging shockwave each time it lands, and any Stags that travel the maximum possible distance also leave behind [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground].
Description.zh: 召唤雄鹿之灵，令其向前跃出。每只雄鹿每次落地时，都会释放一道造成伤害的冲击波。任何达到最大跳跃距离的雄鹿还会留下[ShockedGround|感电地面]。

Description.en: Call upon a Bear Spirit [Companion] to maul your foes. The Bear Spirit leaps at enemies to [Maim] them, [Leech|Leeches] Life with its slam, and periodically roars to [Intimidate] enemies. The Bear Spirit does not count toward your [Companion] limit.
Description.zh: 召唤一个熊灵[Companion|伙伴]撕咬你的敌人。熊灵会扑向敌人使其[Maim|瘫痪]，通过猛击[Leech|偷取]生命，并周期性咆哮以[Intimidate|威吓]敌人。熊灵不计入你的[Companion|伙伴]数量上限。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to create fleeting images of your astral self near the target location. The images perform a Socketed [Melee] [Attack] once then vanish, targeting the closest enemy if possible. The images cannot perform [Channelling|Channelled] Skills or [Conditional] Skills. Consuming a [Charges|Power Charge] creates additional images.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]以在目标位置附近创造出你星界自我的短暂影像。影像会执行一次已镶嵌的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能，随后消失，若可能，会优先攻击距离最近的敌人。影像无法施放[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能或具有[Conditional|条件]的技能。消耗一个[Charges|暴击球]可创造额外的影像。

ShortDescription.en: [Channelling|Channel] to create fleeting images of yourself that perform socketed [Attack|Attacks] once then vanish.
ShortDescription.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]以创造出你的短暂影像。影像会执行一次已镶嵌的[Attack|攻击]技能，随后消失。

Description.en: While active, ethereal bells periodically appear near you. Your [HitDamage|Hits] immediately destroy the bells, creating a shockwave that damages nearby enemies and causes a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] on enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun]. The bells are themselves always [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun], they can be [CullingStrike|Culled], and [HitDamage|Hits] against them are always [Critical|Critical Hits].
Description.zh: 激活时，灵体铃铛会定期出现在你附近。你的[HitDamage|击中]会立即摧毁铃铛，产生一道冲击波，对附近敌人造成伤害，并对[PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的敌人造成[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]。铃铛本身始终处于[PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的状态，并且可被[CullingStrike|终结]，且对它们的[HitDamage|击中]总是[Critical|暴击]。

Description.en: Attaches an ethereal bell to your back. [Critical|Critical Hits] with other Skills will cause the bell to ring out, damaging nearby enemies.
Description.zh: 将一个灵体铃铛附着在你的背上。使用其他技能造成[Critical|暴击]时，会使铃铛鸣响，对附近敌人造成伤害。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Pew pew spell
Description.zh: biu biu 法术

Description.en: Applies a socketed [Mark] Skill to a nearby unmarked Enemy every few seconds. [Consume|Consuming] socketed [Mark|Marks] will cause them to be reapplied to an unmarked Enemy. This reapplication can happen at most once every few seconds.
Description.zh: 每隔几秒对附近未被施加印记的敌人施加一个镶嵌的[Mark|印记]技能。[Consume|消耗]镶嵌的[Mark|印记]会使其重新施加到未被施加印记的敌人身上。此类重新施加最多每隔数秒触发一次。

Description.en: Deal [Physical] Area Damage based off of the maximum Life of the [Pinned] target slain.
Description.zh: 根据被击败的[Pinned|定身]目标的生命上限，造成[Physical|物理]范围伤害。

Description.en: Deal [Physical] Area Damage based off of the [ArmourBreak|Broken Armour] of the target which this explosion was [Trigger|Triggered] from.
Description.zh: 根据[Trigger|触发]该爆炸的目标的[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]效果，造成[Physical|物理]范围伤害。

Description.en: [Maim|Maims] and deals [Attack] area damage when triggered by an Enemy. Caltrops are destroyed when triggered, and a maximum of 20 Caltrops can be active at once.
Description.zh: 被敌人触发时造成[Maim|瘫痪]和[Attack|攻击]范围伤害。触发时摧毁铁蒺藜，同一时间最多只能激活 20 个铁蒺藜。

Description.en: [Maim|Maims] and deals [Attack] area damage when triggered by an Enemy. Caltrops are destroyed when triggered, and a maximum of 20 Caltrops can be active at once.
Description.zh: 被敌人触发时造成[Maim|瘫痪]和[Attack|攻击]范围伤害。触发时摧毁铁蒺藜，同一时间最多只能激活 20 个铁蒺藜。

Description.en: Deal [Physical] Damage in an Area based on a percentage of the expected Damage of the [Consume|Consumed] [Bleeding].
Description.zh: 根据[Consume|消耗]的[Bleeding|流血]效果的预期伤害，在区域内造成一定比例的[Physical|物理]伤害。

Description.en: Deal your [Thorns] Damage in an Area. Cannot [HitDamage|Hit] the target this was [Trigger|Triggered] from.
Description.zh: 在一定范围内造成[Thorns|荆棘]伤害，无法[HitDamage|击中][Trigger|触发]该效果的目标。

Description.en: Fire molten [Projectile|Projectiles] from the struck target, which will land nearby dealing [Attack] damage in an area.
Description.zh: 从被击中的目标处发射熔火[Projectile|投射物]，落在周围并造成范围[Attack|攻击]伤害。

Description.en: [Hazard|Hazardous] thorns damage and [Maim] enemies with which they come in contact.
Description.zh: [Hazard|危害性]的荆刺，对与其接触的敌人造成伤害和[Maim|瘫痪]。

Description.en: Attaches a Static Shock to a target that pulses [Lightning] damage to the attached target and nearby enemies. Targets can have a maximum of one Static Shock attached to them.
Description.zh: 将静电脉冲附着于目标，对附着目标及其周围敌人造成持续脉冲[Lightning|闪电]伤害。最多可以给目标附加一个静电脉冲。

Description.en: Deals [Physical] Damage in an area, based on [Totem] Life.
Description.zh: 依据[Totem|图腾]生命值在区域内造成[Physical|物理]伤害。

Description.en: Throw a [Spear] with enough force to kick up a [Whirlwind] where it lands, [Slow|Slowing] enemies and [Blind|Blinding] them in its area of effect. Entering the [Whirlwind] collapses it, dealing damage and causing [Knockback]. Consumes a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] if possible to create the [Whirlwind] with one more than its normal maximum number of stages.
Description.zh: 大力掷出一柄[Spear|战矛]，在落点掀起一阵[Whirlwind|旋风]，使效果范围内的敌人[Slow|减速]和[Blind|致盲]。进入[Whirlwind|旋风]会使其塌缩，造成伤害和[Knockback|击退]。尽量消耗一个[Charges|狂怒球]，并创造层数比最大值要多一层的[Whirlwind|旋风]。

ShortDescription.en: Throw a [Spear] with enough force to kick up a [Whirlwind].
ShortDescription.zh: 投掷[Spear|战矛]，力量足以激起[Whirlwind|旋风]。

Description.en: Consume all [Charges|Frenzy Charges] to perform a gigantic spear thrust that [Knockback|Knocks Back] enemies. For each [Charges|Frenzy Charge] consumed, a Wind Serpent follows in the spear's wake. Each Serpent also damages and [Knockback|Knocks Back] enemies.
Description.zh: 消耗所有[Charges|狂怒球]，发起一次巨型战矛突刺并[Knockback|击退]敌人。每消耗一个[Charges|狂怒球]，就会有一条腾蛇沿着战矛的轨迹行径。每条腾蛇都会对敌人造成伤害和[Knockback|击退]。

ShortDescription.en: Consume [Charges|Frenzy Charges] to create coiling serpents.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗[Charges|狂怒球]，创造出盘绕巨蛇。

Description.en: Dash towards an enemy and perform a lacerating slash, inflicting [Bleeding] on all enemies struck.
Description.zh: 冲向一名敌人并发起裂伤挥斩，对击中的所有敌人造成[Bleeding|流血]。

ShortDescription.en: Dash to an enemy and inflict [Bleeding].
ShortDescription.zh: 冲向敌人并造成[Bleeding|流血]。

Description.en: [Mark] a target, making them suffer [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] build up from [BloodLoss|Blood Loss]. The [Mark] will [MarkActivate|Activate], [Consume|Consuming] itself to [Trigger] Blood Explosion, when they are [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunned], or when they are killed if they suffered enough [BloodLoss|Blood Loss]. The [Mark]'s duration does not expire while the [Mark|Marked] target is suffering [BloodLoss|Blood Loss].
Description.zh: 为一个目标添加[Mark|印记]，使其在[BloodLoss|失血]时获得[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]积蓄。当该目标被[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]时，或者当其承受了足够[BloodLoss|失血]并被击杀时，[Mark|印记]会[MarkActivate|触发]，[Consume|触发]自身以[Trigger|触发]赤血爆炸。携带[Mark|印记]的目标受到[BloodLoss|失血]影响时，[Mark|印记]的持续时间就不会结束。

ShortDescription.en: Mark a target to be [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunned] by [BloodLoss|Blood Loss] and explode on death.
ShortDescription.zh: 为目标添加一个印记，使其因[BloodLoss|失血]而获得[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]并在死亡时爆炸。

Description.en: A violent explosion of blood that deals [Physical] [Attack] damage which is not based on your [MartialWeapon|Weapon]'s damage.
Description.zh: 猛烈的赤血爆炸会造成[Physical|物理][Attack|攻击]伤害，但此伤害不基于你的[MartialWeapon|武器]伤害。

Description.en: Conjure Azmeri wisps to engulf a [Rarity|Rare] [MonsterCategory|Beast] for a duration, [Hinder|Hindering] them. If you defeat the [MonsterCategory|Beast] while it is engulfed in wisps, it will be captured by this gem, transforming the gem to instead allow you to summon the [MonsterCategory|Beast] as a [Reviving] [Companion].
Description.zh: 召唤阿兹莫里的鬼灵在一段时间里环绕一个[Rarity|稀有][MonsterCategory|野兽]，使其[Hinder|缓速]。如果你在鬼灵环绕期间击败了该[MonsterCategory|野兽]，它会被宝石捕获，改变宝石并允许你将[MonsterCategory|野兽]召唤为[Reviving|可复活的][Companion|伙伴]。

ShortDescription.en: Engulf a [Rarity|Rare] [MonsterCategory|Beast] in wisps to capture it on death.
ShortDescription.zh: 用鬼灵环绕[Rarity|稀有][MonsterCategory|野兽]，在击败它时将其捕获。

Description.en: Build [Glory] by inflicting [Freeze], [Shock] or [Ignite] on enemies. When you have maximum [Glory] you may call forth the Azmeri goddess Solaris, jumping backwards and throwing your [Spear] in the air. On landing the spear deals heavy damage in an area, then calls a divine skybeam that pulses periodically and creates expanding [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground]. Modifiers to number of [Projectile|Projectiles] fired do not apply to this skill.
Description.zh: 对敌人施加[Freeze|冻结], [Shock|感电]或[Ignite|点燃]来累积[Glory|荣耀]。[Glory|荣耀]达到满值后，你可以呼唤阿兹莫里的日耀女神，向后跳跃并将[Spear|战矛]掷向高空。落地时战矛在一定范围内造成高额伤害，随后降下一道神圣光束周期性地产生脉冲，并创造不断扩大的[IgnitedGround|点燃地面]。调整[Projectile|投射物]数量的词缀不对该技能生效。

ShortDescription.en: Build [Glory], then call down a skybeam from Solaris herself.
ShortDescription.zh: 累积[Glory|荣耀]，召唤来自日耀女神本人的苍穹光束。

Description.en: Throw an electrified [Spear] that lodges in the ground and periodically zaps nearby enemies with [Lightning] bolts. If the [Spear] is [Detonator|Detonated] by another Skill, it immediately unleashes a volley of bolts and expires. Consumes a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] if possible to fire bolts more frequently for a shorter duration, automatically Detonate at the end of its duration, and create [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground] on Detonation.
Description.zh: 掷出一柄电化[Spear|战矛]并嵌入地面，周期性地用[Lightning|闪电]震击周围的敌人。如果[Spear|战矛]被其他技能[Detonator|引爆]，则会立即释放出一阵闪电并消失。尽量消耗一个[Charges|狂怒球]，使其在短时间内以更高的频率射出闪电，并在持续时间结束时自动引爆，引爆时还会产生[ShockedGround|感电地面]。

ShortDescription.en: Throw an electrified [Spear] that lodges in the ground and periodically zaps enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 投掷带电[Spear|战矛]，插入地面并定期电击敌人。

Description.en: Ready your [Buckler] to parry the next [HitDamage|Hit] you would take, [Block|Blocking] the [HitDamage|Hit] and retaliating with a quick sweep that leaves enemies off balance, causing them to take massively increased [Attack] damage for a short duration. Parrying causes you to accumulate [HeavyStunPlayer|Heavy Stun] buildup. You cannot [Evasion|Evade] a [HitDamage|Hit] you could parry, but [Evasion] instead grants an equal chance to avoid this [HeavyStunPlayer|Heavy Stun] buildup.
