Description.zh: 举起[Buckler|轻盾]招架下一次[HitDamage|击中]，[Block|格挡]该次[HitDamage|击中]，并以迅猛的横扫进行反击，使敌人失去平衡，使其在短时间内受到的[Attack|攻击]伤害大幅提高。招架会使你获得[HeavyStunPlayer|重度晕眩]积蓄。你无法[Evasion|闪避]可招架的[HitDamage|击中]，但[Evasion|闪避]使你有同等的几率避免产生[HeavyStunPlayer|重度晕眩]积蓄。

ShortDescription.en: Parry incoming [HitDamage|Hits] and leave the enemy off balance.
ShortDescription.zh: 招架来袭的[HitDamage|击中]，并使敌人失去平衡。

Description.en: Perform an icy stab that exploits enemies who are already off balance. Hitting a [ParriedDebuff|Parried] target [Consume|Consumes] the [Debuff] to cause an explosion of frost and leave [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground].
Description.zh: 把握敌人失衡的时机，趁势发起寒冰戳刺。击中[ParriedDebuff|被招架]的目标会[Consume|消耗]该[Debuff|减益状态]，产生寒冰爆炸并留下[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]。

ShortDescription.en: Stab an enemy and cause an explosion from [ParriedDebuff|Parried] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 刺击敌人，并在[ParriedDebuff|被招架]的敌人身上造成爆炸。

Description.en: Plunge your [Spear] into the ground to emit a pulse that [Consume|Consumes] [Freeze], [Shock] and [Ignite] on a number of nearby enemies, [Allies] and [Corpse|Corpses]. The pulse itself deals no damage, but each [ElementalAilments|Ailment] [Consume|Consumed] causes an explosion of the corresponding elemental damage type.
Description.zh: 将[Spear|战矛]刺入大地并释放一股脉冲，[Consume|消耗]周围多个敌人、[Allies|友军]和[Corpse|灵柩]的[Freeze|冻结]、[Shock|感电]和[Ignite|点燃]。脉冲本身不造成伤害，但每[Consume|消耗]一个[ElementalAilments|异常状态]都会引发一次对应元素类型的爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: [Consume] [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] to cause explosions.
ShortDescription.zh: [Consume|消耗][ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]以造成爆炸。

Description.en: Summon a [Reviving] [MonsterCategory|Beast] [Companion] to aid you in combat.
Description.zh: 召唤一个[Reviving|可复活的][MonsterCategory|野兽][Companion|伙伴]协助你作战。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when one of your [Charm|Charms] is used and triggers socketed [Spell|Spells] on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你使用[Charm|咒符]时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的使[Spell|法术]。

Description.en: Become attuned to all [ElementalDamage|Elements] building up Fire, Cold and Lightning [Affinity] based off the highest [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] type dealt by your [HitDamage|Hits]. Your [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] is enhanced the more [Affinity] of any type you have.
Description.zh: 与所有[ElementalDamage|元素]协同如一，根据你的[HitDamage|击中]造成的最高[ElementalDamage|元素伤害]类型，积蓄火焰、冰霜和闪电[Affinity|亲和]。你拥有任意类型的[Affinity|亲和]越多，你的[ElementalDamage|元素伤害]越高。

Description.en: Throw a single [Pierce|Piercing] lance that leaves icy fragments in its wake. The fragments [Chill] nearby enemies. Consumes a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] if possible to cause the glacial fragments created by the first [Projectile] to explode outwards after a short duration, peppering enemies with shrapnel.
Description.zh: 投掷一柄[Pierce|穿透]战矛，在其轨迹上留下冰霜碎片。碎片对附近敌人施加[Chill|冰缓]。若可能消耗一个[Charges|狂怒球]，使第一个[Projectile|投射物]产生的冰川碎片会在短暂延迟后向外爆炸，用破片轰击敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Throw a single [Pierce|Piercing] lance that leaves icy fragments in its wake.
ShortDescription.zh: 投掷一支[Pierce|穿透]长矛，在其轨迹上留下冰霜碎片。

Description.en: Perform a [Lightning]-charged stab that can be chained into a combination of up to three attacks. The first two attacks conjure a charging Wildwood spirit if they [HitDamage|Hit] a [Shock|Shocked] enemy and refresh [Shock] duration. The third attack is a large swipe that inflicts [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Exposure], and can [Consume] [Shock] to conjure a stampede of spirits.
Description.zh: 发动一次充满[Lightning|闪电]之力的刺击，可放出最多三段连招。前两次攻击若[HitDamage|击中]带有[Shock|感电]的敌人，将召唤一个蓄力的荒林之灵，并刷新[Shock|感电]的持续时间。第三击为大范围挥砍，造成[ElementalDamage|元素][Exposure|曝露]，并可[Consume|消耗][Shock|感电]来召唤奔腾而出的灵体群。

ShortDescription.en: Perform a combo of [Spear] attacks that can conjure Wildwood spirits from [Shock|Shocked] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 进行[Spear|战矛]攻击连击，可借助[Shock|感电]敌人召唤荒林之灵。

Description.en: Dash to an enemy and run them through, [CullingStrike|Culling] enemies if their life is low enough. If this [Attack] kills at least one enemy, it grants you a [Charges|Frenzy Charge], with higher [Rarity] monsters granting additional [Charges]. Enemies around you that can be [CullingStrike|Culled] will be highlighted.
Description.zh: 冲刺并刺穿敌人，若其生命足够低则触发[CullingStrike|终结]。若此[Attack|攻击]至少击败一名敌人，将为你提供一个[Charges|狂怒球]，击败高[Rarity|稀有度]的怪物可以获得额外[Charges|暴击球]。周围可以被[CullingStrike|终结]的敌人会被标亮

ShortDescription.en: Dash to an enemy and kill near-death enemies instantly to gain at least one [Charges|Frenzy Charge].
ShortDescription.zh: 冲向敌人并立即击败濒死敌人，并获得至少一个[Charges|狂怒球]。

Description.en: Grants your weapon [Surge|Surges]. Non-[Melee] [Projectile] [Attack|Attacks] with that weapon Consume [Surge|Surges] to cause the [Projectile|Projectiles] fired to explode at the end of their flight.
Description.zh: 使你的武器获得[Surge|涌动]效果。该武器的非[Melee|近战][Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]会消耗[Surge|涌动]，使发射的[Projectile|投射物]在飞行结束时爆炸。

Description.en: Grants your weapon [Surge|Surges]. Non-[Melee] [Projectile] [Attack|Attacks] with that weapon Consume [Surge|Surges] to cause the [Projectile|Projectiles] fired to explode at the end of their flight.
Description.zh: 使你的武器获得[Surge|涌动]效果。该武器的非[Melee|近战][Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]会消耗[Surge|涌动]，使发射的[Projectile|投射物]在飞行结束时爆炸。

Description.en: While active, scatters caltrops in your wake when you dodge.
Description.zh: 激活时，你在闪避翻滚时会在身后抛下铁蒺藜。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [HitDamage|Hit] enemies with [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] and triggers socketed [Lightning] spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你使用[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]敌人时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的[Lightning|闪电]法术。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [HitDamage|Hit] enemies with [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] and triggers socketed [Fire] spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你使用[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]敌人时会获得[Energy|能量]，达到[Energy|能量]上限后触发镶嵌的[Fire|火焰]法术。

Description.en: Manifest a copy of your main hand [Melee] [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon] as an immortal [Companion] to fight by your side. In addition to its standard [Strike|Strikes], the Manifested Weapon gains an additional [Attack] depending on its weapon type.
Description.zh: 显化主手[Melee|近战][MartialWeapon|战斗武器]的复制体，使其作为不朽的[Companion|伙伴]协助你作战。除了基础[Strike|打击]外，显化武器根据其武器类型获得额外[Attack|攻击]。

Description.en: Recruit artillery [Minion|Minions] that take up positions behind you. They will lie in wait for your [Command], then fire volleys of arrows at the target location.
Description.zh: 招募炮兵[Minion|召唤生物]在你的身后就位。他们会等待你发出[Command|命令]，随后向目标位置射出箭雨。

Description.en: Fires a flare at a target location, attaching to an enemy if it lands on one, then launches a series of arrow volleys centred around the flare.
Description.zh: 向目标位置发射一枚信号弹，落在敌人处时附着在其身上，随后以信号弹为中心发射一连串的箭雨。

ShortDescription.en: Signal your artillery squad to fire volleys.
ShortDescription.zh: 指挥你的火力小队发射齐射。

Description.en: [Command] part of your flock to leave and crash through a set of illusory mirrors, [Attack|Attacking] enemies in the area between the mirrors with frequent [HitDamage|Hits].
Description.zh: [Command|命令]你的部分鸦群冲破一组幻镜，以频繁的[HitDamage|击中][Attack|攻击]幻镜之间区域内的敌人。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] some your flock to crash through a set of illusory mirrors, attacking enemies between them.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]你的部分鸦群冲破一组幻镜，攻击幻镜之间区域内的敌人。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to temper your main hand [Melee] [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon]. Each hit of the hammer against the anvil [Empowered|Empowers] subsequent [Attack|Attacks] to Combust when [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]以淬炼你的主手[Melee|近战][MartialWeapon|战斗武器]。锤子每次击打铁砧都会[Empowered|强化]后续的[Attack|攻击]，使其在[HitDamage|击中]敌人时触发燃尽。

ShortDescription.en: [Empowered|Empower] your weapon to cause explosions on [HitDamage|Hit].
ShortDescription.zh: [Empowered|强化]你的武器，使其[HitDamage|击中]时造成爆炸。

Description.en: Explode, dealing [Fire] damage in an area.
Description.zh: 爆炸，造成范围[Fire|火焰]伤害。

Description.en: While active, grants a skill that you can use to instantly begin [ESRecharge|Recharging] [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] and gain a [Buff] for a duration that prevents that [ESRecharge|Recharge] being interrupted. The [Buff] is removed at maximum [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] and the skill cannot be used while [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] is full.
Description.zh: 激活时，获得一个技能，可以使[EnergyShield|能量护盾]立即开始[ESRecharge|充能]，并获得一个持续一段时间的[Buff|增益状态]，使[ESRecharge|充能]不会被打断。[EnergyShield|能量护盾]达到上限时移除[Buff|增益状态]，并且[EnergyShield|能量护盾]为满时不能使用该技能。

ShortDescription.en: Begin [ESRecharge|Recharging] [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] and prevent it from being interrupted.
ShortDescription.zh: 开始[ESRecharge|充能][EnergyShield|能量护盾]并防止被打断。

Description.en: Direct your finned companion to feast upon another player's pet.
Description.zh: 指示你的有鳍伙伴吃掉另一名玩家的宠物。

ShortDescription.en: Direct your finned companion to feast upon another player's pet.
ShortDescription.zh: 指示你的有鳍伙伴吃掉另一名玩家的宠物。

Description.en: Grants your weapon [Surge|Surges]. Non-[Melee] [Projectile] [Attack|Attacks] with that weapon Consume [Surge|Surges] to cause the [Projectile|Projectiles] fired to explode at the end of their flight.
Description.zh: 使你的武器获得[Surge|涌动]效果。该武器的非[Melee|近战][Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]会消耗[Surge|涌动]，使发射的[Projectile|投射物]在飞行结束时爆炸。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and perform a wide slash with your wingtip claws. Consumes a [Charges|Power Charge] if possible to grant you a [Buff] that gives you extra [Lightning] damage. While you have the [Buff], Rend covers a much larger area but is slower.
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]，挥动翼尖利爪对前方大范围发动扫击。若可能则消耗一个[Charges|暴击球]，为你带来[Buff|增益状态]，可获得额外[Lightning|闪电]伤害。处于[Buff|增益状态]时，龙爪撕裂的范围大幅扩大，但速度会减慢。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and perform a wide slash with your wingtip claws.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]，挥动翼尖利爪对前方大范围发动扫击。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and launch yourself backwards with a powerful wingbeat that [Knockback|Knocks Back] enemies. Enemies [PrimedStun|Primed] for [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] will be stunned, release a shockwave, and have a chance to grant you a [Charges|Power Charge]. This skill can be used while using other skills to interrupt them.
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]，借助强力的振翅向后腾跃，对敌人造成[Knockback|击退]。[PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的敌人将遭受[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]，同时释放震波，并为你提供一个[Charges|暴击球]。此技能可在施放其他技能时强制中断并立即发动。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and launch yourself backwards, [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunning] [PrimedStun|Primed] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]，借助强力的振翅向后腾跃，[PrimedStun|可被晕眩]的敌人将遭受[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]。

Description.en: This skill creates a toad that jumps around briefly, then explodes the toad, dealing [Attack] damage in an area and inflicting [Poison].  Damage you deal with skill is not based on your [MartialWeapon|Weapon]
Description.zh: 创造一只短暂跳跃的蟾蜍，随后蟾蜍爆炸，对范围内造成[Attack|攻击]伤害并施加[Poison|中毒]。该技能造成的伤害不基于你的[MartialWeapon|武器]。

ShortDescription.en: A toad hops towards enemies and explodes, dealing damage in an area.
ShortDescription.zh: 一只毒蟾跃向敌人并爆炸，造成范围伤害。

Description.en: [Command] Navira to create a bubble shield which absorbs a portion of the damage dealt by enemies standing outside the shield. The maximum amount of damage that can be absorbed is based on your maximum Mana. If the shield is destroyed by damage, it collapses into a patch of [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground].
Description.zh: [Command|命令]纳薇拉制造一个气泡护盾，可吸收位于护盾外的敌人所造成伤害的一部分。护盾可吸收的伤害上限取决于你的魔力上限。若护盾因承受伤害被摧毁，将坍缩形成一片[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] Navira to create a bubble shield based on your maximum Mana.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]纳薇拉基于你的你的魔力上限制造一个气泡护盾。

Description.en: [Command] Navira to fracture all nearby areas of [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground] that have enemies standing on them, doing high [Spell] damage with extreme [Freeze] potential.
Description.zh: [Command|命令]纳薇拉碎裂所有附近有敌人站立其上的[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]区域，造成高额[Spell|法术]伤害并附带极高的[Freeze|冻结]可能性。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] Navira to fracture nearby areas of [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground].
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]纳薇拉碎裂附近的[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]区域。

Description.en: [Command] Navira to turn nearby [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground] into Navira's Oasis, a mirage which grants you and [Allies] standing in it [Flask] charges and damage [Recoup|Recouped] as Life and Mana. [Plant|Plants] in the area become [Plant|Overgrown].
Description.zh: [Command|命令]纳薇拉将附近的[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]转化为纳薇拉绿洲，这是一片幻景，可为你和身处其中的[Allies|友军]提供[Flask|药剂]充能、并将所受伤害[Recoup|吸纳]为生命与魔力。区域内的[Plant|植物]将变为[Plant|蔓生]状态。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] Navira to turn nearby [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground] into Navira's Oasis, granting [Flask] charges and damage [Recoup|Recouped] as Life and Mana.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]纳薇拉将附近的[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]转化为纳薇拉绿洲，提供[Flask|药剂]充能，并将所受伤害[Recoup|吸纳]为生命与魔力。

Description.en: [Command] Kelari to throw a volley of knives at the target location. The knives burrow into the ground, then erupt into the air after a short delay, dealing [Spell] damage.
Description.zh: [Command|命令]凯拉里向目标地点投掷一连串匕首。匕首将钻入地下，短暂延迟后从地底喷发出来，造成[Spell|法术]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Command Kelari to throw a volley of erupting knives.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]凯拉里投掷一连串会从地底喷发出来的匕首。

Description.en: [Command] Kelari to create a blast at the target location that deals [Spell] damage, and leave behind a clone that persists for a short duration. This skill can store multiple charges, and using it again while a clone from a previous use is still alive causes that clone to explode, dealing even more damage.
Description.zh: [Command|命令]凯拉里在目标位置引发一次造成[Spell|法术]伤害的爆发，并留下一个持续短暂时间的分身。该技能可储存多次充能。若前一次创造的分身仍存在时再次使用此技能，将导致该分身爆炸，造成更高的伤害。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] Kelari to create an explosive clone at the target location.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]凯拉里在目标位置创造一个会爆炸的分身。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] and [Command] Kelari to [Channelling|Channel] alongside you, creating blades that hang over the target location. The longer you [Channelling|Channel], the more blades Kelari will create. Upon release, his blades plunge into the ground and create shockwaves that deal [Spell] damage.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]并[Command|命令]凯拉里与你一同[Channelling|持续吟唱]，在目标位置上方凝聚悬浮的刀刃。你的[Channelling|持续吟唱]时间越长，凯拉里创造的刀刃就越多。释放时，所有刀刃将猛然插入地面并引发造成[Spell|法术]伤害的多道震波。

ShortDescription.en: [Channelling|Channel] and [Command] Kelari to create floating blades that slam into the ground on release.
ShortDescription.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]并[Command|命令]凯拉里创造悬浮的刀刃，释放时将其砸向地面。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] your Corpse Beetles to rush the target and explode.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]你的灵柩甲虫冲向目标并自爆。

Description.en: [Command] Ruzhan to place a fiery brand on an enemy. After a delay or when [Detonator|Detonated], the brand explodes, dealing [Spell] damage to enemies caught in the blast.
Description.zh: [Command|命令]鲁詹在敌人身上烙下一个火焰印记。该印记将在短暂延迟后或受到[Detonator|引爆]时爆炸，对爆炸范围内的敌人造成[Spell|法术]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] Ruzhan to place an explosive brand on an enemy.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]鲁詹在敌人身上放置一个会爆炸的印记。

Description.en: [Command] Ruzhan to hurl his greatsword, spreading hazardous runes on the ground where it lands. If an enemy steps on a rune, it erupts in a fiery tornado that deals [Spell] damage.
Description.zh: [Command|命令]鲁詹投掷其巨剑，在落地点散布危险的符文。若有敌人踩到符文，将爆发出造成[Spell|法术]伤害的火焰龙卷风。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] Ruzhan to spread runes that erupt in a fiery tornado when stepped on.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]鲁詹散布符文，被踩踏时会爆发出火焰龙卷风。

Description.en: [Command] Ruzhan to teleport to the target location. Upon arrival, the Djinn deals [Spell] damage to enemies around him then slams his blazing sword into the ground, creating a wave of lava that also deals [Spell] damage.
Description.zh: [Command|命令]鲁詹传送至目标地点。抵达时，巨灵将对周围敌人造成[Spell|法术]伤害，随后用其燃烧的巨剑猛击地面，创造一道同样造成[Spell|法术]伤害的熔岩波。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] Ruzhan to teleport to the target location and create a wave of lava.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]鲁詹传送至目标地点并创造一道熔岩波。

Description.en: [Command] Ruzhan to conjure two volleys of flaming embers and fire them forward. The embers explode on impact, dealing [Spell] damage.
Description.zh: [Command|命令]鲁詹凝聚两波炽热余烬，并将其向前发射。余烬在撞击时爆炸，造成[Spell|法术]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] Ruzhan to conjure two volleys of flaming embers, before firing them forward.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]鲁詹凝聚两波炽热余烬，随后将其向前发射。

Description.en: When you use a damaging Skill, Ruzhan emerges to [Strike] enemies near your target with zealous fervour, inflicting [Exposure].
Description.zh: 每当你使用伤害技能时，鲁詹会以狂热的姿态出现在你的目标附近，对敌人发动[Strike|打击]，并施加[Exposure|曝露]效果。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and spit [Oil] at enemies, creating [OilGround|Oil Ground] where the [Projectile|Projectiles] land. Consumes [Charges|Power Charges] if possible to instead [Channelling|Channel] a sustained barrage of electrified [Oil] that does not create [OilGround|Oil Ground]. [Projectile|Projectiles] are fired in sequence, allowing multiple [Projectile|Projectiles] to [HitDamage|Hit] the same target.
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]，向敌人喷吐[Oil|黏油]，在[Projectile|投射物]的落点生成[OilGround|黏油地面]。若可能则消耗一个[Charges|暴击球]，转为[Channelling|持续吟唱]喷吐带电的[Oil|黏油]炮弹，此模式下不会产生[OilGround|黏油地面]。[Projectile|投射物]将依次发射，允许多枚[Projectile|投射物][HitDamage|击中]同一目标。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and spit [Oil] at enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]，向敌人喷吐[Oil|黏油]。

Description.en: While active, stores a percentage of the [Physical] damage that is prevented by your [Armour] or other sources of damage reduction. Using this Skill releases the stored damage as a nova of spikes.
Description.zh: 激活时，储存被你的[Armour|护甲]或其他伤害减免来源阻挡的[Physical|物理]伤害的一定百分比。使用此技能会以尖刺新星的形式释放储存的伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Releases stored [Physical] damage in a nova of spikes.
ShortDescription.zh: 以尖刺新星的形式释放储存的[Physical|物理]伤害。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and take to the skies, immolating enemies with a jet of fire. [Channelling] ends after a short amount of time but can be prolonged by spending [Rage]. Consumes a [Charges|Power Charge] if possible to [Empowered|Empower] the Skill, [Gain|Gaining] extra [Lightning] damage and spending [Rage] more slowly.
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]并腾空，以火焰灼烧敌人。[Channelling|持续吟唱]会在短时间内结束，但可通过消耗[Rage|怒火]延长持续时间。若可能则消耗一个[Charges|暴击球]来[Empowered|强化]此技能，[Gain|获得]额外[Lightning|闪电]伤害并减缓[Rage|怒火]消耗速度。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and take to the skies, immolating enemies with a jet of fire.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]并腾空，以火焰灼烧敌人。

Description.en: Conjures a rootbound fissure that crawls forward, damaging enemies in its path. While the fissure persists, vines lash out from it and attach to nearby enemies, damaging and [Slow|Slowing] them.
Description.zh: 召唤藤蔓向前爬行，沿途对敌人造成伤害。藤蔓存在期间会抽打并附着于附近敌人，造成伤害并使其[Slow|减速]。

ShortDescription.en: Conjures roots that attach [Slow|Slowing] vines to enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤藤蔓，其藤丝会附着在敌人身上，造成[Slow|减速]。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and lash out with a flurry of claw swipes. The first [Attack] can dash to faraway enemies and the final [Attack] [Strike|Strikes] twice. [Attack|Attacking] a [Frozen] enemy will create [IceFragment|Ice Fragments], which are [Projectile|Projectiles] that land and explode after a short delay.
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，挥出一连串爪击。首次[Attack|攻击]可冲刺至远处敌人，末次[Attack|攻击]将连续[Strike|打击]两次。[Attack|攻击][Frozen|冻结]的敌人将生成[IceFragment|冰霜碎片]，这些碎片作为[Projectile|投射物]将在短暂延迟后落地并爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and lash out with a flurry of claw swipes, creating [IceFragment|Ice Fragments] against [Frozen] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，挥出一连串爪击，攻击[Frozen|冻结]的敌人将生成[IceFragment|冰霜碎片]。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Bear] and repeatedly pound the ground, creating [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures] that travel randomly in a wide arc in front of you.
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Bear|巨熊]，连续重击地面，在前方大范围弧形区域内生成随机游走的[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Bear] and repeatedly pound the ground to create [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures] and generate [Rage].
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Bear|巨熊]，连续重击地面，生成[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]并积累[Rage|怒火]。

Description.en: [Mark] a target, causing it to take increased damage based on how many of the target's enemies are near to it. If the target dies, the [Mark] will [MarkActivate|Activate] to [Trigger] the Summon Wolf skill and [Consume] the [Mark].
Description.zh: 给一个目标施加[Mark|印记]，使其承受的伤害提高，增幅取决于目标周围敌人数量。若目标死亡，该[Mark|印记]将[MarkActivate|激活]，[Trigger|触发]召唤巨狼技能，并[Consume|消耗]该[Mark|印记]。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and leap backwards as you gouge the ground with both claws. Enemies can be [HitDamage|Hit] separately by both gouges. [HitDamage|Hitting] a [Mark|Marked] enemy with both gouges will [MarkActivate|Activate] the [Mark] and cause an additional shockwave. [IceFragment|Ice Fragments] will be pulled into the location where the gouges cross and explode immediately. This skill can be used while using other skills to interrupt them.
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，向后腾跃的同时用双爪刨抓地面。双爪可分别[HitDamage|命中]敌人。若以双爪[HitDamage|击中]同一个被施加[Mark|印记]的敌人，将[MarkActivate|激活]该[Mark|印记]，并引发一道额外震波。[IceFragment|冰霜碎片]将被吸附至爪痕交汇处并立即引爆。此技能可在施放其他技能时强制中断并立即发动。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and leap backwards as you gouge the ground with both claws
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，向后腾跃的同时用双爪刨抓地面。

Description.en: Consume all [Charges|Power Charges] to master the elements, gaining [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] and the ability to apply [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] with other damage types. Can only be used while you have maximum [Charges|Power Charges].
Description.zh: 消耗所有[Charges|暴击球]，掌控元素之力，获得[ElementalDamage|元素伤害]并使你的其他伤害类型可附带[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]。仅可在拥有最大[Charges|暴击球]时使用。

ShortDescription.en: Consume all [Charges|Power Charges] to augment your [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] and [ElementalAilments|Ailment] application.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗所有[Charges|暴击球]，强化你的[ElementalDamage|元素伤害]与[ElementalAilments|异常]施加能力。

Description.en: Unleashes a torrent of anguish that bombard the target area, dealing damage in an area on impact. Does not use [Ammunition] and can be fired freely until the Requiem ends.
Description.zh: 释放一连串痛苦洪流轰炸目标区域，造成范围伤害。不会消耗[Ammunition|弹药]，在镇魂曲结束前可无限发射。

ShortDescription.en: Unleashes a torrent of anguish that bombard the target area.
ShortDescription.zh: 释放一连串痛苦洪流轰炸目标区域。

Description.en: Your weapon passively accumulates anguish from the tormented souls within. When fully charged, use this skill to compose the Requiem, transforming your [Crossbow] shot into a torrent of anguish for a short, fixed amount of time. Does not use [Ammunition].
Description.zh: 你的武器中会向其中的受难之魂缓慢灌注痛苦。蓄满后可施放该技能，谱写镇魂曲，将你的[Crossbow|战弩]射击转化为短时间内的痛苦洪流。不会消耗[Ammunition|弹药]。

ShortDescription.en: Passively accumulate anguish, then activate to unleash it with your [Crossbow] shot.
ShortDescription.zh: 被动积蓄痛苦，随后激活以用[Crossbow|战弩]射击释放痛苦洪流。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and swipe with your claws, projecting an arc of moonlight and ice forward in a crescent.
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，挥动利爪向前方投射一道新月状的月光寒冰弧线。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and [Strike] with an arc of moonlight and ice.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，用月光寒冰弧线[Strike|打击]敌人。

Description.en: [Chill|Chills] all enemies in your [Presence].
Description.zh: [Chill|冰缓]你[Presence|在场]范围内的所有敌人。

Description.en: Conjure Azmeri wisps to engulf a [Rarity|Rare] [MonsterCategory|Beast] for a duration, [Hinder|Hindering] them. If you defeat the [MonsterCategory|Beast] while it is engulfed in wisps, it will be captured by this gem, transforming the gem to instead allow you to summon the [MonsterCategory|Beast] as a [Reviving] [Companion].
Description.zh: 召唤阿兹莫里的鬼灵在一段时间里环绕一个[Rarity|稀有][MonsterCategory|野兽]，使其[Hinder|缓速]。如果你在鬼灵环绕期间击败了该[MonsterCategory|野兽]，它会被宝石捕获，改变宝石并允许你将[MonsterCategory|野兽]召唤为[Reviving|可复活的][Companion|伙伴]。

ShortDescription.en: Engulf a [Rarity|Rare] [MonsterCategory|Beast] in wisps to capture it on death.
ShortDescription.zh: 用鬼灵环绕[Rarity|稀有][MonsterCategory|野兽]，在击败它时将其捕获。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and devour a [Corpse] or [CullingStrike|Cullable] enemy, and additional nearby [Corpse|Corpses]. For each enemy or corpse devoured, you regenerate life and gain a [Charges|Power Charge]. If the target is far enough away, you will leap to them and damage nearby enemies where you land. Targeting nearby enemies or corpses will not perform a leap or a [Slam].
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]，吞噬一具[Corpse|灵柩]或可被[CullingStrike|终结]的敌人，并额外吞噬附近其他[Corpse|灵柩]。每吞噬一个敌人或灵柩，你都将回复生命并获得一个[Charges|暴击球]。若目标距离足够远，将飞跃至其位置并对落点周围敌人造成伤害。以附近敌人或灵柩为目标时，则不会跳跃或[Slam|猛击]。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Wyvern] and devour a [Corpse] or [CullingStrike|Cullable] enemy to heal and gain a [Charges|Power Charge].
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Wyvern|双足飞龙]，吞噬一具[Corpse|灵柩]或可被[CullingStrike|终结]的敌人，以恢复生命值并获得一个[Charges|暴击球]。

Description.en: Spur the growth of huge vines, which emerge randomly within the target area. The vines crash to the ground then retreat, targeting nearby enemies if possible.
Description.zh: 催生巨型藤蔓，在目标区域内随机破土而出。藤蔓将猛力砸向地面后缩回，并尽可能攻击附近的敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Conjure huge vines to crash down on enemies in the target area.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤巨型藤蔓猛砸目标区域内的敌人。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and offer your [Rage] to the moon to receive a blessing, gaining bonus [Cold] damage for yourself and any Wolf [Minion|Minions] you have from Wolf Pack or Predator's Mark. Spends all [Rage] to extend the [Buff]'s duration. While the [Buff] is active, your [Werewolf] [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] call down Moonbeams on [HitDamage|Hit].
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，将你的[Rage|怒火]献祭给月神以获得赐福，为你自身以及通过狼群或掠食者印记获得的狼类[Minion|召唤生物]获得额外[Cold|冰霜]伤害。消耗全部[Rage|怒火]以延长该[Buff|增益状态]的持续时间。当[Buff|增益状态]生效时，你的[Werewolf|狼人][Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]会在[HitDamage|击中]时召唤出月华碎影。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and offer your [Rage] to the moon to receive a powerful blessing.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，将你的[Rage|怒火]献祭给月神以获得强大赐福。

Description.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and let out an icy howl that damages enemies and [Freeze|Freezes] [PrimedFreeze|Primed] enemies. If an enemy is [Frozen] or a [Frozen] enemy is [HitDamage|Hit], this Skill [Empowered|Empowers] your attacks with added [Cold] damage, causes [Empowered] [Slam|Slams] to create [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground], and grants your [Allies] added [Cold] damage. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an [Charges|Endurance Charge].
Description.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，发出凛冽嚎叫对敌人造成伤害，并[Freeze|冻结]处于[PrimedFreeze|可被冻结]状态的敌人。如果敌人被[Frozen|冻结]或[HitDamage|击中]被[Frozen|冻结]的敌人，此技能将[Empowered|强化]你的攻击，为其附加[Cold|冰霜]伤害，使[Empowered|强化]的[Slam|猛击]产生[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]，同时为[Allies|友军]附加[Cold|冰霜]伤害。消耗一个[Charges|耐力球]可以跳过此技能的冷却时间。

ShortDescription.en: [Shapeshift] into a [Werewolf] and let out an icy howl.
ShortDescription.zh: [Shapeshift|变形]为[Werewolf|狼人]，发出凛冽嚎叫。

Description.en: Teleport to a target, dealing [Lightning] [Attack] Damage.
Description.zh: 传送到目标位置，造成[Lightning|闪电][Attack|攻击]伤害。

Description.en: Explodes to deal [Cold] Damage in an area after a short delay, based on the life of the slain frozen Enemy.
Description.zh: 短暂延迟后爆炸，依据被击败的冻结敌人的生命在区域内造成[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

Description.en: Pull enemies in and pulse [Lightning] damage, [Hinder|Hindering] enemies [HitDamage|Hit]. Each pulse increases in damage, with the final pulse dealing additional damage.
Description.zh: 将敌人吸入并脉冲式释放[Lightning|闪电]伤害，对被[HitDamage|击中]的敌人施加[Hinder|缓速]效果。每次脉冲伤害逐次增强，最终脉冲将造成额外伤害。

Description.en: Deal [Fire] Damage in an Area based on a percentage of the expected Damage of the [Consume|Consumed] [Ignite].
Description.zh: 根据[Consume|消耗]的[Ignite|点燃]效果的预期伤害，在区域内造成一定比例的[Fire|火焰]伤害。

Description.en: Deal [Fire] Damage in an Area based on a percentage of the expected Damage of the [Consume|Consumed] [Ignite].
Description.zh: 根据[Consume|消耗]的[Ignite|点燃]效果的预期伤害，在区域内造成一定比例的[Fire|火焰]伤害。

Description.en: Creates multiple Fissures when landing with Supported Skill.
Description.zh: 使被辅助技能落地时产生多道裂缝。

Description.en: Deals [Fire] damage in an area around the exploding [Corpse] based on its maximum Life.
Description.zh: 根据爆炸的[Corpse|灵柩]生命上限，在其周围区域造成[Fire|火焰]伤害。

Description.en: Creates Skittering Stone [Minion|Minions] from shattered objects created by Supported Skill.
Description.zh: 从被辅助技能粉碎的物体中产生飞掠石[Minion|召唤生物]。

Description.en: Hurl a fiery hammer that [Slam|Slams] into the ground and lodges there. While the hammer is lodged in the ground, reusing this Skill recalls the hammer and resets the Skill's cooldown. Alternatively, using a [Warcry] near the lodged hammer causes it to shatter, releasing a number of [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures] in a spiral.
Description.zh: 投掷一把烈焰之锤，[Slam|猛击]并嵌入地面。当锤子嵌在地面时，再次使用此技能会召回锤子并重置技能的冷却时间。或者，在嵌入的锤子附近使用[Warcry|战吼]会使其粉碎，以螺旋形释放多道[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]。

ShortDescription.en: Hurl a fiery hammer that shatters into [MoltenFissure|Molten Fissures] when you use a [Warcry].
ShortDescription.zh: 投掷一把烈焰之锤，当你使用[Warcry|战吼]时会粉碎成[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]。

Description.en: While active, the first time any Skill [HitDamage|Hits] a [Shock|Shocked] enemy in your [Presence], that Skill also [HitDamage|Hits] other [Shock|Shocked] enemies in your [Presence], up to a maximum.
Description.zh: 激活时，当你的任何技能首次[HitDamage|击中][Presence|在场]范围内的[Shock|感电]敌人时，该技能也会[HitDamage|击中]你[Presence|在场]范围内的其他[Shock|感电]敌人（存在上限）。

ShortDescription.en: Skills [HitDamage|Hitting] [Shock|Shocked] enemies in your [Presence] also [HitDamage|Hit] other [Shock|Shocked] enemies in your [Presence], up to a maximum.
ShortDescription.zh: [HitDamage|击中]你[Presence|在场]范围内[Shock|感电]敌人的技能也会[HitDamage|击中]你[Presence|在场]范围内的其他[Shock|感电]敌人（存在上限）。

Description.en: Consume stored [Minion] Life to [Reviving|Revive] your [Minion|Minions]. [Reviving|Revives] as many [Minion|Minions] as possible with total maximum Life equal to or less than the Life stored by Grim Feast, prioritising those with higher maximum Life.
Description.zh: 消耗储存的[Minion|召唤生物]生命以[Reviving|复活]你的[Minion|召唤生物]。最多[Reviving|复活]生命总和不超过饕餮飨宴所储存的生命的[Minion|召唤生物]，优先复活生命上限更高者。

ShortDescription.en: Consume stored Life from [Minion] deaths to [Reviving|Revive Minions].
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗由[Minion|召唤生物]被击败时所储存的生命以[Reviving|复活召唤生物]。

Description.en: [Empowered|Empowers] the next [Projectile] Skill you use, causing it to create additional [Projectile|Projectiles] and fly faster.
Description.zh: [Empowered|强化]你下一次使用的[Projectile|投射物]技能，使其创造额外的[Projectile|投射物]并飞行得更快。

Description.en: Summon an untargetable Lightless Stalker [Minion] which blasts enemies with malefic visions, [Hinder|Hindering] their movement. Enemies that die while affected by the visions, or [Rarity|Rare] and [Rarity|Unique] enemies hit by you or your [Minion|Minions], spawn Foul Eye [Minion|Minions] which last for a duration or until killed.
Description.zh: 召唤一个无法被攻击的暗光潜行者[Minion|召唤生物]，用邪恶幻象轰击敌人，[Hinder|缓速]其移动。受到幻象影响时被击败的敌人，或被你或你的[Minion|召唤生物]击中的[Rarity|稀有]和[Rarity|传奇]敌人，会生成邪眼[Minion|召唤生物]，持续一段时间或直到被击败。

Description.en: Create an area of Toxic Bloom on the ground around you. While in the Bloom, you have increased Skill costs, Regenerate Life, and your [Projectile] [Attack|Attacks] attach a Toxic Pustule, which can be [Poison|Poisoned]. Pustules will [DetonationTime|Detonate] after a duration or when enough [Poison] has been applied, dealing more damage based on the stored [Poison] damage and applying [Poison] in an area around it.
Description.zh: 在你周围的地面上产生剧毒花群区域。位于花群范围时，你的技能消耗提高，可以再生生命，并且[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]会附着一个可以造成[Poison|中毒]的剧毒芽孢。芽孢会在持续一段时间后或施加足够[Poison|中毒]时[DetonationTime|引爆]，根据积蓄的[Poison|中毒]伤害在其周围区域造成伤害并施加[Poison|中毒]。

ShortDescription.en: Create an area of Toxic Bloom that regenerates Life and enhances your [Projectile] Skills with deadly [Poison|Poisonous] pustules.
ShortDescription.zh: 产生剧毒花群区域，再生生命并用致命的[Poison|剧毒]芽孢强化你的[Projectile|投射物]技能。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you cast [Spell|Spells]. Using the Invocation once sufficient [Energy|Energy] is gathered will consume the [Energy|Energy] to trigger socketed [Spell|Spells], and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough [Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，当你对敌人施放[Spell|法术]时都会获得[Energy|能量]。积累一定的[Energy|能量]后再次使用该咒祈，即可消耗[Energy|能量]并触发镶嵌的[Spell|法术]。[Energy|能量]足够时可以多次触发。

Description.en: Ready your active [Bow] or [Spear], [Empowered|Empowering] your next [Repeat|Repeatable] [Bow] or [Projectile] [Spear] [Attack|Attacks] to [Conversion|Convert] [Physical] Damage to [Cold] Damage and [Trigger] [IceFragment|Ice Fragments] on [HitDamage|Hit]. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending a [Charges|Frenzy Charge]. Cannot [Empowered|Empower] [Sustained] Skills.
Description.zh: 准备好你激活的[Bow|弓类]武器或[Spear|战矛]，[Empowered|强化]你的下一个[Repeat|可重复]的[Bow|弓类]武器或[Projectile|投射物]类[Spear|战矛]的[Attack|攻击]，将[Physical|物理]伤害[Conversion|转化]为[Cold|冰霜]伤害，并在[HitDamage|击中]时[Trigger|触发][IceFragment|冰霜碎片]。消耗一个[Charges|狂怒球]可重置技能冷却时间。无法[Empowered|强化][Sustained|持续性]技能。

ShortDescription.en: [Empowered|Empower] your next [Bow] or [Projectile] [Spear] [Attack] to [Conversion|Convert] [Physical] damage and create [IceFragment|Ice Fragments].
ShortDescription.zh: [Empowered|强化]你的下一次可连射的[Bow|弓类]武器或[Projectile|投射物]类[Spear|战矛]的[Attack|攻击]，将[Conversion|转化][Physical|物理]伤害并产生[IceFragment|冰霜碎片]。

Description.en: When you [HitDamage|Hit] with [UnarmedAttack|Unarmed] [Melee] [Attack|Attacks], calls down lightning bolts which deal [UnarmedDamage|Unarmed] [Attack|Attack] damage to all surrounding enemies.
Description.zh: 当你用[UnarmedAttack|徒手][Melee|近战][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]时，召唤闪电箭对所有周围敌人造成[UnarmedDamage|徒手][Attack|攻击]伤害。

Description.en: When you [HitDamage|Hit] with [Unarmed] [Melee] [Attack|Attacks], projects icy wind which deal [Unarmed] [Attack|Attack] damage to all surrounding enemies and destroy [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals].
Description.zh: 当你使用[Unarmed|徒手][Melee|近战][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]时，会投射出冰寒霜风，对周围所有敌人造成[Unarmed|徒手][Attack|攻击]伤害，并摧毁[IceCrystals|冰晶]。

Description.en: Direct your flying companion to eviscerate another player's pet.
Description.zh: 指示你的飞行伙伴撕碎另一名玩家的宠物。

ShortDescription.en: Direct your flying companion to eviscerate another player's pet.
ShortDescription.zh: 指示你的飞行伙伴撕碎另一名玩家的宠物。

Description.en: Hinekora observes your Future-Past granting you the opportunity to subvert a lesser fate. After a period of Hindsight, she will grant you her Foresight, which prevents you from avoiding Hits while Dodge Rolling. When you are Hit while Dodge Rolling, Hinekora restores you to full Life immediately before taking damage from the Hit, and grants you Sight Beyond Sight, which prevents you from dying.
Description.zh: 辛格拉观察你未来的过去，给予你小幅颠覆命运的机会。经过一段事件的后见之明后，她会给予你先见之明，使你在闪避翻滚时无法避免击中。当你在闪避翻滚期间被击中时，辛格拉会在你受到击中伤害前立即将你恢复到满血，并给予你超越视线，使你不会被击败。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to imbue your armour with Runic Plates. When you are [HitDamage|Hit] while you have these plates, some of the damage you would take will be prevented, and this skill will cause backlash, dealing your [Thorns] damage in an area around your attacker.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]为你的护甲注入符文嵌板。当你拥有这些符文嵌板并受到[HitDamage|击中]时，此技能会产生反冲，对攻击者周围区域造成你的[Thorns|荆棘]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: [Channelling|Channel] to imbue your armour with runic plates.
ShortDescription.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]为你的护甲注入符文嵌板。

Description.en: Explodes and deals [Chaos] Damage when an Enemy enters the area, applying the supported [Curse] on [HitDamage|Hit].
Description.zh: 当敌人进入区域时爆炸，并造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害，[HitDamage|击中]时施加被辅助的[Curse|诅咒]。

ShortDescription.en: Explodes to deal [Chaos] Damage and apply [Curse] on [HitDamage|Hit].
ShortDescription.zh: 爆炸造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害，并[HitDamage|击中]时施加[Curse|诅咒]。

Description.en: [DNT-UNUSED] An Edict, but flawed.
Description.zh: 一道敕令，但它有缺陷。

Description.en: [Command] a Skeletal Frost Mage to target a location or [Minion] and apply Ice Armour to [Minion|Minions] in an area, reducing damage taken from [HitDamage|Hits], causing damage to enemies that [HitDamage|Hit] them, and counting as [Freeze|Frozen] for other effects.
Description.zh: [Command|命令]一个魔侍冰霜法师以一个位置或[Minion|召唤生物]为目标，对区域内的[Minion|召唤生物]施加护甲，减少来自[HitDamage|击中]的伤害，对[HitDamage|击中]它们的敌人造成伤害，并被其他效果视为[Freeze|被冻结]。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] a Skeletal Frost Mage to shield [Minion|Minions] in an area with a damaging Ice Armour.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]一个魔侍冰霜法师为区域内的[Minion|召唤生物]提供伤害性冰霜护甲。

Description.en: While active, has a chance to create an [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] [Remnant] when you [Freeze], [Shock] or [Ignite] a target.
Description.zh: 激活时，当你[Freeze|冻结]、[Shock|感电]或[Ignite|点燃]目标时有几率产生一个[ElementalInfusion|灌注][Remnant|残片]。

Description.en: [Command] a Skeletal Brute to use a [Warcry], [Intimidate|Intimidating] nearby enemies and [Consume|Consuming] [Freeze] on enemies and allies to deal damage in an Area around them.
Description.zh: [Command|命令]一个魔侍蛮兵使用[Warcry|战吼]，[Intimidate|威吓]附近敌人并[Consume|消耗]敌人和友军身上的[Freeze|冻结]，在其周围区域造成伤害。

ShortDescription.en: [Command] a Skeletal Brute to use a [Warcry], [Intimidate|Intimidating] enemies and [Consume|Consuming] [Freeze] on allies and enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: [Command|命令]一个魔侍蛮兵使用[Warcry|战吼]，[Intimidate|威吓]敌人并[Consume|消耗]友军和敌人身上的[Freeze|冻结]。

Description.en: Conjures a number of icy [Projectile|Projectiles] that launch towards the target. [Projectile|Projectiles] that [HitDamage|Hit] a [Chill|Chilled] or [Frozen] target create chunks of ice that deal additional damage on impacting the ground. [Consume|Consumes] a [Cold] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to cause each [Projectile] to lodge into the enemy then explode.
Description.zh: 召唤多个冰霜[Projectile|投射物]向目标发射。[HitDamage|击中][Chill|冰缓]或[Frozen|冻结]目标的[Projectile|投射物]会产生冰块，撞击地面时造成额外伤害。尽量[Consume|消耗]一次[Cold|冰霜][ElementalInfusion|灌注]，使每个[Projectile|投射物]嵌入敌人然后爆炸。

ShortDescription.en: Conjures icy [Projectile|Projectiles] that create damaging ice chunks against [Chill|Chilled] or [Frozen] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤冰霜[Projectile|投射物]，对[Chill|冰缓]或[Frozen|冰冻]敌人产生伤害性冰块。

Description.en: An arc of [Lightning|Lightning] stretches from the caster to a targeted enemy and [Chain|Chains] on to other nearby enemies. [Consume|Consumes] a [Lightning] [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] if possible to deal more damage and [Chain] further.
Description.zh: 一道[Lightning|闪电]之弧从施法者射向目标敌人，并[Chain|连锁]到其他附近敌人。尽量[Consume|消耗]一次[Lightning|闪电][ElementalInfusion|灌注]，造成更多伤害并[Chain|连锁]到更远的敌人身上。

ShortDescription.en: Fire a [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] bolt.
ShortDescription.zh: 发射一道[Chain|连锁][Lightning|闪电]箭。

Description.en: Conjure Abyssal spirits to [Hinder] a [Rarity|Rare] [MonsterCategory|Undead] for a duration. If you defeat the [MonsterCategory|Undead] while it is [Hinder|Hindered], it will be captured and stored into a Soul Crystal Skill Gem. The Soul Crystal will allow a wielder of great Abyssal power to summon the bound [MonsterCategory|Undead] as a [Reviving] [Companion].
Description.zh: 召唤深渊之灵持续使一个[Rarity|稀有][MonsterCategory|亡灵][Hinder|缓速]。若你在该[MonsterCategory|亡灵]被[Hinder|缓速]期间将其击败，它将被捕获并封存于一颗灵魂水晶技能宝石中。这颗灵魂水晶的持有者，若拥有强大的深渊力量，即可召唤被束缚的[MonsterCategory|亡灵]作为[Reviving|可复活的][Companion|伙伴]。

ShortDescription.en: [Hinder] a [Rarity|Rare] [MonsterCategory|Undead] with Abyssal spirits to bind it on death.
ShortDescription.zh: 用深渊之灵使一个[Rarity|稀有][MonsterCategory|亡灵][Hinder|缓速]，在其死亡时将其束缚。

Description.en: Summon a [Reviving] [MonsterCategory|Undead] [Companion] to aid you in combat.
Description.zh: 召唤一个[Reviving|可复活的][MonsterCategory|亡灵][Companion|伙伴]协助你作战。

Description.en: Consume a [Charges|Power Charge] when you cast a damaging [Spell] to trigger an Abyssal Apparition who will also cast that same [Spell] for you. Does not work with [Channelling] Spells, Spells with a Cooldown, [Trigger|Triggered] Spells, Spells granted by items, or Spells which already consume a [Charges|Power Charge]. This Skill is not directly Supportable.
Description.zh: 当你施放一个伤害性的[Spell|法术]时，消耗一个[Charges|暴击球]触发一个深渊幻象，深渊幻象会和你施放同样的[Spell|法术]。无法施放[Channelling|持续吟唱]法术、具有冷却时间的法术、[Trigger|触发]法术、物品赋予的法术或已消耗一个[Charges|暴击球]的法术。此技能无法直接辅助。

Description.en: Creates spreading [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground] around [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] created by Supported Skills.
Description.zh: 在被辅助技能创造的[IceCrystals|冰晶]周围，生成蔓延的[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]。

Description.en: Whack another exile with your severed arm.
Description.zh: 用你的断臂猛击其他流放者。

ShortDescription.en: Whack another exile with your severed arm.
ShortDescription.zh: 用你的断臂猛击其他流放者。

Description.en: While active, a portion of the [Physical] [Attack] damage you deal is stored. Casting a [Spell] uses the stored damage to create a patch of [ThornyGround|Thorny Ground] that deals [Spell] damage to moving enemies.
Description.zh: 激活时，你造成的[Physical|物理][Attack|攻击]伤害的一部分会被存储。施放[Spell|法术]会消耗存储的伤害来创建一片[ThornyGround|荆棘地面]，对在其上移动的敌人造成[Spell|法术]伤害。

Description.en: While active, you constantly regenerate [Rage].
Description.zh: 激活时，你持续生成[Rage|怒火]。

ShortDescription.en: Enter a bestial frenzy but constantly lose Life.
ShortDescription.zh: 进入兽性狂乱状态，但不断失去生命。

Description.en: While active, your Fury builds from [Attack|Attacking] enemies. Using this Skill releases your Fury to send you into a bestial frenzy, gaining damage and [Onslaught] but constantly losing life and forcing you into animal form. The frenzy ends immediately if you return to human form. You cannot gain Fury while in a frenzy.
Description.zh: 激活时，[Attack|攻击]敌人可积累狂怒值。使用此技能将释放狂怒，进入兽性狂乱状态，获得伤害加成与[Onslaught|猛攻]效果，但会持续流失生命，并强制你保持动物形态。若变回人形，狂乱状态将立即结束。在狂乱状态下无法继续积累狂怒值。

Description.en: This skill is [Trigger|Triggered] when Predator's Mark [MarkActivate|Activates] to Summon a Wolf [Minion] that follows you as long as it lives.
Description.zh: 当掠食者印记[MarkActivate|激活]时，此技能将被[Trigger|触发]，召唤一只狼类[Minion|召唤生物]。只要该狼存活，它就会一直跟随你。

Description.en: Build [Glory] by gaining [Rage] while already at maximum [Rage]. When you have maximum [Glory], roar to the heavens to bring them down upon your enemies. For the duration of the Skill, meteors rain down around you and you [Gain] [Fire] damage and [Rage] regeneration. This Skill's effects are suppressed if you leave [Bear] form, but will resume if you return to [Bear] form before the duration expires.
Description.zh: 在[Rage|怒火]达到上限时继续获取[Rage|怒火]可积攒[Glory|荣耀]。当[Glory|荣耀]达到上限时，向天怒吼引动天罚攻击敌人。技能持续期间，陨石将环绕你坠落，使你[Gain|获得][Fire|火焰]伤害加成和[Rage|怒火]回复。若你脱离[Bear|巨熊]形态，此技能效果将被中止；但在持续时间内重新变为[Bear|巨熊形态]，效果将继续。

ShortDescription.en: Build [Glory] in [Bear] form, then call down meteors around you for a sustained duration.
ShortDescription.zh: 在[Bear|巨熊形态]下积攒[Glory|荣耀]，随后在持续时间内唤来环绕自身的陨石。

Description.en: Leash the stars themselves by leveraging your vast magical power, repeatedly [Trigger|Triggering] Starfall targeting an enemy in an area around you, or a random location in that area if no enemies can be targeted.
Description.zh: 利用你浩瀚的魔法力量牵引星辰本身，在你周围区域内反复[Trigger|触发]星陨，若区域内无敌人可锁定，则改为随机位置。

ShortDescription.en: Call to the stars using sheer magical power to rain down Verisium comets around you.
ShortDescription.zh: 凭借纯粹的魔法力量向星辰呼唤，使维金彗星如雨般降临在你周围。

Description.en: A star falls at a targeted location, dealing area damage on impact. Larger stars leave [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground] for a short duration.
Description.zh: 一颗星辰坠落在目标地点，撞击时造成范围伤害。较大的星辰会短暂留下[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]。

Description.en: Build [Glory] by [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies with [ElementalDamage|Elemental] damage. When you have maximum [Glory], you may become the walking Apocalypse for a duration, [Trigger|Triggering] one of multiple powerful [ElementalDamage|Elemental] Skills at an interval while this [Buff] lasts.
Description.zh: 通过[ElementalDamage|元素]伤害[HitDamage|击中]敌人来积攒[Glory|荣耀]。当[Glory|荣耀]达到上限时，你可在一段时间内化身为行走的天灾。该[Buff|增益状态]持续期间将间歇性随机[Trigger|触发]多种强力[ElementalDamage|元素]技能之一。

ShortDescription.en: Build [Glory] and become a walking Apocalypse, wielding the [ElementalDamage|Elements] themselves against your enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 积攒[Glory|荣耀]并化身为行走的天灾，将[ElementalDamage|元素]之力本身作为武器挥向你的敌人。

Description.en: Targets an area or an enemy, calling down a massive meteor to strike an area, dealing [Fire] damage and contributing to your enemies' extinction.
Description.zh: 瞄准一个区域或敌人，召唤巨型陨石轰击目标区域，造成[Fire|火焰]伤害并加速敌人的灭亡。

ShortDescription.en: Call down a powerful meteor.
ShortDescription.zh: 召唤强力陨石轰击目标。

Description.en: Targets an area or an enemy, causing a series of icy hailstones to rain down in an area over a duration.
Description.zh: 瞄准一个区域或敌人，在持续时间内召唤一连串冷冽冰雹倾泻于目标区域。

ShortDescription.en: Rain down a series of icy hailstones in an area to deal significant [Cold] damage.
ShortDescription.zh: 在区域内降下连续冰雹，造成大量[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

Description.en: Targets an area or an enemy, causing a rapid buildup of pulsing [Lightning] damage in an area that culminates in a powerful final [Lightning] strike.
Description.zh: 瞄准一个区域或敌人，在目标地点引发急速积聚的[Lightning|闪电]脉冲伤害，最终以一道强力的终结[Lightning|闪电]打击收尾。

ShortDescription.en: Unleash a series of pulses, culminating in a powerful [Lightning] strike.
ShortDescription.zh: 释放一连串脉冲，最终以强力[Lightning|闪电]打击收尾。

Description.en: Spawn a verdant flower that grows and explodes.
Description.zh: 召唤一株翠绿的花朵，其将持续生长并爆炸。

Description.en: Causes a fiery explosion in a cone behind the target, dealing [Attack] damage which is not based on your [MartialWeapon|Weapon]
Description.zh: 在目标身后引发一道锥形火焰爆炸，造成[Attack|攻击]伤害。此伤害不基于你的[MartialWeapon|武器]。

Description.en: Sends a [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] [Projectile] from the [Shock|Shocked] enemy towards a nearby Drenched enemy, dealing [Spell] damage.
Description.zh: 从[Shock|感电]敌人处，向附近被浸湿的敌人发射一枚[Chain|连锁][Lightning|闪电][Projectile|投射物]，造成[Spell|法术]伤害。

Description.en: Mirrors of Refraction appear in your [Presence] periodically. [HitDamage|Hitting] a mirror with a [Spell] [Projectile] causes it to shatter, copying the projectiles in a nova around the destroyed mirror. Copied [Projectile|Projectiles] may be copied again when colliding with other mirrors.
Description.zh: 折射之镜会周期性在你[Presence|在场]时生成。使用[Spell|法术][Projectile|投射物][HitDamage|击中]镜子会使其碎裂，并在破碎的镜子周围呈新星状复制这些投射物。被复制的[Projectile|投射物]在接触到其他镜子时可能被再次复制。

Description.en: While active, taking [HitDamage|Hit] damage from enemies to your [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] causes you to gain [Armour] for a short duration. [Armour] gained from multiple [HitDamage|Hits] can stack. The total [Armour] gained from this Skill cannot exceed the [ItemArmour|Item Armour] on your [EquipArmour|Equipped Armour Items].
Description.zh: 激活时，敌人的[HitDamage|击中]伤害若作用于你的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]，将使你在短期内获得[Armour|护甲]。多次[HitDamage|击中]获得的[Armour|护甲]效果可以叠加。通过此技能获得的总[Armour|护甲]值不得超过你[EquipArmour|已装备护甲物品]的[ItemArmour|物品护甲]总和。

Description.en: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you spend Mana. Using the Invocation once sufficient [Energy|Energy] is gathered will consume the [Energy|Energy] to create visages which attack once with a socketed [Shapeshift|Shapeshifting] [Attack], creating multiple visages if it has enough [Energy].
Description.zh: 激活时，消耗魔力时可获得[Energy|能量]。当积攒了足够的[Energy|能量]后使用此召唤技能，将消耗[Energy|能量]来创建幻影，这些幻影会使用已镶嵌的[Shapeshift|变形][Attack|攻击]技能发动一次攻击。若[Energy|能量]充足，则可创建多个幻影。

Description.en: Attach a Toxic Pustule to the enemy, which [DetonationTime|Detonates] after a delay, dealing [Attack] damage. They can also be [Poison|Poisoned], causing them to [DetonationTime|Detonate] faster and more violently.
Description.zh: 将一个剧毒芽孢附着在敌人身上，其将在短暂延迟后[DetonationTime|引爆]，造成[Attack|攻击]伤害。芽孢也可被施加[Poison|中毒]状态，这会使其更快[DetonationTime|引爆]且威力更猛。

Description.en: Creates a deadly slash towards the target, dealing [Attack] damage which is not based on your [MartialWeapon|Weapon]
Description.zh: 向目标发起一次致命劈砍，造成[Attack|攻击]伤害。此伤害不基于你的[MartialWeapon|武器]。

Description.en: Build [Glory] by dealing [Chaos] damage to enemies. When you have maximum [Glory], you can entreat the Dreamer to inhabit you, briefly becoming his [Archon].
Description.zh: 通过对敌人造成[Chaos|混沌]伤害来积累[Glory|荣耀]。当你拥有满[Glory|荣耀]时，可以祈求幻梦者附身于你，短暂化身为他的[Archon|执政官]。

Description.en: You are chosen by Azmerian spirits who provide guidance, allowing you to see nearby [AncientBlooms|Ancient Blooms].
Description.zh: 你被阿兹莫里万灵选中，它们指引着你，使你能够看见附近的[AncientBlooms|远古之花]。

ShortDescription.en: Azmerian spirits offer guidance, allowing you to see nearby [AncientBlooms|Ancient Blooms].
ShortDescription.zh: 阿兹莫里万灵指引着你，使你能够看见附近的[AncientBlooms|远古之花]。

Description.en: Leap into the air carried by divine wings, damaging enemies with your spear where you land. If there is a [DivineFragment|Fragment of Divinity] near you or the targeted location, this attack will [Consume] it when you leap to become [Empowered], dealing more damage and granting life and mana recovery. This skill does not use up its Cooldown when empowered.
Description.zh: 挥动神圣之翼跃入空中，以长矛重击落地处的敌人。若你附近或目标位置存在[DivineFragment|神圣碎片]，此次跳跃将[Consume|消耗]该碎片并获得[Empowered|强化]，造成更多伤害并回复生命与魔力。此技能在强化状态下不消耗其冷却时间。

ShortDescription.en: Leap into the air carried by divinity, damaging enemies with your spear where you land.
ShortDescription.zh: 挥动神圣之翼跃入空中，以长矛重击落地处的敌人。

Description.en: Build up Glory by [Freeze|Freezing] or [Chill|Chilling] enemies. When you have maximum [Glory] you may jump backwards loosing your [Mace] with the force of a falling comet onto your target. The impact releases [MoltenFissure|Fissures] and causes stars to fall in the area for a brief period.
Description.zh: 通过[Freeze|冰冻]或[Chill|冰缓]敌人来积攒[Glory|荣耀]。后跃并将[Mace|锤类]武器奋力掷出，锤类武器会在抵达目标地点时爆炸，释放出[MoltenFissure|熔岩裂缝]，并使流星短暂地坠落于该区域。

ShortDescription.en: Build [Glory], then loose your [Mace] like a comet to create fissures and call down the stars on your enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 积攒[Glory|荣耀]。将[Mace|锤类]武器如彗星般掷出，创造裂缝，召唤流星坠落于敌人之上。

Description.en: While active, summons short-lived Azmerian Swarms when you kill enemies affected by [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] or hit [Rarity|Rare or Unique] enemies affected by [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments]. The swarms are untargetable [Minion|Minions] that pursue nearby enemies to [Attack] them and infict [FaerieFire|Faerie Fire] on [HitDamage|Hit].
Description.zh: 激活状态下，当你击杀受到[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]影响的敌人，或击中受到[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]影响的[Rarity|稀有或传奇]敌人时，会召唤出短暂的阿兹莫里虫群。这些虫群是无法被选中的[Minion|召唤生物]，会追击附近的敌人，对它们发动[Attack|攻击]，并在[HitDamage|击中]时施加[FaerieFire|仙灵之火]。

Description.en: Draws out the latent fears of enemies you kill and [Rarity|Rare] or [Rarity|Unique] enemies you [HitDamage|Hit], turning them into unstable apparitions which charge towards enemies and then explode.
Description.zh: 从你击杀的敌人以及你[HitDamage|击中]的[Rarity|稀有]或[Rarity|传奇]敌人身上，汲取其潜藏的恐惧，将其转化为不稳定幽影，幽影会冲向敌人并爆炸。

Description.en: The Flock damages enemies around you.
Description.zh: 召唤鸟群伤害周围的敌人。

Description.en: Hurl your [Shield] as a [Projectile] which [Return|Returns] to you at the end of its flight. While the [Shield] is in flight, this skill is replaced with Embrace the Fall. This skill's cooldown is skipped if you catch the [Shield] as it [Return|Returns], or destroy an [IceCrystals|Ice Crystal] with the Embrace the Fall.
Description.zh: 将你的[Shield|盾牌]作为[Projectile|投射物]掷出，飞行结束后会[Return|返回]你身边。在[Shield|盾牌]处于飞行状态时，此技能会被天陨之拥替代。若你接住[Return|返回]的[Shield|盾牌]，或使用天陨之拥摧毁一个[IceCrystals|冰晶]，则重置该技能的冷却时间。

ShortDescription.en: Hurl your [Shield] outward which [Return|Returns] at the end of its flight.
ShortDescription.zh: 投掷你的[Shield|盾牌]，飞行结束后会[Return|返回]你身边。

Description.en: Teleport to your thrown [Shield], appearing in the air and [Slam|Slamming] it into the ground to deal damage in an area. Destroying an [IceCrystals|Ice Crystal] with this skill skips the cooldown of Soaring Midnight.
Description.zh: 传送至你掷出的[Shield|盾牌]处，凌空现身并向下[Slam|猛击]地面，造成范围伤害。用此技能摧毁一个[IceCrystals|冰晶]则重置午夜翱翔的冷却时间。

ShortDescription.en: To teleport to your [Shield] and perform a flying shield [Slam].
ShortDescription.zh: 传送至你的[Shield|盾牌]处，并施展凌空盾牌[Slam|猛击]。

Description.en: Conjure a [Chaos] tornado that chases down and [Slow|Slows] enemies.
Description.zh: 召唤一个[Chaos|混沌]龙卷风，追踪并[Slow|减速]敌人。

Description.en: Summons a [Shapeshift|Shapeshifting] Spirit Vessel [Companion] that uses copies of socketed [Bear], [Werewolf], and [Wyvern] Skills.
Description.zh: 召唤一个会[Shapeshift|变形]的灵魂容器[Companion|伙伴]，它会复制并使用已镶嵌的[Bear|巨熊]、[Werewolf|狼人]和[Wyvern|双足飞龙]技能。

Description.en: Direct your feline companion to mesmerize another player's pet.
Description.zh: 命令你的猫咪伙伴去魅惑另一名玩家的宠物。

ShortDescription.en: Direct your feline companion to mesmerize another player's pet.
ShortDescription.zh: 命令你的猫咪伙伴去魅惑另一名玩家的宠物。

Description.en: Dash to an enemy and [Strike] them, [CullingStrike|Culling] enemies if their life is low enough. When this skill kills an enemy you draw out their final fears, crushing them to create a shockwave. Enemies around you that can be [CullingStrike|Culled] will be highlighted.
Description.zh: 向一名敌人冲刺并发起[Strike|打击]，若其生命值过低则直接将其[CullingStrike|终结]。当此技能击杀敌人时，你会将其临死前的恐惧抽离并粉碎，从而制造出一道冲击波。周围可被[CullingStrike|终结]的敌人将被高亮显示。

ShortDescription.en: Dash to an enemy and kill near-death enemies to draw out their final fears.
ShortDescription.zh: 向一名敌人冲刺，击败生命值过低的敌人，将其临死前的恐惧抽离。

Description.en: While active, [Critical] [HitDamage|Hits] with other skills that kill targets, or hit powerful targets cause you to gain Arctic Petals. Once you have enough Arctic Petals they will be [Consume|Consumed] to create [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] near the most recent target.
Description.zh: 激活时，使用其他技能造成[Critical|暴击][HitDamage|击中]造成击杀，或击中强大目标，你将获得极寒花瓣。积聚足够数量的极寒花瓣后，它们会被[Consume|消耗]，并在最近目标所在位置生成一个[IceCrystals|冰晶]。

Description.en: While active, conjures a glittering barrier that accumulates protective gemstone Motes of each [Attributes|Attribute] type over time, but loses a random Mote when you are [HitDamage|Hit].
Description.zh: 激活时，召唤一面闪烁的屏障，随时间积累每种[Attributes|属性]类型的保护性宝石尘埃，但当你被[HitDamage|击中]时会失去一个随机尘埃。

Description.en: Explodes a Witchtoad to deal spell damage in an area.
Description.zh: 引爆一只女巫蟾蜍，造成范围法术伤害。

Description.en: While active, areas of intense runic energy are revealed to you. Standing over them grants you a powerful [Spell] damage boost but constantly drains your [Ward|Runic Ward]. Running out of [Ward|Runic Ward] causes the energy to temporarily dissipate.
Description.zh: 激活时，会揭示你附近强烈的符文能量区域。站立其上可让你获得强大的[Spell|法术]伤害加成，但会持续消耗你的[Ward|符文结界]。符文结界耗尽会导致能量消散。

Description.en: Unleash a wave of volatile ice that feeds on flames. While the wave doesn't deal damage, the ice latches onto [Ignite|Ignited] enemies, refreshing the duration of their active [Ignite] and rapidly [Freeze|Freezing] them but preventing them from being [Ignite|Ignited] further until the [Ignite] expires.
Description.zh: 释放一波不稳定的冰霜，以火焰为食。此波动本身不造成伤害，但冰霜会附着于[Ignite|点燃]的敌人，刷新其当前[Ignite|点燃]的持续时间并快速[Freeze|冻结]它们，同时阻止其在本次[Ignite|点燃]结束前被再次[Ignite|点燃]。

ShortDescription.en: Unleash a wave of volatile ice that causes rapid [Freeze] buildup on [Ignite|Ignited] enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: 释放一波不稳定的冰霜，对[Ignite|点燃]的敌人造成[Freeze|冻结]积蓄快速增加。

Description.en: Sacrifice your [Ward|Runic Ward] to send out an energy pulse that grants nearby [Allies] [Guard].
Description.zh: 献祭你的[Ward|符文结界]，释放一道能量脉冲，为附近的[Allies|友军]提供[Guard|防卫]。

ShortDescription.en: Sacrifice your [Ward|Runic Ward] to grant nearby [Allies] [Guard].
ShortDescription.zh: 献祭你的[Ward|符文结界]，为附近的[Allies|友军]提供[Guard|防卫]。

Description.en: Fires molten [Projectile|Projectiles] from the enemy hit, which will explode when they land nearby, dealing [Attack] damage in an area.
Description.zh: 从被击中的敌人身上发射熔融[Projectile|投射物]，投射物落在附近时会爆炸，对范围内造成[Attack|攻击]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Fires molten [Projectile|Projectiles].
ShortDescription.zh: 发射熔融[Projectile|投射物]。

Description.en: Spends [Ward] to generate [VerisiumInfusion|Verisium Infusions], which can be used in place of any [ElementalInfusion|Elemental Infusions].
Description.zh: 消耗[Ward|符文结界]以生成[VerisiumInfusion|维金灌注]，该灌注可用于替代任意[ElementalInfusion|元素灌注]。

ShortDescription.en: Generate [VerisiumInfusion|Verisium Infusions], which can be used in place of any [ElementalInfusion|Elemental Infusion].
ShortDescription.zh: 生成[VerisiumInfusion|维金灌注]，可用于替代任意[ElementalInfusion|元素灌注]。

Description.en: Spends all your [Ward] to gain a short-duration [Buff] that causes you to [Block] all [Block|Blockable] [HitDamage|Hits] and apply [ParriedDebuff|Parried] to enemies from which you've [Block|Blocked] a [HitDamage|Hit]. This [Buff] is removed if you are [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunned]. While this [Buff] is active, you cannot be [LightStun|Light Stunned], but [Block|Blocking] too much damage may [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] you.
Description.zh: 消耗所有[Ward|符文结界]以获得一个短时[Buff|增益]状态，使你能够[Block|格挡]所有[Block|可格挡]的[HitDamage|击中]，并对你已[Block|格挡]其[HitDamage|击中]的敌人施加[ParriedDebuff|被招架减益]状态。若你被[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]，此[Buff|增益]状态将被移除。当此[Buff|增益]状态激活时，你无法被[LightStun|轻度晕眩]，但[Block|格挡]过多伤害可能会使你[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]。

ShortDescription.en: Gain a [Buff] that causes you to [Block] [HitDamage|Hits] and apply [ParriedDebuff|Parried] to enemies you [Block].
ShortDescription.zh: 获得[Buff|增益]状态，使你能够[Block|格挡][HitDamage|击中]，并对你已[Block|格挡]的敌人施加[ParriedDebuff|被招架]减益状态。

Description.en: Target an area and [Curse] enemies within with a Verisium Rune, inflicting them with Fragility. [HitDamage|Hitting] these enemies causes the [Curse] to [Trigger] an explosion to deal damage in an area and apply significant [Knockback] to other enemies near the [Curse|Cursed] target, with more [Stun] buildup based on the Fragility on the target [HitDamage|Hit].
Description.zh: 选定一片区域，用维金符文[Curse|诅咒]其中的敌人，使其陷入脆弱。[HitDamage|击中]这些敌人会使[Curse|诅咒][Trigger|触发]一次爆炸，造成范围伤害，并对被[Curse|诅咒]目标附近的其他敌人施加显著的[Knockback|击退]，同时根据被[HitDamage|击中]目标身上的脆弱值造成更多[Stun|晕眩]积蓄。

ShortDescription.en: [Curse] enemies in an area, which causes explosions and [Knockback|Knocks Back] other nearby enemies if [Curse|Cursed] targets [HitDamage|Hit].
ShortDescription.zh: [Curse|诅咒]区域内的敌人，若[Curse|被诅咒]的目标被[HitDamage|击中]，则会引发爆炸并[Knockback|击退]附近的其他敌人。

Description.en: Deals [Physical] [Attack] damage in an area around the [Curse|Cursed] target that is not based on your [MartialWeapon|Weapon]'s damage. Other targets are [Knockback|Knocked back] and take more [Stun] buildup based on the Fragility they have.
Description.zh: 对被[Curse|诅咒]目标周围的区域造成[Physical|物理][Attack|攻击]伤害，此伤害不基于你的[MartialWeapon|武器]伤害。其他目标将被[Knockback|击退]，并根据其身上的脆弱值累积更多[Stun|晕眩]积蓄。

ShortDescription.en: Deal significant damage to the target and nearby enemies, applying [Knockback|Knockback] to all other targets.
ShortDescription.zh: 对目标及附近敌人造成大量伤害，并[Knockback|击退]所有其他目标。

Description.en: Tap into the power of the Triskelion Flame to [Empowered|Empower] the next [Cascadable|Cascadable] [Spell] you cast. The [Empowered] [Spell] becomes centred on your location, and [Cascadable|Cascades] to six areas around you in a Triskelion pattern.
Description.zh: 借助三耀之火的力量，[Empowered|强化]你下次施放的[Cascadable|可扩散][Spell|法术]。该[Empowered|强化的][Spell|法术]将以你的位置为中心，并沿三耀图案[Cascadable|扩散]至你周围的 6 个区域。

ShortDescription.en: [Empowered|Empower] the next [Cascadable|Cascadable] [Spell] you cast to target multiple areas around you.
ShortDescription.zh: [Empowered|强化]你下次施放的[Cascadable|可扩散][Spell|法术]，可扩散至周围的多个区域。

Description.en: {DNT] Swap the currently dominant form of the Cradle of Conflict.
Description.zh: 交换冲突摇篮当前的主导形态。

Description.en: Build [Glory] by spending [Ward|Runic Ward]. When you have maximum [Glory], you may call down a mass of Verisium from the sky, dealing high damage at the targeted location and summoning a [TemporaryMinion|Temporary Minion]. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast. [Consume|Consumes] a [VerisiumInfusion|Verisium Infusion], if possible, to increase the number of [TemporaryMinion|Minions] summoned .
Description.zh: 通过消耗[Ward|符文结界]来积攒[Glory|荣耀]。当你拥有满[Glory|荣耀]时，可以从天空召唤大量[Verisium|维金]，对目标地点造成高额伤害，并召唤一个[TemporaryMinion|临时召唤生物]。若目标点靠近你，施放时会向后跳跃。若可能，则[Consume|消耗]一个[VerisiumInfusion|维金灌注]以增加召唤的[TemporaryMinion|临时召唤生物]数量。

ShortDescription.en: Build [Glory] by spending [Ward|Runic Ward], then drop a mass of Verisium on the target and summon a [TemporaryMinion|Temporary Minion].
ShortDescription.zh: 通过消耗[Ward|符文结界]来积攒[Glory|荣耀]，然后从天空召唤大量维金，砸向目标地点，并召唤一个[TemporaryMinion|临时召唤生物]。

Description.en: [HitDamage|Hit] an enemy under the [CullingStrike|Culling Strike Threshold], causing them to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies. Highlights enemies under the [CullingStrike|Culling Strike Threshold].
Description.zh: [HitDamage|击中]一名处于[CullingStrike|终结阈值]以下的敌人，会使其猛烈爆炸，伤害周围的敌人。高亮显示处于[CullingStrike|终结阈值]以下的敌人。

ShortDescription.en: [HitDamage|Hit] an enemy under the [CullingStrike|Culling Strike Threshold] to cause them to explode, damaging nearby enemies.
ShortDescription.zh: [HitDamage|击中]一名处于[CullingStrike|终结阈值]以下的敌人，会使其猛烈爆炸，伤害周围的敌人。

Description.en: [Sacrifice] a portion of your Life to recover [Ward|Runic Ward]. [Ward|Runic Ward] recovered by this Skill can [Overflow].
Description.zh: [Sacrifice|牺牲]部分生命以回复[Ward|符文结界]。该技能回复的[Ward|符文结界]可以[Overflow|溢出]。

ShortDescription.en: [Sacrifice] a portion of your Life to recover [Ward|Runic Ward]. [Ward|Runic Ward] recovered by this Skill can [Overflow].
ShortDescription.zh: [Sacrifice|牺牲]部分生命以回复[Ward|符文结界]。该技能回复的[Ward|符文结界]可以[Overflow|溢出]。

Description.en: Spend [Ward] and target an area, transforming [Corpse|Corpses] into bitter cores that seek out enemies and [Chill] enemies near them. The cores explode at the end of their duration, creating runes which deal additional [Cold] damage over time.
Description.zh: 消耗[Ward|符文结界]并选定一片区域，将[Corpse|灵柩]转化为苦痛核心，这些核心会追踪敌人并[Chill|冰缓]其附近的敌人。核心在持续时间结束时爆炸，生成符文，造成额外的持续[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Transform [Corpse|Corpses] into bitter cores that seek out enemies and [Chill] them before exploding, creating runes which deal additional [Cold] damage over time.
ShortDescription.zh: 将[Corpse|灵柩]转化为苦痛核心，追踪敌人并[Chill|冰缓]其附近的敌人。核心在持续时间结束时爆炸，生成符文，造成额外的持续[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

Description.en: Spend [Ward|Runic Ward] to instantly [Reviving|Revive] your [Minion|Minions]. Prioritises the most powerful minions first.
Description.zh: 消耗[Ward|符文结界]以立即[Reviving|复活]你的[Minion|召唤生物]。优先复活最强大的召唤物。

ShortDescription.en: Spend [Ward|Runic Ward] to [Reviving|Revive] your [Minion|Minions].
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗[Ward|符文结界]以[Reviving|复活]你的[Minion|召唤生物]。

Description.en: Spend [Ward|Runic Ward] to cause damaging [IceCrystals|Ice-Crystal] spears to erupt from the ground around you. These spears can be destroyed for an explosion of [Cold] damage.
Description.zh: 消耗[Ward|符文结界]，在你的周围地面引发具有伤害的[IceCrystals|冰晶]长矛。这些长矛可被摧毁，被摧毁时会爆炸，造成[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

ShortDescription.en: Spend [Ward|Runic Ward] to cause damaging [IceCrystals|Ice-Crystal] spears to erupt from the ground around you. These spears can be destroyed for an explosion of [Cold] damage.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗[Ward|符文结界]，在你的周围地面引发具有伤害的[IceCrystals|冰晶]长矛。这些长矛可被摧毁，被摧毁时会爆炸，造成[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

Description.en: While active, [HitDamage|Hitting] with an [Attack] will spend [Ward|Runic Ward] to summon a Verisium Manifestation, a short-lived [TemporaryMinion|Temporary Minion] that rapidly [Attack|Attacks] nearby enemies, ignoring commands. Enemies will not directly engage these [Minion|Minions], and can pass through them.
Description.zh: 激活时，使用[Attack|攻击]造成[HitDamage|击中]会消耗[Ward|符文结界]，召唤一个维金化形——一种[TemporaryMinion|临时召唤生物]，会快速[Attack|攻击]附近的敌人，且无视指令。敌人不会直接与这些[Minion|召唤生物]交战，并可穿过它们。

ShortDescription.en: While active, [HitDamage|Hitting] with an [Attack] will summon a short-lived [TemporaryMinion|Temporary Minion] that rapidly [Attack|Attacks] nearby enemies. Enemies will not directly engage these manifestations, and can pass through them.
ShortDescription.zh: 激活时，使用[Attack|攻击]造成[HitDamage|击中]会召唤一个[TemporaryMinion|临时召唤生物]，快速[Attack|攻击]附近的敌人。敌人不会直接与这些化形交战，并可穿过它们。

Description.en: Summon a short-lived [TemporaryMinion|Verisium Manifestation] that launches [Projectile] [Attack|Attacks] at enemies.
Description.zh: 召唤一个短暂的[TemporaryMinion|维金化形]，向敌人发起[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]。

Description.en: While active, enemies you [Stun] or kill have a chance to generate a [Ward|Runic Ward] [Remnant]. These [Remnant|Remnants] can [Overflow] your [Ward|Runic Ward].
Description.zh: 激活时，你[Stun|晕眩]或击杀的敌人有几率生成一个[Ward|符文结界][Remnant|残片]。这些[Remnant|残片]可使你的[Ward|符文结界][Overflow|溢出]。

ShortDescription.en: While active, enemies you [Stun] or kill have a chance to generate a [Ward|Runic Ward] [Remnant]. These [Remnant|Remnants] can [Overflow] your [Ward|Runic Ward].
ShortDescription.zh: 激活时，你[Stun|晕眩]或击杀的敌人有几率生成一个[Ward|符文结界][Remnant|残片]。这些[Remnant|残片]可使你的[Ward|符文结界][Overflow|溢出]。

Description.en: Spend all your [Ward|Runic Ward] to summon [TemporaryMinion|Temporary] Wardbound Casters. These [Minion|Minions] target nearby enemies with damaging [Cold] [Spell|Spells].
Description.zh: 消耗所有[Ward|符文结界]来召唤[TemporaryMinion|临时]结界施法者。这些[Minion|召唤生物]会以伤害性[Cold|冰霜][Spell|法术]对付附近的敌人。

ShortDescription.en: Spend all your [Ward|Runic Ward] to summon [TemporaryMinion|Temporary] Wardbound Casters. These [Minion|Minions] target nearby enemies with damaging [Cold] [Spell|Spells].
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗所有[Ward|符文结界]来召唤[TemporaryMinion|临时]结界施法者。这些[Minion|召唤生物]会以伤害性[Cold|冰霜][Spell|法术]对付附近的敌人。

Description.en: Spend [Ward|Runic Ward] to create a Verisium volcano that deals damage on initial eruption and [Trigger|Triggers] [IceFragment|Ice Fragments].
Description.zh: 消耗[Ward|符文结界]以创造一座维金火山，在初次喷发时造成伤害并[Trigger|触发][IceFragment|冰霜碎片]。

ShortDescription.en: Spend [Ward|Runic Ward] to create a Verisium volcano that deals damage on intial eruption and [Trigger|Triggers] [IceFragment|Ice Fragments].
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗[Ward|符文结界]以创造一座维金火山，在初次喷发时造成伤害并[Trigger|触发][IceFragment|冰霜碎片]。

Description.en: Spend [Ward|Runic Ward] to create a number of [Hazard|Hazardous] Runes in a cone in front of you, which arm after a time. After arming, these Runes will activate when enemies step on them, exploding to deal [Attack] damage that is not based on your [MartialWeapon|Weapon]'s damage and apply [Electrocute|Electrocution] buildup.
Description.zh: 消耗[Ward|符文结界]在你前方的锥形区域内创造数个[Hazard|危险性]符文，这些符文会在一段时间后武装。武装后，当敌人踩踏时，这些符文将激活，爆炸造成[Attack|攻击]伤害，此伤害不基于你的[MartialWeapon|武器]的伤害，并施加[Electrocute|触电]积蓄。

ShortDescription.en: Spend [Ward|Runic Ward] to create a series of [Hazard|Hazardous] Runes which, after arming, will explode to damage and [Electrocute] enemies that step on them.
ShortDescription.zh: 消耗[Ward|符文结界]，创造数个[Hazard|危险性]符文。符文武装后，当敌人踩踏时，这些符文将爆炸，造成伤害并施加[Electrocute|触电]。

Description.en: Killing an enemy with [BloodLoss|Blood Loss] will cause a bloody explosion that deals [Physical] [Attack] damage to surrounding enemies. This damage is not based on your [MartialWeapon|Weapon Damage], but is based on their accumulated [BloodLoss|Blood Loss]. The explosion destroys their [Corpse] if the enemy was [Rarity|Normal or Magic].
Description.zh: 以[BloodLoss|失血]击杀敌人会引发鲜血爆炸，对周围敌人造成[Physical|物理] [Attack|攻击]伤害。此伤害不基于你的[MartialWeapon|武器伤害]，而是基于目标所累积的[BloodLoss|失血]量。若敌人为[Rarity|普通或魔法]怪物，爆炸会摧毁其[Corpse|灵柩]。

Description.en: Expend a large amount of [Ward|Runic Ward] to instantly create a short-lived copy of yourself that uses a Socketed Skill once, then vanishes. This Skill's cost is equal to the total cost of Socketed Skills. The copy cannot perform [Channelling|Channelled], [Remote], Cooldown or [Conditional] Skills, or summon [Minion|Minions].
Description.zh: 消耗大量[Ward|符文结界]，立即创造一个短暂的自身复制体。该复制体会使用一次已镶嵌的技能，随后消失。此技能的消耗等于已镶嵌技能的总消耗。复制体无法施放[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能、[Remote|远距]技能、有冷却时间的技能或[Conditional|条件]技能，也无法召唤[Minion|召唤生物]。

ShortDescription.en: Instantly create a short-lived copy of yourself that uses a Socketed Skill once.
ShortDescription.zh: 立即创造一个短暂的自身复制体。该复制体会使用一次已镶嵌的技能。

Description.en: [Channelling|Channel] to create a protective bubble all around you, [Block|Blocking] [HitDamage|Hits] against you. While [Channelling] this Skill, you cannot be [LightStun|Light Stunned] by [HitDamage|Hits] you [Block], and damage you take from [HitDamage|Hits] is also removed from [Ward|Runic Ward]. [Block|Blocking] [HitDamage|Hits] this way causes you to accumulate [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] buildup. You cannot recover [Ward|Runic Ward] while this Skill is active.
Description.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]以在你周围创造一个保护性泡泡，[Block|格挡]针对你的[HitDamage|击中]。[Channelling|持续吟唱]此技能时，你不会被你[Block|格挡]的[HitDamage|击中][LightStun|轻度晕眩]，且来自[HitDamage|击中]的伤害将先消耗[Ward|符文结界]。以此方式[Block|格挡][HitDamage|击中]会使你积蓄[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]。此技能激活期间，你无法恢复[Ward|符文结界]。

ShortDescription.en: [Channelling|Channel] to [Block] [HitDamage|Hits] against you at the cost of [Ward|Runic Ward].
ShortDescription.zh: [Channelling|持续吟唱]，消耗[Ward|符文结界]以[Block|格挡]针对你的[HitDamage|击中]。

Description.en: Raise a pair of electrified pylons in front of you which project a wall of electricity between them, damaging and [Electrocute|Electrocuting] enemies caught between them. [Projectile|Projectiles] you fire through the wall become energised, and discharge that energy on [HitDamage|Hit] as [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] beams.
Description.zh: 在你面前升起一对电塔，在两者之间投射出一道电力之墙，伤害并使被困其中的敌人[Electrocute|触电]。你发射的[Projectile|投射物]穿过此墙时会获得充能，并在[HitDamage|击中]时以[Chain|连锁][Lightning|闪电]光束的形式释放能量。

ShortDescription.en: Create a wall of electricity that [Electrocute|Electrocutes] enemies and energises your [Projectile|Projectiles].
ShortDescription.zh: 创造一道电力之墙，使敌人[Electrocute|触电]。并充能你的[Projectile|投射物]。

Description.en: Creates a Fractured Mimic of yourself, suspended in time at the point of casting the [Trigger|Triggering] [Spell]. If you reach the [Limit] of Fractured Mimics, they will all finish casting their [Spell|Spells] and disappear.
Description.zh: 创造一个自身的破碎拟像，在施放[Trigger|触发]类[Spell|法术]时将其定住。若达到破碎拟像的数量[Limit|上限]，它们将施放完全部[Spell|法术]后消失。

Description.en: While active, picking up [Remnant|Remnants] [Trigger|Triggers] a deadly explosion, dealing damage at the location of the [Remnant] based on the type of [Remnant] picked up.
Description.zh: 激活时，拾取[Remnant|残片]会[Trigger|触发]一次致命爆炸，在[Remnant|残片]所在位置造成伤害，伤害类型基于所拾取[Remnant|残片]的类型。

ShortDescription.en: While active, picking up [Remnant|Remnants] [Trigger|Triggers] a deadly explosion, dealing damage at the location of the [Remnant] based on the type of [Remnant] picked up.
ShortDescription.zh: 激活时，拾取[Remnant|残片]会[Trigger|触发]一次致命爆炸，在[Remnant|残片]所在位置造成伤害，伤害类型基于所拾取[Remnant|残片]的类型。

Description.en: Pour your [Ward|Runic Ward] into conjuring blades. For the duration of the [Buff], these blades fall on enemies [HitDamage|Hit] by your [Projectile] [Attack|Attacks].
Description.zh: 将你的[Ward|符文结界]灌注于召唤的刀刃。在[Buff|增益]状态持续期间，这些刀刃会落在被你的[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]的敌人身上。

ShortDescription.en: Pour your [Ward|Runic Ward] into conjured blades which fall on enemies [HitDamage|Hit] by your [Projectile] [Attack|Attacks].
ShortDescription.zh: 将你的[Ward|符文结界]灌注于召唤的刀刃。刀刃会落在被你的[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]的敌人身上。

Description.en: Blows strong enough to [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] an enemy reverberate in an area around the enemy and heavily [ArmourBreak|Break Armour].
Description.zh: 足以[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]敌人的攻击会在其周围区域内产生回荡，并造成大幅的[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]。

Description.en: While active, Sprinting turns you into a locust swarm which deals [Physical] [Attack] damage, which is not based on your [MartialWeapon|Weapon]'s damage, in an area around you. You take damage and gain [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] buildup if this [HitDamage|Hits] any targets, but damage you take from other sources while sprinting will not apply [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] or interrupt your sprinting.
Description.zh: 激活后，奔跑会使你化做一群蝗虫，在你周围区域造成[Physical|物理][Attack|攻击]伤害，此伤害不基于你的[MartialWeapon|武器]伤害。若在此状态下[HitDamage|击中]任何目标，你会受到伤害并积蓄[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]，但奔跑时来自其他来源的伤害不会使你[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]或打断奔跑。
